name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Give Us YOUR Child
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Tyrant Tim just doubled down on his radical policies. And this time it's directed right at your children! **Walz wants YOUR CHILD to take the experimental vaccine so badly that he is giving them $200 of taxpayer money to get the jab.** Then he is enticing parents into reporting the vaccination status of their children to his Dept of Health. Applicants get entered into sweepstakes for a $100,000 college scholarship. Did we just enter into the Twilight Zone?! This program MUST stop now! It's is wrong and immoral to make our children be part of a mass experiment. Especially since young, healthy children have almost no risk from natural infection of COVID. But I'm afraid these policies won't end. The media and the political establishment are bound and determined to get us all vaccinated. DAMN YOUR RIGHTS! **That's why Action 4 Liberty fights so hard against the political class - we won't let inaction, excuses and roadblocks get in the way of your health freedom. I don't care what political party is standing in the way!** But I need your help to keep pressuring the political class. They want us to go away. The political class is busy undermining us at every turn. They want us defunded, demoralized and rendered useless. **Don't let them succeed. Please support the one group in this state that is willing to take the fight to the political class to STAND UP for your health freedom.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=2 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=2)
---
I know what you are probably thinking - can we actually beat the political class and win?
## The answer is YES!
Politicians care about one thing, and that's their election. Which is precisely why Action 4 Liberty goes directly to the voters of bad behaving politicians. And it works!
Just last Friday, new Senate Majority Leader Jeremy Miller sent a letter to the Governor stating that Senate Republicans want to address vaccine mandates in the upcoming Special Session. They were mostly silent about the issue before.
**Action 4 Liberty's field team made over 5,000 phone calls to Miller's constituents and knocked on nearly a thousand doors in a matter of a week. That makes a BIG difference.**
[**Your donations**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=3) go directly to funding our growing field operations that deliver results. These are the same field operators we used to knock on 40,000 doors and make 55,000 phone calls to End Walz' Emergency Powers in June.
Think about that - we were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers with Democrats in control of the Minnesota House!
We can do this again on vaccine mandates!
But we can't do it without your help. Please support our field operations so we can STOP vaccine mandates in Minnesota once and for all.
**Peter, help my team continue phone calls, doorknocks and pressuring the political class to Stop Vaccine Mandates!**
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop the Walz-Biden Vaccine Mandates.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=4)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=give_us_your_child&n=7), software for leaders.

body:
We’re only days away. | | |
---
| | Sunday next week is our FINAL end-of-month deadline of the campaign. It’s our LAST chance to fully fund our Get Out the Vote program. AND it’s the final opportunity to send the message that we’re more fired up than ever to protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue. **Before midnight on Sunday, we’ve set a goal of raising $6 million online to our historic grassroots campaign.** **[It’s an incredible milestone — can you split a donation right now between Steve Sisolak and my campaign to help stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIPwY-56tPnGBANGVXBw6_fRHf0HtoU0qai9yhNb2go6S_MSK24S10-F6Y_stsGAqLbxqdbXbZ6j-8oCLYr0A6BGLLskenkP2lF-cbdjAN7z2uwa3nZEwkagSsBqDogqJKru2FPvkL_UbMfEr1CivJrS64wdsuGyzlr9GBSv-sGhmEesTbpmHqT_ouPZHin72pguO0B-i0WAoon18rNOiS9SlAoEM7Bdc3b0hLxCuBgAVv-fma4LeIDwLaad3XSChAUatyNeOPrNoUZXrmStCZ8JIH29dmcOvMSWjXW7KJpOxdRTQ_EjfFpzrrK-vsdFDuNr8RXMb1tNAZR4c3vQh8YyLGh0GHoec1I_8Lc3b7WrxN6DUM_8oWEhtbvImhBAbBh6MfShrbb4goG0H9OTH0-4/3gd/EM-slfhuSVOFwB2WEufN_A/h0/uf71YeSdMysltK22lrgSa9VsbpyMLtJZ_plceT5QxL4)** Your support is critical right now because we are just DAYS away from Election Day. Polls keep showing a tied race and every dollar we raise right now goes directly into our organizing and ads program. It’s this simple: If Democrats turnout like they did in 2020, we’re going to win on November 2. If they don’t, we’ll lose. At that point you can kiss all of Virginia’s progress goodbye and say hello to the resurgence of Trumpism in our country. I need your help to stop that from happening. **[Please, split a donation right now, and help us turn out the voters we need to keep Virginia blue.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3F-WWEfzKFepdMRtcNPEIPwY-56tPnGBANGVXBw6_fRHf0HtoU0qai9yhNb2go6S_MSK24S10-F6Y_stsGAqLbxqdbXbZ6j-8oCLYr0A6BEucg5EJmVAKlhgVgHLP7Fp6praggvU0IMcDPOcHavowFGKDEVywp6BHuIMr9ptc1oosA9-8A3tP1YK8Uyp8PpIXVVTqgNA_wP06EQljFI1fG3PoBdx6JfYbctjpt_EV3HR-wjwbzLcQ_bhgW9UZqI1Hg9eLXQBV7fmlffVHYusxSv3bl2qpkOg5E4PcSkNfL4msvMK8AB_zzry4wX7V2yiXK_dCNeI8z_e0WCtLQpq5_9bPRe12zLhx-r9PImrF6DOZt7WgnDYOtHrzqPfM4SYOim2aSTxlGCcFTb7gf6AzzRJ8I-C2UUSIUF5caZOyWU/3gd/EM-slfhuSVOFwB2WEufN_A/h1/zBRzC_0vpX69OrcJkvw6_9f6iVczMtT6VrXC2QEare0)** Talk soon, Terry

In a couple hours, we’ll file our final reports, and we’ll make our last budget decisions.

**_We need to make sure that we’ve got a winning strategy coming out of these decisions._**

With Democratic turnout in Virginia well under what we need to ensure victory over Trump-backed Republican extremists, we need to make sure we’ve got the resources we need to run a historical mobilization effort.

name: ACTION REQUESTED (via DCCC)

body:
Do you think Kevin McCarthy should be the next Speaker of the House? | | **FOX NEWS REPORT:
_Kevin McCarthy well-positioned to become next House Speaker_**
---
| | **[1] MINUTE POLL - Do you think Kevin McCarthy should become Speaker of the House??**

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTREDL3J~)
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

We're calling for 22 responses from your city by 11:59 PM tonight.

**We 're deeply concerned.**

Fox News just reported that Kevin McCarthy is poised to succeed Nancy Pelosi as the Speaker of the House:

_\-- He 's raised nearly **$60 MILLION** so far this year,
\-- He's transferred nearly **$30 MILLION** of that haul to his House Republicans,
\-- And he's leading an aggressive strategy to **DEFEAT 57** of our House Democrats._

**We can 't overstate how disastrous it would be to see Republicans take the Majority and Kevin McCarthy become Speaker of the House.**

He has sworn COMPLETE loyalty to Donald Trump -- _and even voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election._

We will fight like never before to defend our House Majority, keep Republicans out of office, and stop Kevin McCarthy from EVER holding the Speaker's gavel.

**But we 'll need support from grassroots Democrats like you to come out on top.**

That's why we're gathering data on where 21,800 of our best grassroots supporters stand on this pivotal issue.

[**Let us know: Do you think Kevin McCarthy should be the next Speaker of the House?**](https://links.e.dccc.)

---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

_If you can we kindly ask that you forward this email to 5 friends after entering your responses. The more responses we receive, the better our internal data becomes._

---
Thank you,

DCCC

body:
How many times does Biden have to fail before liberals finally call him out? |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bfb39256ff84861b99d4e46c9ef532f&_e=jSo7mr7U0ejuEjuwSZlgKSoFj3H89rXD7d3RlXymLGNjeNHVyoXfGwckpLtgi3GOp7R5vWT_Q6V7qixnX-hyEEREzD1vnsOpaVDsBGmVd7ekCbf-msAQu3rHaP36obhzgueF5UAncfguFMS-kdZPeswjlb5toE_jCpA99aSDvldykzlN5eMgM3THPuZzYoRRrL3NcV2aTtQkRB87VLZoBe_5lZzWCRSFhHzpD-Wu0i9esuR3cpVVObWK2qGFQo3gEVnr1Mo_G_W3rNJtH81IrmL_aJDlUCUQKeTYMGJQSldSPKBtJ0Cc-kxCCJPizdgo94rhy20qOU6skeZCVCT7GVKzQoen0FhOBWSJLwX0FrG_IdMpnCMTfqvpZAKKDu4-OQtMd4O87kkwzOvkXCFvK0XHPP8rfIXApP1PmvCtANs%3D)

---
**Fellow American - How many times do you think Joe Biden has to fail before liberals finally call him out for being the worst President in history?**

I’m serious, all these liberal politicians like Michael Bennett and Chuck Schumer, keep bowing to Joe Biden’s nonsense. How can they keep looking the other way when he fails at simple things like getting Americans out of Afghanistan, or not turning America into a police state over masks and vaccines? _**HE’S BEEN PRESIDENT FOR BARELY 10 MONTHS.**_

In the military, you would be court-martialed and thrown in jail for the things Joe Biden has done.

If the CEO of a company acted like Joe Biden and made a decision leading to death and a hostile work environment, they’d be fired and sued back to the stone age.

_When will liberals stand up to Joe Biden?_ _**NEVER.**_

**It’s up to us to change Washington. We don’t need more yes-men Senators like Bennet and Schumer. We don’t need more failed policies, and we don’t need politicians that treat Americans like pawns instead of people.** [**What America needs is people like you, Fellow American.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bfb39256ff84861b99d4e46c9ef532f&_e=jSo7mr7U0ejuEjuwSZlgKSoFj3H89rXD7d3RlXymLGNjeNHVyoXfGwckpLtgi3GOp7R5vWT_Q6V7qixnX-hyEEREzD1vnsOpaVDsBGmVd7ekCbf-msAQu3rHaP36obhzgueF5UAncfguFMS-kdZPeswjlb5toE_jCpA99aSDvldykzlN5eMgM3THPuZzYoRRrL3NcV2aTtQkRB87VLZoBaNmPK2tzrXx7tXvcVhI3zd8QILG9W2C0dq4xqenQ2JyByfFqjxkmqzmnOK1Fd_rF5ixH6R1iJCn-lXx62uC7Ggonbl9qHv1HgPOp_Yt5V8wraculo01t9Lo7REwy-Tc1IbNoBCxWbpYslBSDuL47FDJs1UbKSibQ_5J-07qO_lRB4vAjVAib0ahMh0yA4D6No_Slmpkxvp72L24FSNchGc%3D)

[**PITCH IN TO HELP FIRE A LIBERAL YES-MAN**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bfb39256ff84861b99d4e46c9ef532f&_e=jSo7mr7U0ejuEjuwSZlgKSoFj3H89rXD7d3RlXymLGNjeNHVyoXfGwckpLtgi3GOp7R5vWT_Q6V7qixnX-hyEEREzD1vnsOpaVDsBGmVd7ekCbf-msAQu3rHaP36obhzgueF5UAncfguFMS-kdZPeswjlb5toE_jCpA99aSDvldykzlN5eMgM3THPuZzYoRRrL3NcV2aTtQkRB87VLZoBUYNmQzgrm-52YIcQ2KnsOpH3648sODYLDa0S27fmDD3nyjlRKMv9gfqT6KJZa3Gtz0ruq2uLm3_57h6bB095f9aT9GrJ0HHzYnwU3nSsoXkxTD_cw3U2h2lq1CGpipZ76FH8uBANL7jJYrhqWNB71lA4h9MKcXp_x-D2IGOw_lXQm8a--4N9CXzoKfBVb_QcIzPp2kYV1vgJr27NB9TesM%3D)
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3bfb39256ff84861b99d4e46c9ef532f&_e=jSo7mr7U0ejuEjuwSZlgKSoFj3H89rXD7d3RlXymLGNjeNHVyoXfGwckpLtgi3GOp7R5vWT_Q6V7qixnX-hyEEREzD1vnsOpaVDsBGmVd7ekCbf-msAQu3rHaP36obhzgueF5UAncfguFMS-kdZPeswjlb5toE_jCpA99aSDvldykzlN5eMgM3THPuZzYoRRrL3NcV2aTtQkRB87VLZoBWCKBXYmlSMiuVRC2LpOoZccgQfNsA5OP-uz5l4qRMtwRs_W-xa27G04JKyDqF9WLM9-nEVjx8K_VqDq7_rVhUV1G2zkfOHztjfTTtGMkhQe4n_STRE8XTjnmhQxVE5o6NCLi-sNHtJ1DIa1wb46mpt3h72GBJIMBDRpjTucKbsfnXw7TNhSF2nEgeg61EmgOC4BEBNsfiBVaUKUFI8WaVk%3D)

Michael Bennett is the Chuck Schumer of Colorado and he’s letting Biden get away with whatever he wants, so long as he pushes liberal policies on top of his mistakes.

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Be one of the first
body:
a
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpfu9cpit8jgbb1kddmhb0p73gdcith22v792c5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3ie6o74c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt6fpqnl2ippbe8k8suj6r8q64i109joh8vn5okg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3ie6o74c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zufo6qmrpmln3gslliik9v29loutd977qgl66o4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c3ie6o74c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zm5p4jrukcv6ppgc7a1bhe94dpjsqh0ai014vakg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844 Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “dead man walking”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
They're going after my Legal Defense Trust.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
Peter,
---
_New York Magazine_ just published a disgusting hit piece against me:
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
_They even mocked me for setting up this Legal Defense Trust so that I can collect contributions to pay for my ongoing battle against the Deep State._
---
**_But the truth is: I 'm not a dead man walking, because thousands of patriots like you have defended me from this unjust assault on my life and my freedom._**
---
Now that the media is actively cheering for the Deep State to ruin me, I simply have to ask for your support one more time.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as the media hopes that the Deep State will turn me into a "dead man walking."**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587833:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587834:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587835:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587836:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587837:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
**_New York Magazine_ claims that I'm in an "excruciating legal predicament," but acknowledges that I have _NOT_ been charged with a single crime.**
---
_Shouldn 't that sound the alarms?_
---
I'm a completely innocent man -- charged with ABSOLUTELY NO CRIME -- and yet, the media is writing about me as though I'm walking the plank!
---
Here's the truth about what's going on... _the Deep State has given itself the authority to endlessly investigate every single aspect of my life until they can find a crime._
---
**That flies in the face of EVERYTHING our country stands for.**
---
_The Deep State is trying to destroy the bedrock American principle that you are innocent until proven guilty._
---
But as God as my witness, I won't let them get away with it. I will keep fighting for my freedom and justice no matter how much the Deep State tries to ruin me.
---
I also recognize that I cannot win this battle all on my own, which is why I'm humbly turning to you for support.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund as the media hopes that the Deep State will turn me into a "dead man walking." **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58587832:6h3KDW2N0:m:1:3253819041:70C2D80F59ADA23C7EF55E0D391DE052:r)
---
Thank you,
---

I'm a completely innocent man -- charged with ABSOLUTELY NO CRIME -- and yet, the media is writing about me as though I'm walking the plank! Here's the truth about what's going on... the Deep State has given itself the authority to endlessly investigate every single aspect of my life until they can find a crime. That flies in the face of EVERYTHING our country stands for. The Deep State is trying to destroy the bedrock American principle that you are innocent until proven guilty. But as God as my witness, I won't let them get away with it. I will keep fighting for my freedom and justice no matter how much the Deep State tries to ruin me. I also recognize that I cannot win this battle all on my own, which is why I'm humbly turning to you for support. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcpe298gd28gn0hfjljke0001s6qm2bsnh2rsk8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfaspje4qj9d3669pr4tpmm9qe0pjm6hq68d9nmtjr5cr4etg67djnmoq68ojkm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6ccln6dgmfclhcoq61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgm9o32c9i60oh5u)

But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhq7hl2hmtqp4mlovtlvi32bn2b6qgvpcbgkcdgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjg64oj4c1h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3f9uvk7i9ras1crpr0atqj94okbdgjdae4ukmro_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjg64oj4c1h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. | | Derek, I know it’s early, but I wanted you to be the first to hear this: **we hit our fundraising goal last night.**

We set a really ambitious goal, and Derek, this team stepped up. I can’t thank you enough.

But we can’t waste time celebrating. Election Day is in 11 days, the new Monmouth poll shows us tied, and we have a lot to do.

We need to knock on thousands of doors, call thousands of Virginians, and turn out voters in every corner of the Commonwealth.

_We can close strong and win this thing in the final days, but only if folks like you step up right now._

**Please, I need your help to defeat a dangerous Trump acolyte who wants to take Virginia backwards and undermine our democracy. We can’t take this for granted.**

_**[So right now, will you chip in any amount to my campaign to help me finish strong? name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: I can win Virginia back and send a statement to the country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| | There isn't much time left, so I'll make this quick.

Virginians have already begun casting their ballots and there are just 12 days left until Election Day.

If Clinton-ally Terry McAuliffe wins this race, there will be dire consequences for Virginia. He's bad on crime, bad for our economy, and bad for our schools.

If I'm elected, on day one I'll cut exploding costs for families, defend our police instead of defunding them, jumpstart job growth, and ban Critical Race Theory.

_**[If you have anything to spare, I'm asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58588613:6xpr3W2hN:m:1:3298722022:FEBE8DDC32768B436AE5DB3962C8BA7E:r "If you have anything to spare, I’m asking you to step up today to help me and other strong conservatives win our elections.")**_

---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58588613:6xpr3W2hN:m:1:3298722022:FEBE8DDC32768B436AE5DB3962C8BA7E:r)
---

All eyes are on Virginia. The results of this election will be used as a guide map for what could follow in next year's midterms.

If Republicans _win_ , it will be a huge blow to the Democrats' hopes of holding onto their majority. But if Republicans _lose_ , Democrats will leverage our loss for their own gain.

We _can_ win. In fact, the latest polls have me and McAuliffe neck-and-neck.

**This race will come down to the final get-out-the-vote efforts.** Every single dollar could impact how many more doors we can knock, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach.

_**[So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $1?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58588613:6xpr3W2hN:m:1:3298722022:FEBE8DDC32768B436AE5DB3962C8BA7E:r "So, can I please count on you to pitch in anything you’re able ASAP, even if it’s just $1?")**_

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

Sincerely,

Glenn Youngkin

In 11 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

name: News Wire
subject: John Durham and the Amazing Disappearing DNC Hack
body:
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pom2otaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=cef4ba618a0b4d8faeb4f843293a6abd)
---
| [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pom2otaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=fdc22bcb9f3f4749bf010d087f1ad1f5) This is the fifth in a series of articles analyzing the 27 page federal grand jury indictment charging lawyer Michael Sussmann with making a false statement to the FBI. As stated in the fourth article, when the FBI learned of the alleged hack of the Democratic National Committee's ("DNC") emails, it asked to examine the server. In fact, at the same time as the alleged DNC hack, there were similar reports regarding the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee's ("DCCC") server as well as DNC Chairman John Podesta's personal email devices. In testimony before the Senate, FBI Director James Comey stated the following: **Question** (by Senator Burr): Did the FBI request access to those devices [the servers and Podesta's devices] to perform forensics on? **A:** Yes, we did. **Q:** And would that access have provided intelligence or information helpful to your investigation in possibly finding ... including to the Intelligence Community Assessment? **A:** Our forensics folks would always prefer to get access to the original device or server that's involved. So, it's the best evidence. **Q:** Were you given access to do the forensics on those servers? **A:** We were not. We were ... a highly respected private company eventually got access and shared with us what they saw there. **Q:** But is that typically the way the FBI would prefer to do the forensics or would your forensic unit rather see the servers and do the forensics themselves? **A:** We always prefer to have access hands on ourselves, if that's possible. **Q:** Do you know why you were denied access to those servers? **A:** I don't know for sure. Um, I don't know for sure. **Q:** Was there one request or multiple requests? **A:** Multiple requests at different levels and ultimately what was agreed to is that the private company would share with us what they saw. So, instead of using a search warrant or some other legal process to perform a direct, hands on forensic examination of the DNC server, the FBI agreed to base its investigation on the findings of a private cybersecurity company. And, as discussed in the previous article, that company, CrowdStrike, was to do the investigation pursuant to its contract with Michael Sussmann of Perkins Coie, the law firm that represented Hillary Clinton's presidential campaign. Think about that. When presented with allegations of a devastating foreign cyber attack on one of the two major political parties, the FBI meekly agreed to allow CrowdStrike and Perkins Coie to do the forensic examination and, for all intents and purposes, run the investigation. Not even the lowliest local police department would agree to such an absurd arrangement. What if this was a murder case? Would the Smallville PD allow a private investigator and lawyer hired by the murder victim's family to process the crime scene, do the autopsy, and tell the police and district attorney what they supposedly found? Wouldn't such findings be subject to attack in court as coming from sources that may have had an interest in shaping and tailoring the investigative results to suit the needs and desires of their client? Wouldn't there be legal problems with the evidence's provenance, chain of custody, and the reliability and comprehensiveness of the investigative work that supposedly produced it? Would the police and district attorney ever allow themselves to get roped into such a bizarre, ridiculous, nightmarish, and self-defeating arrangement? Of course not. No rational person or organization intent on conducting a serious investigation would. But that, in effect, is precisely what the FBI -- the self-proclaimed greatest investigative agency in the world -- did when faced with this purportedly monumental foreign attack on the Democrat Party apparatus. Now keep Comey's testimony in focus as we review the remarkable [appearance of Shawn Henry](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pom2otaok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=6d17a3033bf1419fba5771899049a2d1), President of CrowdStrike Services, before the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence ("HPSCI"). The HPSCI convened in closed executive session on December 5, 2017. Present were Henry, the Committee members and staff, as well as a lawyer representing CrowdStrike and a lawyer from Perkins Coie. Under questioning, Henry confirmed that CrowdStrike's examination of the DNC server was done pursuant to its contract with Michael Sussmann of Perkins Coie. Consequently, as explained by the Perkins Coie lawyer, CrowdStrike's findings were protected by the attorney-client privilege. Therefore, it would be up to Perkins Coie, acting on behalf of the DNC, to decide what information Henry would be allowed to share with the HPSCI. First up was Rep. Chris Stewart (R-UT) who wanted to know why the FBI hadn't taken "the lead in this investigation." And that's when the fun and games began. Once it was established that the FBI did not have access to the server, Stewart asked, "Could they [the FBI] conduct their own investigation in a thorough fashion without access to the actual hardware?" To that Henry went out on a limb and firmly replied, "Maybe." Undeterred, Stewart asked, "Are you comfortable that someone could complete a thorough investigation, using other tools, without direct access to the hardware or equipment?" Up to the challenge, Henry proceeded to answer a question that wasn't asked. "Could they come to a conclusion? You're asking a nuanced question. And I'm not being cagey. I want to be clear, because this is an important point." But would it be better if the FBI had access? Henry replied, "The more information you have access to, the better any investigation. But it doesn't mean that a lack of a piece of information precludes you from coming to a conclusion." The determined Stewart tried again. If you "could have a better investigation if you had access to all of the equipment or hardware" would there be "reasons for not making that available [to the FBI] that override the benefit of having a more conclusive investigation?" To which Henry replied, "You're asking me to speculate. I don't know the answer." At which point, an exasperated Stewart said to the Perkins Coie lawyer, "By the way, you need to pay him well, because he's obviously serving you well today as you guys have your conversations back and forth." So just what evidence did CrowdStrike find on the DNC server? Over the course of the hearing, Henry grudgingly gave ground with answers such as these: "Counsel just reminded me that, as it relates to the DNC, we have **indicators** that data [the DNC emails] was (sic) exfiltrated [taken by hackers off the server]. We did **not have concrete evidence** that data was (sic) exfiltrated from the DNC, but we have **indicators** that it was exfiltrated.... There's **not** evidence that they were actually exfiltrated. There's circumstantial evidence ... **we didn 't have direct evidence**. But **we made a conclusion** that data left the network." (Emphasis added.) _**Is there any proof the Russian 's hacked the DNC? The answer to that question can be found lurking in the pre-trial pleadings in the case of United States v. Roger Stone. In an effort to debunk the DNC hack story, Stone's lawyers requested that the Department of Justice produce the full, unredacted CrowdStrike investigative report. And that's when the cowpie hit the fan.**_ Okay, there was no direct, concrete, or other proof that the emails were actually taken from the DNC computer. But what were these "indicators" that led CrowdStrike to conclude that the emails were hacked? According to Henry, CrowdStrike found "indicators of [server] compromise, which are pieces of malware, et cetera." He then explained that CrowdStrike's investigative report states that the data [emails] were "staged for exfiltration" by the purported Russian hacker. He added, "There are times when we can see data exfiltrated, and we can say conclusively. But in this case, it appears that it (sic) was set up to be exfiltrated, but we just **don 't have the evidence that says it actually left**." (Emphasis added.) Got that? With no evidence that the emails were actually hacked, CrowdStrike nevertheless concluded that the Russians hacked the emails. Despite the spin, the whole DNC hack story had just flatlined. But there was one more issue to be addressed: exactly what evidence was shared with the FBI? I will spare you the tedious details of the interrogation. The questioners kept asking Henry what information CrowdStrike provided to the FBI, and he repeatedly said that they got whatever they asked for. But the problem with this line of questioning is that it failed to consider the fact that CrowdStrike was working for Perkins Coie. Consequently, the questions should have focused on what information Perkins Coie allowed to be transmitted to the FBI. The closest anyone came to getting at this issue was when Rep. Mike Conaway (R-TX) asked, "Did the DNC restrict anything that you shared with the FBI or that the FBI asked for? Did they tell you 'no' at any point?" Henry replied, "No, I have no recollection. Again, I know that there are **redacted** reports and there was **some restriction** on the reports. That's the only thing that I can recall." Wait. What? Redacted? Restriction? Does this mean that the DNC withheld some of CrowdStrike's findings and work product from the FBI? The answer to that question can be found lurking in the pre-trial pleadings in the case of United States v. Roger Stone. In an effort to debunk the DNC hack story, Stone's lawyers requested that the Department of Justice produce the full, unredacted CrowdStrike investigative report. And that's when the cowpie hit the fan. It turned out that, in addition to not examining the DNC server, neither the FBI nor the DOJ actually saw the full, final CrowdStrike report. The following is lifted directly from the prosecution's response to Stone's discovery request: Ponder that carefully. The referenced "counsel for the DNC and DCCC" is Perkins Coie. The reports provided were marked "draft" and had redactions. But the FBI and DOJ had the assurances of Perkins Coie that the drafts were, in fact, the last version of the report and "no redacted information concerned the attribution of the attack to Russian actors." So, was there a hack of the DNC server? Don't ask the FBI or the DOJ. They only know what Perkins Coie -- which was representing a client that was heavily invested in spreading the Russian hack story -- allowed them to know. But thanks to the release of Shawn Henry's testimony before the HPSCI, what we now know is that CrowdStrike never found any "direct," "concrete," or other evidence that proves the DNC emails "actually left" the DNC server. Or, as we used to say in the old Justice Department: turn out the lights, the party's over. There's more to come, but this article is already too long. So stay tuned for the next episode. [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pom2otaok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=74b05e89e8fd485ab2098bf98e92e419) [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pom2otaok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=51496be3932c4d408112ba88d25a8323)
---

To that Henry went out on a limb and firmly replied, "Maybe." Undeterred, Stewart asked, "Are you comfortable that someone could complete a thorough investigation, using other tools, without direct access to the hardware or equipment?" Up to the challenge, Henry proceeded to answer a question that wasn't asked. "Could they come to a conclusion? You're asking a nuanced question. And I'm not being cagey. I want to be clear, because this is an important point." But would it be better if the FBI had access? Henry replied, "The more information you have access to, the better any investigation. But it doesn't mean that a lack of a piece of information precludes you from coming to a conclusion." The determined Stewart tried again. If you "could have a better investigation if you had access to all of the equipment or hardware" would there be "reasons for not making that available [to the FBI] that override the benefit of having a more conclusive investigation?" To which Henry replied, "You're asking me to speculate. I don't know the answer." At which point, an exasperated Stewart said to the Perkins Coie lawyer, "By the way, you need to pay him well, because he's obviously serving you well today as you guys have your conversations back and forth." So just what evidence did CrowdStrike find on the DNC server? Over the course of the hearing, Henry grudgingly gave ground with answers such as these: "Counsel just reminded me that, as it relates to the DNC, we have indicators that data [the DNC emails] was (sic) exfiltrated [taken by hackers off the server]. We did not have concrete evidence that data was (sic) exfiltrated from the DNC, but we have indicators that it was exfiltrated.... There's not evidence that they were actually exfiltrated. There's circumstantial evidence ... we didn 't have direct evidence. But we made a conclusion that data left the network." (Emphasis added.) Is there any proof the Russian 's hacked the DNC? The answer to that question can be found lurking in the pre-trial pleadings in the case of United States v. Roger Stone. In an effort to debunk the DNC hack story, Stone's lawyers requested that the Department of Justice produce the full, unredacted CrowdStrike investigative report. And that's when the cowpie hit the fan. Okay, there was no direct, concrete, or other proof that the emails were actually taken from the DNC computer. But what were these "indicators" that led CrowdStrike to conclude that the emails were hacked? According to Henry, CrowdStrike found "indicators of [server] compromise, which are pieces of malware, et cetera." He then explained that CrowdStrike's investigative report states that the data [emails] were "staged for exfiltration" by the purported Russian hacker. He added, "There are times when we can see data exfiltrated, and we can say conclusively. But in this case, it appears that it (sic) was set up to be exfiltrated, but we just don 't have the evidence that says it actually left." (Emphasis added.) Got that? With no evidence that the emails were actually hacked, CrowdStrike nevertheless concluded that the Russians hacked the emails. Despite the spin, the whole DNC hack story had just flatlined. But there was one more issue to be addressed: exactly what evidence was shared with the FBI? I will spare you the tedious details of the interrogation. The questioners kept asking Henry what information CrowdStrike provided to the FBI, and he repeatedly said that they got whatever they asked for. But the problem with this line of questioning is that it failed to consider the fact that CrowdStrike was working for Perkins Coie. Consequently, the questions should have focused on what information Perkins Coie allowed to be transmitted to the FBI. The closest anyone came to getting at this issue was when Rep. Mike Conaway (R-TX) asked, "Did the DNC restrict anything that you shared with the FBI or that the FBI asked for? Did they tell you 'no' at any point?" Henry replied, "No, I have no recollection. Again, I know that there are redacted reports and there was some restriction on the reports. That's the only thing that I can recall." Wait. What? Redacted? Restriction? Does this mean that the DNC withheld some of CrowdStrike's findings and work product from the FBI? The answer to that question can be found lurking in the pre-trial pleadings in the case of United States v. Roger Stone. In an effort to debunk the DNC hack story, Stone's lawyers requested that the Department of Justice produce the full, unredacted CrowdStrike investigative report. And that's when the cowpie hit the fan. It turned out that, in addition to not examining the DNC server, neither the FBI nor the DOJ actually saw the full, final CrowdStrike report. The following is lifted directly from the prosecution's response to Stone's discovery request: Ponder that carefully. The referenced "counsel for the DNC and DCCC" is Perkins Coie. The reports provided were marked "draft" and had redactions. But the FBI and DOJ had the assurances of Perkins Coie that the drafts were, in fact, the last version of the report and "no redacted information concerned the attribution of the attack to Russian actors." So, was there a hack of the DNC server? Don't ask the FBI or the DOJ. They only know what Perkins Coie -- which was representing a client that was heavily invested in spreading the Russian hack story -- allowed them to know. But thanks to the release of Shawn Henry's testimony before the HPSCI, what we now know is that CrowdStrike never found any "direct," "concrete," or other evidence that proves the DNC emails "actually left" the DNC server. Or, as we used to say in the old Justice Department: turn out the lights, the party's over. There's more to come, but this article is already too long. So stay tuned for the next episode.

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: RE: Public Education in Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
Again and again, education is the #1 topic in my conversations with Tennesseans. People are fed up with Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic has set our students back even further. | Wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team, Peter. Again and again, education is the #1 topic in my conversations with Tennesseans. People are fed up with Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic has set our students back even further. **With your help, we’re working towards solutions.** Here are just a few ideas that have already come in from Tennesseans for how we can improve our public schools:
* Increase funding across the board, with a particular focus on equity and schools in disadvantaged communities
* Expand voluntary pre-K programs to get our kids on the right track as early as possible; supplement by investing in early literacy programs
* To address absenteeism and our students’ mental health, we can provide more counselors and nurses in our schools
* Attract and retain the most talented educators by raising teacher pay
* And much more

Those ideas won’t go anywhere, though, if we don’t take back the governorship and elect a leader who will follow through and work for ALL of us. One issue just keeps coming up in Dr. Martin’s conversations with voters, Peter:**Education.**
According to a poll last month, 79% of Tennesseans are worried that schoolchildren fell far behind on math and reading during the COVID-19 pandemic. And the data backs that up, too: _less than 30% of Tennessee students_ tested on grade-level in English and math last spring.
The pandemic exposed serious flaws in Tennessee's public education system, but the truth is that those flaws have been present for a long, long time.
Dr. Martin is running to fix those flaws, but we need your help. We want to hear from you as we work towards solutions — _**[take our education survey and tell us what a strong public education would mean for you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37805932/312696406/-117610974?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdlOGU2My0zODMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMuRQBmCzj7142UUdZyhQccUtdK5Ha3xfr8QHcx18Vk=&emci=74d77344-8c32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=717e8e63-3833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149)**_

Instead of stepping up and providing students and teachers with the support they need during this pandemic, Gov. Bill Lee has trafficked in conspiracy theories, lies, and division.
**It’s time to put an end to that, and elect a leader who understands that, from cradle to career, we can thrive with improved education for all.**
That’s why education is at the center of Dr. Martin’s campaign, and why it will be a priority of this administration when we win.
[But before we can do that, we need to gather as many stories and solutions as we can from the people these policies will impact most. People are fed up with Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic has set our students back even further. | Wanted to make sure you saw this email from my team, Peter. Again and again, education is the #1 topic in my conversations with Tennesseans. People are fed up with Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic has set our students back even further. With your help, we’re working towards solutions. Here are just a few ideas that have already come in from Tennesseans for how we can improve our public schools: Increase funding across the board, with a particular focus on equity and schools in disadvantaged communities Expand voluntary pre-K programs to get our kids on the right track as early as possible; supplement by investing in early literacy programs To address absenteeism and our students’ mental health, we can provide more counselors and nurses in our schools Attract and retain the most talented educators by raising teacher pay And much more Those ideas won’t go anywhere, though, if we don’t take back the governorship and elect a leader who will follow through and work for ALL of us. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Dr. Martin PS. name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I’m part of a different side of America
body:
an America that we need in the U.S. Senate.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kYkhvqTf93itTDJ--7bR4FyeXxKdP_huXjS5SKX0ovXmYys3isuT1wu78njVjfXH6RMIPSkRtvhVnBo73fRwjT4aht49XNXQwO8tltm9e7DWXrKxXCuJdJWq9i3O96YdtGVPyux4W-H9Jnt8gvbEDV1N9uq4UMaq7Ai5f5maLPnC0gs-FifgKjyUWPLTRX0DrDi3lW5S5nY=&c=GayhRCGSADDoriU-_zfajQpIlOCzFRP8bapQ78LLtAPnpVz23ZYS9w==&ch=s4HK8aa9w-GY7TWdZbRXv5tf7XtjmXuMIxwq4-E9-nAOWtcB72HeDQ==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
---
| Can you believe Patty Murray has been in office since 1993, that's 30 years she has been a senator. At the same time, Joe Biden has been a politician for over 40 years.
They have known each other and worked together in the Senate for 16 years!
And yet they continue to blame us and others for the failures of this country. They will sell you the same empty promises and lies that they do every time there's an election. I'm not a politician, I'm just like every other Washingtonian who wants to make our state and our country a better place to live, work and raise our families.
I am sick of this typical politician campaign play. Which is why I am running for the United States Senate. I couldn't take their scam any longer and I'm not afraid to stand up to those career politicians and political bosses in DC. That's why I am running for the U.S. Senate.
I grew up right here in rural Washington, became a triage nurse and married my highschool sweetheart, who served in Iraq. Together we run a small business and have three wonderful boys who raise hogs on our family farm. I have seen and been a part of a different side of America - An America that we need in the U.S. Senate.
Our Country has changed dramatically since Patty Murray became a senator almost 30 years ago. That is why we need new leadership!
[Please chip in $20, $50, $100 or any amount today to help bring the America you and I know, to fix Washington D.C. >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kYkhvqTf93itTDJ--7bR4FyeXxKdP_huXjS5SKX0ovXmYys3isuT1wu78njVjfXH6RMIPSkRtvhVnBo73fRwjT4aht49XNXQwO8tltm9e7DWXrKxXCuJdJWq9i3O96YdtGVPyux4W-H9Jnt8gvbEDV1N9uq4UMaq7Ai5f5maLPnC0gs-FifgKjyUWPLTRX0DrDi3lW5S5nY=&c=GayhRCGSADDoriU-_zfajQpIlOCzFRP8bapQ78LLtAPnpVz23ZYS9w==&ch=s4HK8aa9w-GY7TWdZbRXv5tf7XtjmXuMIxwq4-E9-nAOWtcB72HeDQ==)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Why I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808183/312705828/-2023814932?refcode=20211022.1_TM_10FXA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDdjZDJmYS0zOTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=opD3puKaa0A8icIErtZZz4S8ZDjKykbz6oTeRuUJCPs=)

| | Derek,

This is 2021’s most important race, so I want to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor.

We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians.

And that’s exactly why I’m running.

I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history.

I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescription medications.

I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia.

I’m running because it's long past time for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.**

And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, This is 2021’s most important race, so I want to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor. We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians. And that’s exactly why I’m running. I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a quality education — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history. I’m running because every Virginian has a right to affordable, quality health care and prescription medications. I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to curb gun violence in Virginia. I’m running because it's long past time for innovative strategies to secure our clean energy future. And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on this team, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Friends --

I’m a lifelong Democrat, longstanding Wisconsin public servant, and a proud State Senator.

**[And today I’m announcing my campaign for the U.S. House of Representatives for Wisconsin’s 3rd District.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808574/312707911/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.10.04_X_intro_R1_F1_S1_C1__new&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_x_intro_r1_f1_s1_c1__new&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1NDRjMi0zYjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gc7BVNPXJIpmA-qqPKSLRwwUhZ-1oUU0RsIqe6kwcJA=)**

My mom taught me early on, “Brad you were given two ears and one mouth for a reason. Listen, twice as much as you speak.” And as your next Congressman, that’s what I promise to do -- even if we don’t agree on every issue.

But my opponent? Well, he was a part of the Capitol Riots on January 6th and then tried to lie to Wisconsinites about it.

We can’t let a person like that represent us in Congress. So I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong from day one.

**[So I’m asking: Will you donate to become a Founding Member of my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808577/312707913/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.10.04_X_intro_R1_F1_S1_C1__new&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_x_intro_r1_f1_s1_c1__new&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1NDRjMi0zYjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gc7BVNPXJIpmA-qqPKSLRwwUhZ-1oUU0RsIqe6kwcJA=)** | [GIVE $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808580/312707917/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.10.04_X_intro_R1_F1_S1_C1__new&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_x_intro_r1_f1_s1_c1__new&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1NDRjMi0zYjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gc7BVNPXJIpmA-qqPKSLRwwUhZ-1oUU0RsIqe6kwcJA=)

I never expected to run for Congress.

I grew up on a dairy farm in rural La Crosse County where I learned what it’s like working the land for a living, and that getting something done takes honesty, decency, and hard work.

From a young age, I learned that when times are tough, you pull together as a family and as neighbors and you move forward.

Somewhere along the way, we have forgotten that lesson. We need to treat others with honesty and decency and remember that the people who might disagree with you around here aren’t your enemies, they’re your neighbors.

Good neighbors help each other mend fences, they don’t tear each other down. I’ll team up with anyone, of any party, who wants to get things done for our communities. Let’s roll up our sleeves and get to work.

**[If you’re with me, donate today to become a Founding Member and help us build our campaign from the ground up:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808597/312707935/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.10.04_X_intro_R1_F1_S1_C1__new&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_x_intro_r1_f1_s1_c1__new&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1NDRjMi0zYjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gc7BVNPXJIpmA-qqPKSLRwwUhZ-1oUU0RsIqe6kwcJA=)** [GIVE $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37808599/312707938/-1995343361?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.10.04_X_intro_R1_F1_S1_C1__new&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_x_intro_r1_f1_s1_c1__new&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTI1NDRjMi0zYjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gc7BVNPXJIpmA-qqPKSLRwwUhZ-1oUU0RsIqe6kwcJA=)

clean_body: Let’s roll up our sleeves and get to work. | = Friends -- I’m a lifelong Democrat, longstanding Wisconsin public servant, and a proud State Senator. = My mom taught me early on, “Brad you were given two ears and one mouth for a reason. Listen, twice as much as you speak.” And as your next Congressman, that’s what I promise to do -- even if we don’t agree on every issue. But my opponent? Well, he was a part of the Capitol Riots on January 6th and then tried to lie to Wisconsinites about it. We can’t let a person like that represent us in Congress. So I’m going to win this race the only way I know how: by going everywhere and talking with everyone. But I won’t kid myself. I know it’s going to be a tough race, so I need your help to build this campaign strong from day one. = | = = = = = = I never expected to run for Congress. I grew up on a dairy farm in rural La Crosse County where I learned what it’s like working the land for a living, and that getting something done takes honesty, decency, and hard work. From a young age, I learned that when times are tough, you pull together as a family and as neighbors and you move forward. Somewhere along the way, we have forgotten that lesson. We need to treat others with honesty and decency and remember that the people who might disagree with you around here aren’t your enemies, they’re your neighbors. Good neighbors help each other mend fences, they don’t tear each other down. I’ll team up with anyone, of any party, who wants to get things done for our communities. Let’s roll up our sleeves and get to work. = = Let’s win this, Brad Pfaff | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Another death threat against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014B_4lFU0rODLlbEqL4ChDnmWmisKxDbYGMXHUZHsfAtFXaSlvSScgg5RKRRrzP0Wbi9db_8zVodI0XElQ2eC3wf5v06136NiEbkhovbI0K-q5OEqsLRopwoL3uW14RaUjVEl7tvGDyZq2EL1hSA8lEQnSzc4OWc5yX2jyE1KyZE_BH9refxaXE-lzwxI9ij_&c=rQF-nG5jYE7c2JD9Ce9Yu9n5xSSPxiuED3jpc5-76y1oj7b3GRB4gQ==&ch=0Cnz988yBumk8eSp43p96kjjjUYol4Vy1u0ylDhvJFr7y2PWAGHyxw==)

| Peter,
---
| BREAKING: This week, a man traveled across the country with the intention of killing me, but the Department of Justice refused to arrest him.
Partisan politics should never dictate efforts to keep people safe. Yet despite the Capitol Police recommending that this man be arrested, the Biden DOJ refused!
I have been on the receiving end of death threats before, but this is serious. I cannot even count on our Department of Justice to protect my family and me.
I'll never let threats like this stop me from putting America First and standing up for the Silent Majority. That, you can count on. But we need to stand together and let the Radical Left know that we are DONE letting them smear and target conservatives for not conforming to their leftist worldview.
---

Enough is enough.
I'm taking a stand for our rights and our safety, despite the Biden Department of Justice. And I need you to join me.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: In Texas, racist far-right dominance “for years to come”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, With their new gerrymandered congressional maps, the racist Texas GOP just cemented their “dominance for years to come.” Black and Latino communities drove 95% of Texas' population explosion tracked by the 2020 Census, according to _Daily Kos_. Yet the Texas GOP has redrawn the district lines to build a wall around white Republicans, silence communities of color, and beat a path for GOP House boss Kevin McCarthy to claw back control of the chamber. The belligerant Texas GOP is emboldened by its latest misogynist shock victory, having successfully banned virtually all statewide abortions. Now, by subjugating the diverse major metropolitan areas around cities like Houston and Austin to total political irrelevance, the Texas GOP will weaponize its outsized influence on national politics to totally dissolve our razor-thin House majority. Peter, we simply can't let that happen. When Democrats Turn Out is fighting this hard. But POLITICO reports that we're up against Kevin McCarthy and the GOP's “army of energized small-dollar donors” which is already pouring in a ton of vital House campaign cash. Progressives aren't just at a serious disadvantage, here. We're in for the electoral fight of our lives. You proved by voting House Democrats back into power in 2018 and protecting our razor-thin majority in 2020 that you've got the stamina for the long-term fight against the GOP, Peter. That's why we need YOUR immediate support to stop the insidious authoritarian Party of Trump in its tracks. **[This can't wait, folks: Will you chip in $5 or $10 right now to help us protect and strengthen our razor-thin House majority, provide an overdue check on the Texas GOP's outsized role in American politics, end the Party of Trump's racist tirade, empower our communities of color, and FINALLY get this country back on the right track?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37809059/312710180/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211022_GEN_FDR_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU5Njg1OTJiLTNjMzMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PNGm_VtwJi4ujJz7o2J1VlA_LJFXXDDvgyDQtU2Hju0=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Now, by subjugating the diverse major metropolitan areas around cities like Houston and Austin to total political irrelevance, the Texas GOP will weaponize its outsized influence on national politics to totally dissolve our razor-thin House majority. Peter, we simply can't let that happen. When Democrats Turn Out is fighting this hard. But POLITICO reports that we're up against Kevin McCarthy and the GOP's “army of energized small-dollar donors” which is already pouring in a ton of vital House campaign cash. Progressives aren't just at a serious disadvantage, here. We're in for the electoral fight of our lives. You proved by voting House Democrats back into power in 2018 and protecting our razor-thin majority in 2020 that you've got the stamina for the long-term fight against the GOP, Peter. That's why we need YOUR immediate support to stop the insidious authoritarian Party of Trump in its tracks. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for all your help, Peter. — When Democrats Turn Out = | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Here in Delaware, we are especially susceptible to the effects of a warming climate.

Just last month, we saw record levels of flooding across our state, and these will only get worse as long as we do nothing.

If we don’t make crucial investments in clean energy, build green infrastructure, and prepare for a future of more violent storms and other climate disasters, our future generations will have to take extreme measures to keep our cities above water and our communities safe.

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/2defe314d8659397c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, This week saw some B.I.G. developments on the campaign trail! We released a new statewide radio ad highlighting a key difference with one of our opponents. We continued meeting with voters and elected officials. And we joined Georgians across our state in recognizing National Domestic Violence Awareness Month.
---
---
# **_New Radio Ad_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/a25099c1ee892c55c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Herschel Walker supports amnesty and a pathway to citizenship for millions of illegal immigrants. I don't. It's as clear of a contrast as it gets, and it's one that we must highlight across Georgia. This week, we released a new radio ad that does exactly that. [**If you haven't already, hope you'll listen to it here and share it with 10 of your friends and loved ones.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/e5f0d8c7cb9fffeac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Jones County BBQ_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/cf8bc35e1b5c3225c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
B.I.G. day in Jones County yesterday, speaking with sheriffs and voters from across Georgia! Special thanks to Jones County Sheriff Butch Reese for hosting. Also enjoyed catching up with Columbia County Sheriff Clay Whittle. Both of these leaders have endorsed our campaign, and I'm grateful for all they're doing to keep their communities safe!
---
|
---
---
# **_Domestic Violence Awareness_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/9667038b96719d4ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Yesterday was Domestic Violence Awareness Day, and the entire month of October is National Domestic Violence Awareness Month. Georgia's U.S. Senator must stand with survivors and victims. We must end this scourge in our state and nation; it's a fight for the soul of America. [**Hope you'll watch our quick video message on this here or above.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/eddc65d8e270b11ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_Join Us Next Week!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/71954be375db7bbac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Join us next week — October 28th — in Clarkesville for a B.I.G. event! We're going to have a multitude of honored guests, including Doug Collins, Nathan Deal, and Sandra Deal. [**Tickets start at $50, so claim yours now if you're able to join.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/477de766226ff401c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Hope to see you there!
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/a2b0c1b2eeaa1cb6c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/b5252d3902b38494c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/4ae6d0cdc64f850dc3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Finally, our yard sign fundraising drive was a major success. Now, we're getting ready to place another order for our green Team ’22 t-shirts. Grassroots demand for these shirts is through the roof, so let's make this as B.I.G. of an order as possible. [**Donate here if you haven't already to help us cover the costs. **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/75012840dee47a3fc3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support! More good news to come next week.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/7d0e79020c6dca88c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/de4d0aaeba45f7c6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/65226e5688211c66/159e94abb1a13fd4c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=65226e5688211c66&d=ff36f50027079e8ec3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=65226e5688211c66).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

body:

Mike Pence even said that "[Republicans] are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire." GOP super PACs are already spending millions to attack Maggie, and they've promised to spend millions more. We can't let McConnell take back the gavel and undo all of Senate Democrats' progress. But with Maggie behind in the polls and top Republicans constantly attacking us, it's going to take all of us working together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you for getting involved. This is one of those “all hands on deck” moments of the campaign, so we’re really hoping you can come through. \-- Maggie’s campaign team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS Stewart Navarre for Congress
body:
I don’t need to tell you that we are living in troubling and divisive times. We see it every day on the news, online, and in our personal lives. The tone coming out of Washington is toxic and focused on scoring political points - instead of delivering real results. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37813037/312727162/2093365186?refcode=211022-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQ1NDVmZi00MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdwJZDYOcCpMaliuSXPEkbFEKquNbB7qARAtyaQ8PDM=) Folks, I don’t need to tell you that we are living in troubling and divisive times. We see it every day on the news, online, and in our personal lives. The tone coming out of Washington is toxic and focused on scoring political points - instead of delivering real results. At this time in history, when we need to be united, we are a country divided. I am running for Congress because we need to turn the temperature down in our political life. We need to listen to each other more. We need empathy. We need to deliver real results for the American people. **[I will bring that commitment to Washington at a time when it’s sorely needed. So will you help me get there by making a $25 contribution to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37813038/312727163/-565500061?refcode=211022-email&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQ1NDVmZi00MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdwJZDYOcCpMaliuSXPEkbFEKquNbB7qARAtyaQ8PDM=)** We need to remain a strong and united country. We cannot do that if we only elect folks who want to play partisan politics to win re-election. I’ll be a representative for all my constituents. **[If that sounds like a good idea to you, please chip in $25 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37813039/312727164/-565500061?refcode=211022-email&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQ1NDVmZi00MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdwJZDYOcCpMaliuSXPEkbFEKquNbB7qARAtyaQ8PDM=)** Thank you. \-- Stewart Navarre Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today. name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: The Senate must protect voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Earlier this year, Kim and her Democratic House colleagues passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to fight back against the record-breaking number of voter suppression bills being introduced in states across the country. We wanted to make sure you didn't miss our message about voting rights, Peter.

Earlier this year, Kim and her Democratic House colleagues passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to fight back against the record-breaking number of voter suppression bills being introduced in states across the country.

This critical piece of legislation will help ensure equal access to the ballot box for all Americans, but now, it's on the Senate to take action.

body:
Fellow Patriot:

This story should be impossible, but it's true.
▶︎ In Loudon County, Virginia, a young girl was
sexually assaulted by a "gender fluid" boy in a school bathroom.

▶︎ First, the County covered up the attack.

▶︎ Then, the school board lied about it.

▶︎ Then, the girl's father went to the school
board meeting demanding answers, where he was arrested.

▶︎ This month, he - the father of a teenage rape
victim - was branded a "domestic terrorist," and Joe Biden's
Justice Department ordered the FBI to monitor such threats.

This may not be the America you know, but it is the
America the woke socialists want to create. They want to turn our
government of the people, by the people, and for the people into
a lying, bullying, criminal conspiracy against the people.

It's not just a local issue or a state issue - it's
an existential issue for the entire United States of America!

In this battle - in this crisis - the Democrats
stand with the liars, tyrants, and predators.

If you want conservatives to stand up to them and
for our country, please support the House Freedom Fund today!

The House Freedom Fund only supports members of the
House Freedom Caucus - the group of conservatives in Congress who
truly fight for our principles and values.

You know as well as I do that voting for whoever has
an "R" next to their name isn't the answer.

We need conservatives, FIGHTING conservatives,
PATRIOTIC conservatives, MAGA conservatives who will not give up
until the Left's reign of terror is destroyed.

SUPPORT THE FREEDOM CAUCUS TODAY!

It's not just the Democrats. It's Big Tech... the
Deep State... the anti-American academics and educrats... the
Critical Race Theory bigots... and the anti-science nuts masking
our kids and telling them boys can have babies!

It's time to stop complaining, and start fighting.

WE ARE IN THE FIGHT FOR OUR LIVES, OUR KIDS, AND OUR
COUNTRY. PLEASE FIGHT BACK NOW.

It's time to send a message to the woke socialist
Democrats and the spineless Republicans: we don't care about
their talking points or their promises. We want principled
leadership NOW or we will find someone else to fill their seats.

SEND THE SWAMP A MESSAGE TODAY: JOIN THE FIGHT, OR
GET OUT OF OUR WAY!

Thank you for considering this urgent request and
for doing so much to promote conservative leadership in
Washington.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

body:
Trump Republicans are on the move. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCJHCvX5zctbGEKL-Hl4RQwV4J-VHoyKD3xcFhOpzKvr4rDO2vxHKDdAbwRwyT9bJITfhfQFeA2jBeWG9qqLZ8cDH1OlpgmrI3Mzs74nBkjpM9olFfC-wYv_QwvwPlUN_bP9UR3f2UygYaGJAlekl1zmOt4kARx3Jf13suBuI8rHrBVz8r_DiQfzmMEzt7oJYZy8TyHct1e7uQvpRJ-sxXOXEMq2JYFinD7_II8PAiSRov5L8DU-UN-8KYtZQ_RYkg/3gd/mwsbmpqDSHSZ_AnUNpVrMQ/h0/9H7dxnhsHq2QvX2eCZlmyX1bdmI3ocvD45ThmKMt9Jc)
Derek,

I’ve got some tough news about Virginia. Glenn Youngkin could drop millions of dollars from his vast personal fortune on this race at any moment to outraise and outspend Terry McAuliffe in the final days of this election.

We always knew this was going to be a tough race. Republicans are the historical favorites to win in Virginia. And from day one, polls have shown a tight race. | | Team — Jen Psaki is a strong defender of President Biden’s agenda and has been known to correct the record with her famous #PsakiBombs. It goes without saying that she’s a Democratic icon.
