name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis won’t investigate Florida-based hate groups involved in the Jan. 6th insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
This is disqualifying |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816553/312745107/1357109580?refcode=20211022_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZhZTI5ZS00ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHQPQKmSihK9gN6r0J9pGj3XxNICbEswu6-F_YX_alA=)
---

Team,

More Florida residents have been charged with crimes related to the January 6th Capitol insurrection than _any other state._

As a Floridian, I’m troubled by that fact. I’d like to find out why so many of our fellow citizens traveled to our nation’s capital and sought to overturn a democratic election.

However, Gov. Ron DeSantis doesn’t seem troubled by this fact. Instead, he’s refusing to investigate the Florida-based hate groups involved in the attack on our democracy.

**I believe Floridians deserve answers -- and I believe we deserve far better than our current governor.[Make a donation today to help me defeat Gov. DeSantis and restore accountability to Tallahassee. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816554/312745108/1357109580?refcode=20211022_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZhZTI5ZS00ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHQPQKmSihK9gN6r0J9pGj3XxNICbEswu6-F_YX_alA=)**

The January 6th insurrection was a threat to our democracy, so it was a threat to all of us. It didn’t matter who you voted for in the last election. _Your_ democracy was under attack on that terrible day.

Investigating the insurrection should be a bipartisan matter. After all, the congressional committee examining the events of January 6th is bipartisan!

But Gov. DeSantis would rather engage in partisan politics and do Donald Trump’s bidding than ensure accountability for insurrectionists. In my view, that’s disqualifying -- and it’s part of the reason I’m challenging Gov. DeSantis.

**[So, friend, please consider donating to my campaign. Together, we can ensure these hate groups are held accountable so the events of that tragic day in January are never repeated.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816555/312745109/1357109580?refcode=20211022_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDZhZTI5ZS00ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHQPQKmSihK9gN6r0J9pGj3XxNICbEswu6-F_YX_alA=)**

Thank you,
Charlie Crist

If a watered-down reconciliation bill passes, Kyrsten Sinema will be a big reason why.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37816707/312745752/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNjY5YThiLTRlMzMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ruY8KX5Zx2XE0UtJSyCprReNhAqWWsdbvy_Ri7yKPvc=)

Team
If a watered-down reconciliation bill passes, Kyrsten Sinema will be a big reason why.
She’ll be a big reason why free community college for working families is not in the bill.
She’ll be a big reason why we aren’t expanding Medicare to cover hearing aids, dental and vision for seniors.
She’ll be a big reason why prescription drug companies will be allowed to continue charging whatever they like for lifesaving medicine.
And she will be THE REASON we don’t raise taxes on billionaires and corporations to afford these things.
Last night Joe Biden said she “will not raise a single penny in taxes on the corporate side and/or on wealthy people, period.”
We need to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a Senator who will side with working people, not deep-pocketed donors who fund her campaign.

name: Patty Murray
subject: “the Senate playing field just tipped toward Republicans”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Democrats are working hard to make progress for people and working families, but we need to expand our majority in the midterm elections. We can’t afford to lose a single Democratic seat.
#
Peter,
In 2016, Catherine Cortez Masto became _the first and only_ Latina elected to the U.S. Senate. But now her Senate seat -- and the Democratic majority -- are at risk with a new poll showing her falling _**two points behind**_ her extreme Mitch McConnell-backed opponent, Adam Laxalt.
When Laxalt announced his campaign, CNN called Nevada a TOP PICKUP opportunity for Republicans and declared that **“the Senate playing field just tipped toward Republicans.”**
Democrats are working hard to make progress for people and working families, but we need to expand our majority in the midterm elections. We can’t afford to lose a _single_ Democratic seat.
**[Peter, can we count on you in the fight to keep the Senate blue? Rush in your $5 contribution now to help reelect Catherine Cortez Masto and defend our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816887/312746520/-1558147147?refcode=pm_em_211022_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2JmMzg3YS00ZjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7cvGakqW0jAMs5QY3ObDvDexpJrgmax7eR_f5Ttqfcw=)**
Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups have already dropped over $2 million to defeat Catherine. And her opponent has “the complete and total endorsement” of Donald Trump.
This is not a fight we can afford to lose, Peter. Not with the Senate majority on the line.
**[Please, make a $5 contribution now to support Catherine and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816888/312746521/-1558147147?refcode=pm_em_211022_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2JmMzg3YS00ZjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7cvGakqW0jAMs5QY3ObDvDexpJrgmax7eR_f5Ttqfcw=)**

Patty

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need the Women’s Health Protection Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, _Roe v. Wade_ was decided almost 50 years ago, and in the decades since, we’ve seen the right to an abortion challenged, criticized, and attacked over and over again. Republicans have advanced a malicious private right of action scheme to prevent women from having autonomy over their own bodies and health decisions. It’s time for the right to choose to be codified into law and protected from GOP State Houses and conservative judges. That’s why it’s so important for the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_. After the House passed this historic bill by a narrow 218-211 vote, the Senate must stand up and do the same. Mitch McConnell and his Republican colleagues have used bad faith, straw man arguments to restrict women's reproductive rights. They’ve even packed the court with conservative justices with the goal of overturning _Roe v. Wade_. We need to be forceful and loud in saying enough is enough and we need to take action. [**I hope you’ll join me in signing this petition demanding the Senate to hold a vote on the _Women’s Health Protection Act_. Now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816840/312746359/533007884?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211022_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211022_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmY4YWRhOC00ZTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9aJqgSs_LV_qamkqQ0eBwvMuEYNQFURfTVLUbLFOtTc=&emci=cdf8ada8-4e33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d2f8ada8-4e33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37816841/312746368/533007884?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211022_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211022_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmY4YWRhOC00ZTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9aJqgSs_LV_qamkqQ0eBwvMuEYNQFURfTVLUbLFOtTc=&emci=cdf8ada8-4e33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=d2f8ada8-4e33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)
---
Until the right to an abortion is codified into law, that choice, which should only be determined by a woman and her doctor, will be eroded by the extreme right across the country – just as we’ve seen in the last few months.
Thanks for being by our side as we stand up to the Senate and tell them to stop playing political games with a woman’s autonomy over their body.
— Adam
Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress

name: Erica Smith
subject: Exciting news!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re expanding the narrative of Black women in politics one step at a time.
#
I have some exciting news!
**Elect Black Women PAC has just endorsed me, and I couldn’t be more proud.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23326?t=1&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)
[**_Could you donate $5 or whatever you can today so we can build off the momentum of this endorsement and show North Carolina how powerful our moral movement is? It would mean so much to me!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23326?t=2&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23332?refcode=em20211022-571&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)**
This endorsement is especially meaningful because of how lonely, scary, and downright difficult it is to run for office as a Black woman.
**The Center for Responsive Politics has gathered data that shows that Black women candidates raise on average about HALF of what white candidates raise.**
As a Black woman growing up in the South, I’ve experienced having doors shut in my face just because of who I am.****
**It’s 2021 y’all, and it’s absolutely critical that we have more Black women in leadership.** It’s time we had a chance to influence policy, and enact the change we want to see for our communities.
I see you, and I see the struggles and hardships that communities across North Carolina have faced.
This endorsement makes me feel like I’m seen. We’re not alone in this. We’re a part of a MOVEMENT. Together, we can flip North Carolina blue, pass progressive policy, and give the power back to the people.
**That’s why I have to ask:** [**_Will you donate $5 today to accelerate our fundraising and help ensure that our campaign has the resources we need to go all the way to Washington?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/23326?t=22&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)
Onwards,
Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211022-571-footer&t=23&refcode2=571_3698_AAlNJH&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=571%2E3698%2EAAlNJH)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Celebrating LGBTQ+ History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
I’m proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community in the fight for equity and equality. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-lgtbq-history [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-lgtbq-history]Dear friends,
October is LGBTQ+ History Month, which is both a celebration and a time to consider how much further there is left to go to reach true equity and equality.
This month, we recognize the achievements of civil rights champions, and I invite you to visit the Equality Forum’s website to learn about some of the important individuals highlighted this year. [https://lgbthistorymonth.com]
Discrimination on the basis of sex – including sexual orientation or gender identity – has no place in our nation. During my time in the Obama Administration, I was proud to fight this discrimination and I worked on the effort to repeal the “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy, because no servicemember should be kept from serving their country because of who they love.
On President Biden’s first day in office, he signed a historic executive order that extended existing gender-based discrimination regulations to sexual orientation and gender identity discrimination as well. These measures provide protections for employment, housing, health care, education, and credit.
This was an important step, but we must codify these protections into federal law to ensure they become permanent. I’m in strong support of the Equality Act, which does exactly that.
I promise to continue the fight for equity and equality for all people.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-lgtbq-history]

name: Nina Turner
subject: We must have the courage to ask for more.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Friends, all that we love is on the line.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37819518/312756123/-854177141?refcode=211022_CLTV_mvmtvideolaunch-RS_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVmMWNhMS01MzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QNyly4_u6hnK54ml02KOxJuiEd5XqBVVrmRdDKIzjA=)
---
Friends, all that we love is on the line. Our country is at a crossroads, and the American people deserve better.

We deserve universal healthcare and livable wages. We deserve clean air, clean water, and clean food. We deserve a well-funded public education system, from pre-k to college or trade school. We deserve a justice system that is just.

Although we did not get the outcome we wanted during the primary election in Ohio District 11, opportunities are in front of us. The work towards justice remains the same, and we will continue paving the way towards progress. We are not slowing down. **Lives and livelihoods are at stake.**

Our collective success is rooted in organizing—always. We must mobilize like-minded folks and build a bold coalition that demands change. We need to take action, come together, and push for the nation and world we want to inhabit. **_That is why we_ __** **_ are building a movement..._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37819520/312756124/-854177141?refcode=211022_CLTV_mvmtvideolaunch-RS_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGVmMWNhMS01MzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8QNyly4_u6hnK54ml02KOxJuiEd5XqBVVrmRdDKIzjA=) ****[**I look forward to working with you in this righteous fight. clean_body: Friends, all that we love is on the line. | | | = Friends, all that we love is on the line. Our country is at a crossroads, and the American people deserve better. We deserve universal healthcare and livable wages. We deserve clean air, clean water, and clean food. We deserve a well-funded public education system, from pre-k to college or trade school. We deserve a justice system that is just. Although we did not get the outcome we wanted during the primary election in Ohio District 11, opportunities are in front of us. The work towards justice remains the same, and we will continue paving the way towards progress. We are not slowing down. Lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our collective success is rooted in organizing—always. We must mobilize like-minded folks and build a bold coalition that demands change. We need to take action, come together, and push for the nation and world we want to inhabit. That is why we are building a movement... = ** Let's do this together. ****Nina Turner**** ************** ************ ******************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner****************** ******************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. Over the last year, Republicans have come up with **a lot of elaborate lies to justify their voter suppression**. They dragged Arizona through a months-long embarrassment of an eleciton audit, blamed everything from bamboo fibers to paper creases, and were _still_ unable to find evidence of wrongdoing.

Their lies have been baseless, but have damaged our institutions nonetheless.

Here's the truth:_**our democracy is better when more people participate in it. **_If we want to defend our country, then we must make voting safer, easier, and more accessible.

_That's_ what I'll do as Attorney General.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37821784/312759272/-2023814932?refcode=20211022.4_SA_10GA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWYwZjA0Zi01NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-uUBiKCbeaFhgueZ5EDK2wrlW2S4eYFemiwh9D-fIE=)

| | Derek, we have 11 days left in the most important election of 2021, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

**We know who Terry McAuliffe is, Derek. For four years, Terry showed you who he would be as the Governor of Virginia.**

He fought for Virginians every single day.

He stood up to hate and division.

And he put words into action by restoring the right to vote to more than 173,000 people.

We know Terry McAuliffe, Derek — and we know that he’s the leader Virginia needs right now.

_**[I’m asking you to join me in the final days of Terry’s campaign by chipping in any amount right now. Every single dollar you contribute will go directly toward Terry’s efforts to turn out voters in this must-win race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37821785/312759273/-2023814932?refcode=20211022.4_SA_10GA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWYwZjA0Zi01NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-uUBiKCbeaFhgueZ5EDK2wrlW2S4eYFemiwh9D-fIE=)**_

Look, this race isn’t just about a name on the ballot. It’s not just about Terry McAuliffe versus Glenn Youngkin.

It’s about the people they’re pledging to serve as governor.

Terry McAuliffe has shown us that he will lift up all Virginians and fight for this Commonwealth.

Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he will stand with Donald Trump, extremists, and insurrectionists.

**Right now, we need to fulfill our promise as citizens to _stand up_ for each other, and _fight_ for each other, and _vote_ with each other to change the future for everyone.**

And Derek, that starts with electing Terry McAuliffe as Governor of Virginia.

body:
Despite the radical left’s attacks on me from my own alma mater, I will continue to stand up for free speech and American values.

| Peter,
First the good news. The left can't cancel us.
Despite the radical left's attacks on me from my own alma mater, I will continue to stand up for free speech and American values. Americans are standing with us against their attempts to cancel me.
The left wants to divide America so that they can destroy our country and everything we stand for.
Now the bad news...
The campaign is running short of funds to reach voters with this video they want to cancel. I am asking for your help to keep up the fight and make sure voters hear our message.
I'm looking to raise $15,000. Each dollar raised helps me reach 7 people online with our video they are trying to cancel.

Here's why we need to protect this seat.

[**_If you're ready to protect this crucial House district, split a donation of $10 or more between the Ohio Democratic Party and Shontel's campaign today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37823531/312763375/-601272100?refcode=EM_FR_211022Split_N_ODP_90do+NN_7_NG_TESTA_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjZhMWI3My01OTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkNQM2agUDVQOMCgC51vxaNUBApXp9W46bGEH4cPds4=)

If you're still unsure why we need to protect this seat, let us explain:

Right now, Democrats only hold a slim majority in the House, and national Republicans are gearing up to do everything in their power to take back the power. OH-11's special election is the first line of defense to holding our majority in 2022 and beyond—and Shontel is the candidate we need to get the job done.

As a proven leader and coalition-builder, Shontel brings unmatched experience and vision to her campaign. As a native Clevelander, Shontel began her service as a Warrensville Heights City Councilmember in 2012. She went on to be elected to Cuyahoga County Council where she currently serves.

And once she's in Congress, she'll continue to stand with everyday Ohioans through fighting to expand affordable health care, create good-paying jobs, strengthen our public schools, and make our world a more equitable place for all.

[**_Listen, we need all hands on deck to send Shontel to Congress to fight for everyday people. | | Derek, In just under 2 weeks, Virginia will elect a new set of leaders. And listen, I’m proud of all the progress we’ve been able to make as your Governor — from ratifying the ERA to abolishing the death penalty to codifying voting rights for Virginians — but the reality of this situation is all of that could change on Election Day. If Republicans get control of the Governor’s office and take the majority in the House of Delegates, there won’t be anything standing in the way of them going “on offense” to roll back all of our hard work towards progress over the last few years. This election is going to come down to turnout and the DPVA team has been working hard to get folks out to vote in every corner of the Commonwealth. But they can’t do it alone, Derek — that’s where you come in. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help the Virginia Democrats continue to grow their mobilization efforts as we approach Election Day? clean_body: here’s where you come in | | | Derek, In just under 2 weeks, Virginia will elect a new set of leaders. And listen, I’m proud of all the progress we’ve been able to make as your Governor — from ratifying the ERA to abolishing the death penalty to codifying voting rights for Virginians — but the reality of this situation is all of that could change on Election Day. If Republicans get control of the Governor’s office and take the majority in the House of Delegates, there won’t be anything standing in the way of them going “on offense” to roll back all of our hard work towards progress over the last few years. body:
Donald Trump recently told four of his former aides to defy the January 6 committee's subpoenas. Trump incited a violent insurrection at our Capitol, and now he's trying to block the House investigation from uncovering the extent of his involvement so he can evade responsibility. We wanted to make sure you saw the news, team.

**Donald Trump recently told four of his former aides to defy the January 6 committee's subpoenas.** Trump incited a violent insurrection at our Capitol, and now he's trying to block the House investigation from uncovering the extent of his involvement so he can evade responsibility.

Fortunately, Nancy Pelosi and the committee are not backing down. They're hard at work to uncover the truth about January 6, but we **need** Republicans to comply with the investigation.

**[Add your name to thank Nancy Pelosi and demand that Republicans comply with her investigation in order to protect our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37823765/312763877/-519272164?ms=em21_211022_ja2rs_adv_gq_nopn___nap_ettx&refcode=em21_211022_ja2rs_adv_gq_nopn___nap_ettx&source=em21_211022_ja2rs_adv_gq_nopn___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_ja2rs_adv_gq_nopn___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=DUA4xPI%2Fd8N8uZHyjRkZ7DvDpC8shNoFz29fgd%2FkvKR49iPuhfQ83FlEeAvOHhOGBkdGaHL0IDmlXi1xywIsvkUay27kDw6%2BzwM6qk26b8OYKG2a2YXR5FUR%2BnHYWJDJajDJ%2FcuaUwdX8tixXp8MvA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyZGE2YzgwLTU5MzMtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IZhPW37mN5ELUJxpcIw7SSj1b4fiCB5WHRhBEofq3L0=&emci=53ac0384-4333-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a2da6c80-5933-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001)**

\--_Politico_ Team,

January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy. A violent mob, incited by Donald Trump attacked our Capitol as Congress met to certify the results of the 2020 election. Following the insurrection, 147 Republicans in Congress voted to reject the results of a free and fair election.

In the months since, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have done everything in their power to rewrite history and escape accountability for the events of January 6.

Despite Republicans' attempts to block the truth, Nancy Pelosi took action and formed a select committee to investigate the attack on our Capitol. This investigation is underway in the House and is a huge step in the right direction to uncovering the truth, holding the responsible parties accountable, and defending our democracy.

But if history taught us anything, we can expect Republicans to do whatever it takes to impede the investigation and hide the truth from the American people. **Just earlier this week, it was revealed that Trump told four of his aides to defy the committee's subpoenas.**

Trump is trying to block testimony so we can't hold him or his allies accountable. We can't let them get away with it.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: The climate stakes of this election
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
According to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, the summer of 2021 -- in which we witnessed extreme weather events like Hurricane Ida, wildfires and floods -- was one of the hottest periods ever recorded in our nation’s history, tying only with the devastating Dust Bowl summer of 1936.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=20.22]If we want our children and grandchildren to inherit a livable, healthy planet, then we need to take urgent steps to combat climate change and bring our carbon emissions under control. That’s why if I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’ll take immediate action to put Maryland on the path to becoming the first net zero carbon emissions state in the nation, as well as a net supplier of renewable energy.
On Day One, I will sign two important executive orders relating to climate change. The first will require all energy consumed by the state government to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate to full conversion by the end of my first term. The second will require more renewable energy to be created within Maryland than all energy consumed within the state. In particular, this second executive order will motivate private sector investment in renewable energy infrastructure, and will create a significant amount of jobs for Marylanders.
We have an exciting opportunity to generate wealth for our state by spearheading the transition to a new green economy -- but we can only get there with your help. This people-powered movement that we are building together relies on the support of our grassroots activists to keep us going. If you are able, will you chip in a small donation so that we can continue to grow our movement and win this competitive election?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes]There is far too much at stake in this election to sit out on the sidelines. We cannot afford to pass the buck on climate change to the next generation -- we need action, and we need it now.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climatestakes?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a4983b42-4030-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/a3da6c80-5933-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2RhNmM4MC01OTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MZRiKHVNHcQFlULGjlki5VM2ypOSivLM6bZrSikoWMg=&id=136194660 .

Republican Glenn Youngkin was _hand-picked_ by Donald Trump -- and, if elected, we can expect him to peddle Trump’s Big Lie and tow the far-right party line instead of standing up for what’s best for Virgininians.
We’re just days away from this critical election -- and first referendum on the post-Trump era -- so we want to get a better sense of where things stand. [**Will you let us know your pick for Virginia’s next Governor?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37823820/312764009/-1769238691?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRhNmM4MC01OTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QosWQaoh1zh9EWQRUtqQ8BN7zB2UgJvk2476tDIAlY8=&emci=e31b016b-c82d-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=9bda6c80-5933-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7932963)

_I 'll be honest, I'm not a politician._ I am a businessman who's spent the last 30 years raising my family in Virginia. I firmly believe Virginia should be the best and I'm ready to join together with hard working Virginians to make it happen.

Instead of joining my efforts to work together, my opponent is doing everything possible to divide us.

_-> He wants to divide parents from their kids' classrooms
-> He wants to remove law enforcement from our communities
-> He wants to divide Virginia_

**[I refuse to let it happen, that's why I'm reaching out today. I firmly believe conservative policies can bring us together and create a country that will thrive for generations to come. I'm asking grassroots supporters to chip in to my campaign and get us one step closer to that future. Can I count on your support Peter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58589945:6gkyqW2YN:m:1:3253819041:C5CF94BC2333E2A81524F509285BB775:r "I refuse to let it happen, that’s why I’m reaching out today. name: Margaret E (Black America's PAC)
subject: Did you sign yet, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC
body:
He's the Democrats' Enemy #1, and they'll stop at nothing to destroy him... -
| | | | Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure you didn't miss the important message Alvin sent this past week. He's counting on you to read and respond to his email (see below). Thank you! \- Margaret
---
* * *
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats have unleashed a vicious, **all-out assault** on Senator Tim Scott... "Uncle Tim" and "Token Uncle Tom" "You're the lowest piece of sh*t this country ever produced" "A traitor to the black community" ...and they won't stop until they've destroyed his reputation, his career, and his life like they've done to Dr. Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and so many other Black conservatives before him. [I'm hoping you'll Endorse Tim Scott for Senate this election and help him fight back against the Democrats' vicious attacks...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=1) **...but first let me explain why Democrats are so desperate to destroy Senator Tim Scott.** [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=2)As you may know, Senator Tim Scott recently delivered the official Republican rebuttal to Joe Biden's address to a Joint Session of Congress. In his speech, Senator Scott declared that "_America is not a racist country_ ," setting fire to the foundation of the radical Left's empire of racist lies. In response, Left-wing activists set out to prove him wrong by being shockingly racist themselves and... **...making "**Uncle Tim** " one of the top trending terms on Twitter for 12 full hours!** The news media responded to Tim's speech by ushering out their "blacktivist" shills to attack him, blast his speech, reassert that the Republican Party (and America as a whole) are **racist** , and pour even more gasoline on the fires of racial tension. _Evidently oblivious to their own hypocrisy_ , CNN contributors argued that Senator Scott can't claim America is not racist because he admitted in his speech that _liberals_ frequently call him "Uncle Tim" and the N-word... [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=3)...with one commentator, _as if to drive the point home_ , saying, "I would never call Scott an Uncle Tom. It's an insult to the character Uncle Tom." That's right. The mainstream media's response to Tim Scott's powerful and unifying message to the nation was basically: "You can't say America is not racist because liberals ARE racist. Here, let us show you, Uncle Tom!" **Sadly, being attacked, slandered, and ridiculed by liberals is nothing new for those of us who have the audacity to be Black __and__ Republican.** After all, the Democrats ruthlessly attack Black conservatives like Senator Scott, Dr. Ben Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of other races, we can speak directly to the Black Community and **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives the keep Blacks voting for Democrats. But due to his respectful, agreeable, and quiet nature, Senator Tim Scott has operated under the radar and out of the Democrats' crosshairs for much of his career in the U.S. Senate... **...but all of that changed last year in the wake of George Floyd's death and the subsequent protests, unrest, and riots.** You see, for the previous five years in the U.S. Senate, Tim Scott had been doing everything possible to convince Democrats to work together to pass meaningful, bipartisan Police Reform legislation. After all, who better to lead this effort than one of the only U.S. Senators with real life, personal experience with this issue? **But for five years, the Democrats REFUSED to even take up Tim's police reform bill, RAILROADED his efforts, and IGNORED his warnings that this would blow up in their faces.** However, now that police reform was front-and-center and had the overwhelming support of most Americans, he believed the Democrats would finally work together to craft and pass much-needed police reform legislation. But what Tim Scott, _being an honest & trusting person_, didn't realize at that time (and learned the hard way) was... **...working with Republicans, especially Black Republicans, to solve problems facing the Black Community is _never_ on the Democrats' agenda because it would undermine their BIG LIE that "**Republicans are racist.** "** So instead of taking this rare opportunity to work together to actually solve a big issue, the Democrats launched an all-out media blitz to **LIE** about the contents of the bill and to viciously **slander** Tim Scott for even trying... ...with Nancy Pelosi going so far as to say that Tim Scott's police reform bill was just Republicans "**trying to get away with the murder, actually, the murder of George Floyd.** " Despite Senator Scott adding _everything_ the Democrats wanted into his bill, offering 20+ amendments, giving rewrite authority, and more... **...the Democrats still**BLOCKED** this crucial police reform bill from even being brought to the Senate floor for debate.** | "He proposed legislation to fix blue state, Democrat-run cities' police departments. What'd the Democrats do? **They insulted him, and they blocked the bill**... because they don't want a solution... They want the issue." \- The late Rush Limbaugh
---
Immediately after Democrats blocked the bill, Senator Scott took to the floor of the Senate with the fiery resolve of a man on a mission...
...and he delivered an impassioned & powerful reprimand of the Democrats, calling them out for what he described as "**race politics at its worst** "...
"The actual problem is not what was being offered, it was who was offering it... They cannot allow [Republicans] to be seen as a party that reaches out to all communities in this nation."
"When Speaker Pelosi says one of the most heinous things I can imagine... She knows that she can say that because the Democrats have a monopoly on the black vote."
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=4)Senator Scott eviscerated the Democrats by revealing they had "_no desire to solve problems before the election_ " because they NEED these problems to incite racial hatred towards Republicans and win elections.
Then, with a look of intense determination on his face, Senator Tim Scott said _the_ _last_ _words_ _the_ _Democrats_ _ever_ _wanted_ _to_ _hear_ _him_ _say_ :
"I'm willing to compete for their vote. Are you?"
Now, the once quiet and agreeable Senator from South Carolina is on fire. He's on a mission to...
**☐** | **EXPOSE** the LIE that conservatives are all racists
---|---
**☐** | **RECLAIM** Black voters from the Democrat Party
**☐** | **END** the Democrats' stranglehold on Black voters
Tim has taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth – and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are ringing true and spreading like wildfire within the Black Community.
He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies...
**...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party.**
_And_ _the_ _Democrats_ _know_ _that_ _if_ _they_ _lose_ _their_ _stranglehold_ _on_ _Black_ _voters_ , _it'll_ _be_ _impossible_ _for_ _them_ _to_ _ever_ _win_ _another_ _election_!
That's why Democrats are so terrified of Tim Scott and THEY'LL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP!
[And that's why your signed endorsement to Tim Scott is so important!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=5)
Once I receive your signed endorsement, I'll send it directly to Senator Scott so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back!
[Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100 or more to help recruit your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Senator Tim Scott.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=6)
Or perhaps you understand how important Senator Tim Scott is to reclaiming Black voters, and you'd like to do more to help?
[Your generous contribution of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Tim Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=7)
**Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Senator Tim Scott because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all...**
**...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.**
[So please sign your endorsement to Senator Tim Scott and make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=8)
[Or if you can't afford that much right now, then please give $28 or even $20.22 as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61496&info=2021EA1104&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1104&n=9)
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams

clean_body: He's the Democrats' Enemy #1, and they'll stop at nothing to destroy him... - | | | | Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure you didn't miss the important message Alvin sent this past week. He's counting on you to read and respond to his email (see below). Thank you! \- Margaret | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats have unleashed a vicious, all-out assault on Senator Tim Scott... "Uncle Tim" and "Token Uncle Tom" "You're the lowest piece of sht this country ever produced" "A traitor to the black community" ...and they won't stop until they've destroyed his reputation, his career, and his life like they've done to Dr. Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and so many other Black conservatives before him. ...but first let me explain why Democrats are so desperate to destroy Senator Tim Scott. you may know, Senator Tim Scott recently delivered the official Republican rebuttal to Joe Biden's address to a Joint Session of Congress. In his speech, Senator Scott declared that "America is not a racist country ," setting fire to the foundation of the radical Left's empire of racist lies. In response, Left-wing activists set out to prove him wrong by being shockingly racist themselves and... ...making "Uncle Tim " one of the top trending terms on Twitter for 12 full hours! The news media responded to Tim's speech by ushering out their "blacktivist" shills to attack him, blast his speech, reassert that the Republican Party (and America as a whole) are racist , and pour even more gasoline on the fires of racial tension. Evidently oblivious to their own hypocrisy , CNN contributors argued that Senator Scott can't claim America is not racist because he admitted in his speech that liberals frequently call him "Uncle Tim" and the N-word... one commentator, as if to drive the point home , saying, "I would never call Scott an Uncle Tom. It's an insult to the character Uncle Tom." That's right. The mainstream media's response to Tim Scott's powerful and unifying message to the nation was basically: "You can't say America is not racist because liberals ARE racist. Here, let us show you, Uncle Tom!" Sadly, being attacked, slandered, and ridiculed by liberals is nothing new for those of us who have the audacity to be Black and Republican. After all, the Democrats ruthlessly attack Black conservatives like Senator Scott, Dr. Ben Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of other races, we can speak directly to the Black Community and EXPOSE the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives the keep Blacks voting for Democrats. But due to his respectful, agreeable, and quiet nature, Senator Tim Scott has operated under the radar and out of the Democrats' crosshairs for much of his career in the U.S. Senate... ...but all of that changed last year in the wake of George Floyd's death and the subsequent protests, unrest, and riots. You see, for the previous five years in the U.S. Senate, Tim Scott had been doing everything possible to convince Democrats to work together to pass meaningful, bipartisan Police Reform legislation. After all, who better to lead this effort than one of the only U.S. Senators with real life, personal experience with this issue? But for five years, the Democrats REFUSED to even take up Tim's police reform bill, RAILROADED his efforts, and IGNORED his warnings that this would blow up in their faces. However, now that police reform was front-and-center and had the overwhelming support of most Americans, he believed the Democrats would finally work together to craft and pass much-needed police reform legislation. But what Tim Scott, being an honest & trusting person, didn't realize at that time (and learned the hard way) was... ...working with Republicans, especially Black Republicans, to solve problems facing the Black Community is never on the Democrats' agenda because it would undermine their BIG LIE that "Republicans are racist. " So instead of taking this rare opportunity to work together to actually solve a big issue, the Democrats launched an all-out media blitz to LIE about the contents of the bill and to viciously slander Tim Scott for even trying... ...with Nancy Pelosi going so far as to say that Tim Scott's police reform bill was just Republicans "trying to get away with the murder, actually, the murder of George Floyd. " Despite Senator Scott adding everything the Democrats wanted into his bill, offering 20+ amendments, giving rewrite authority, and more... ...the Democrats stillBLOCKED this crucial police reform bill from even being brought to the Senate floor for debate. | "He proposed legislation to fix blue state, Democrat-run cities' police departments. What'd the Democrats do? They insulted him, and they blocked the bill... because they don't want a solution... They want the issue." \- The late Rush Limbaugh Immediately after Democrats blocked the bill, Senator Scott took to the floor of the Senate with the fiery resolve of a man on a mission... ...and he delivered an impassioned & powerful reprimand of the Democrats, calling them out for what he described as "race politics at its worst "... "The actual problem is not what was being offered, it was who was offering it... They cannot allow [Republicans] to be seen as a party that reaches out to all communities in this nation." "When Speaker Pelosi says one of the most heinous things I can imagine... She knows that she can say that because the Democrats have a monopoly on the black vote." Scott eviscerated the Democrats by revealing they had "no desire to solve problems before the election " because they NEED these problems to incite racial hatred towards Republicans and win elections. Then, with a look of intense determination on his face, Senator Tim Scott said the last words the Democrats ever wanted to hear him say : "I'm willing to compete for their vote. Are you?" Now, the once quiet and agreeable Senator from South Carolina is on fire. He's on a mission to... ☐ | EXPOSE the LIE that conservatives are all racists ---|--- ☐ | RECLAIM Black voters from the Democrat Party ☐ | END the Democrats' stranglehold on Black voters Tim has taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth – and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are ringing true and spreading like wildfire within the Black Community. He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies... ...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party. And the Democrats know that if they lose their stranglehold on Black voters , it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election! That's why Democrats are so terrified of Tim Scott and THEY'LL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP! Once I receive your signed endorsement, I'll send it directly to Senator Scott so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back! Or perhaps you understand how important Senator Tim Scott is to reclaiming Black voters, and you'd like to do more to help? Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Senator Tim Scott because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all... ...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again. Thank you, and God Bless. | Alvin Williams President ---|--- | | | | | | | | © Black America's Political Action Committee Paid for by Black America's PAC. name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- October 22****, 2021-** **\- INDems Launch "Small Town, Indiana" Statewide Tour, Fourth in Five Months -** The Indiana Democratic Party kicked off our fourth statewide tour in five months this week. This time, our focus is on small towns and rural communities across Indiana. State and local Democrats will share how we are delivering on issues like agriculture and education in rural communities. Public schools and farmers are the heartbeats of these communities. President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda is delivering for Hoosiers in all areas of Indiana by fully-funding public schools and investing in issues important to the farming industry, like broadband internet access. We will meet with folks and spread the good news about these popular policies. Indiana Democrats' first stop is tonight in Greendale, Ind., and we will make more than a dozen stops across the state. Combining the American Rescue Plan, American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state. Democrats' goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how the Build Back Better agenda is solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! **\- INGOP's Extreme Week: Commiting Fraud, Supporting Domestic Terrorist Organizations, Defunding the Police, and More! -** Indiana Republicans like Congressman Jim Banks, State Senator Scott Baldwin, and INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer proved this week their extreme partisanship literally has no limits. Here's a round-up of what happened throughout their crazy week: 1\. [Jim Banks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825152/312770123/959633501?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) committed fraud on official time when he claimed to be a Ranking Member of the bipartisan January 6th committee. 2\. [Banks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825154/312770125/-1282852690?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) also issued derogatory attacks against Rachel Levine, who was recently sworn in as the country's first openly transgender four-star officer. 3\. [INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer and Scott Baldwin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825155/312770127/-1423160072?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) both refused to denounce a domestic terrorist organization (the Oath Keepers) after Baldwin was found to have an "annual membership" with them. 4\. [U.S. Senator Mike Braun](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825157/312770128/-830626427?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) \- known to be a "small government" Republican - bullied the City of Chicago about its vaccination requirements, urged police to move to Indiana. 5\. [Westfield City Council](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825159/312770130/1211659715?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) \- Republican dominated - voted to cut funding from the town's law enforcement and first responders. It's become quite clear: The Indiana Republican Party has lost their identity and are not working to improve the lives of Hoosiers and their families. The INGOP's extreme partisanship is tarnishing both our Hoosier values and American values. Fraud, hate, terror, and distractions...where does it stop? Indiana Democrats are committed to cutting out the INGOP's partisanship and conspiracy theories. The Build Back Better agenda is delivering for Hoosiers families on issues that matter most to them. Democrats look forward to passing the rest of President Joe Biden's infrastructure agenda because it'll create a better future for Hoosiers in every Zip code of our state. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Indiana Stonewall Democrats -**
[**Purchase Tickets Here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825164/312770134/1768455798?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=) **\- Indiana Young Democrats -** **** Join Vice Chair Myla Eldridge and Indiana Young Democrats this Saturday in Indianapolis for their October Meeting! At their meeting, IYD will gather to strategize for the 2022 election cycle, hear from great speakers ready to lead, and network with other members! **More info****➡️ ****[https://fb.me/e/17pj3EW3n](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825172/312770141/401574282?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535)** **\- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings -** The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. Our [Virtual Conference](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825174/312770146/-1174116220?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) on November 16 - 17 will offer two days of in-depth training in an online, interactive format. The conference, led by FEC Commissioners and staff will feature group sessions and breakout workshops tailored to meet the needs of campaigns, party committees, and corporate/labor/trade PACs. For new and prospective candidates, the Commission will host a [Candidate 101: Getting Started Webinar](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825177/312770148/1140445162?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) on October 27. This 90-minute workshop will cover candidate registration, treasurer responsibilities, contribution limits and prohibitions, and basic reporting requirements. Please visit their [Trainings page](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825179/312770151/-762270721?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535) to see a complete list of upcoming workshops. While you're there, sign up to be notified when registration opens for upcoming programs, such as their December 8 Nonconnected PAC webinar. If you have any questions, please call 800-424-9530 (option 6) or email them at conferences@fec.gov. _**-Save the date-**_ For events, check out our mobilize page **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37825181/312770153/-1021999857?FFF.10.22.21.=FFF.10.22.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTUzYmJiMy01ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVXiOnOnimqLeH4_prhXZHaffXoYJlx992tpspAj63o=&emci=4a17f6a4-ac32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=7a53bbb3-5d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535)_**. |

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- October 22, 2021- \- INDems Launch "Small Town, Indiana" Statewide Tour, Fourth in Five Months - The Indiana Democratic Party kicked off our fourth statewide tour in five months this week. This time, our focus is on small towns and rural communities across Indiana. State and local Democrats will share how we are delivering on issues like agriculture and education in rural communities. Public schools and farmers are the heartbeats of these communities. President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda is delivering for Hoosiers in all areas of Indiana by fully-funding public schools and investing in issues important to the farming industry, like broadband internet access. We will meet with folks and spread the good news about these popular policies. Indiana Democrats' first stop is tonight in Greendale, Ind., and we will make more than a dozen stops across the state. Combining the American Rescue Plan, American Jobs Plan, Redistricting, and "Small Town" tours, the Indiana Democratic Party will have visited 55 out of 92 counties across the state. Democrats' goal is to meet Hoosiers where they are and celebrate how the Build Back Better agenda is solving today's most-pressing problems facing families. We'll continue this effort through the 2022 election year. We hope you'll join us! \- INGOP's Extreme Week: Commiting Fraud, Supporting Domestic Terrorist Organizations, Defunding the Police, and More! - Indiana Republicans like Congressman Jim Banks, State Senator Scott Baldwin, and INGOP Chair Kyle Hupfer proved this week their extreme partisanship literally has no limits. Here's a round-up of what happened throughout their crazy week: 1\. committed fraud on official time when he claimed to be a Ranking Member of the bipartisan January 6th committee. 2\. also issued derogatory attacks against Rachel Levine, who was recently sworn in as the country's first openly transgender four-star officer. 3\. both refused to denounce a domestic terrorist organization (the Oath Keepers) after Baldwin was found to have an "annual membership" with them. 4\. \- known to be a "small government" Republican - bullied the City of Chicago about its vaccination requirements, urged police to move to Indiana. 5\. \- Republican dominated - voted to cut funding from the town's law enforcement and first responders. It's become quite clear: The Indiana Republican Party has lost their identity and are not working to improve the lives of Hoosiers and their families. The INGOP's extreme partisanship is tarnishing both our Hoosier values and American values. Fraud, hate, terror, and distractions...where does it stop? Indiana Democrats are committed to cutting out the INGOP's partisanship and conspiracy theories. The Build Back Better agenda is delivering for Hoosiers families on issues that matter most to them. Democrats look forward to passing the rest of President Joe Biden's infrastructure agenda because it'll create a better future for Hoosiers in every Zip code of our state. \- Opportunities - \- Indiana Stonewall Democrats - = \- Indiana Young Democrats - ** Join Vice Chair Myla Eldridge and Indiana Young Democrats this Saturday in Indianapolis for their October Meeting! At their meeting, IYD will gather to strategize for the 2022 election cycle, hear from great speakers ready to lead, and network with other members! More info**➡️ \- Federal Election Commission Upcoming Trainings - The Commission will host several training events this fall to help political committees understand and comply with the federal campaign finance regulations. Our on November 16 - 17 will offer two days of in-depth training in an online, interactive format. The conference, led by FEC Commissioners and staff will feature group sessions and breakout workshops tailored to meet the needs of campaigns, party committees, and corporate/labor/trade PACs. For new and prospective candidates, the Commission will host a on October 27. This 90-minute workshop will cover candidate registration, treasurer responsibilities, contribution limits and prohibitions, and basic reporting requirements. Please visit their to see a complete list of upcoming workshops. While you're there, sign up to be notified when registration opens for upcoming programs, such as their December 8 Nonconnected PAC webinar. If you have any questions, please call 800-424-9530 (option 6) or email them at conferences@fec.gov. -Save the date- For events, check out our mobilize page . | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Donald Trump Jr.

body:
Peter -- when I say the battle for Florida could determine the future of America, I MEAN IT! Take a look for yourself:
|
---
| | |
Peter \-- when I say the battle for Florida could determine the future of America, I MEAN IT! Take a look for yourself:

\-- The last U.S. Senate election in Florida was only won by a **0.12%** margin
\-- _CNN_ ranks Florida as one of the **MOST COMPETITIVE** races in America
\-- Democrats control the Senate by **ONE SEAT**
\-- Democrats are **WINNING** the fundraising race
\-- Politico said Florida will be the **MARQUEE** race
\-- Joe Biden's **ENTIRE** agenda hinges on keeping the Senate

**[EVERY last dollar can mean the difference between victory and defeat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593281:6iV0qW2JN:m:1:3298722022:EBA99B28FCF0FF6A6880785E5B2DAD5D:r "EVERY last dollar
can mean the difference between victory and defeat")**
---
| | | [DONATE $12 NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593282:6iV0qW2JN:m:1:3298722022:EBA99B28FCF0FF6A6880785E5B2DAD5D:r "DONATE $12 NOW >>")
---

_Listen ... I know you receive a lot of emails but I also know you understand the gravity of the situation. _

If they win Florida, it's all over. Democrats are favored to win the Senate. But if every single Patriot makes the decision to chip in $12 or more, we will hold the line and save our great country.

**Listen, I get it: $12 doesn 't seem like much -- why would it make any difference in a multimillion dollar senate race?** It's a fair question. I'm hoping enough Patriots read this email, understand what's at stake in this race, see JUST HOW CLOSE the last race was determined by (0.12% -- that's it!), and realize that if everyone did their part, we'll walk away with this Senate race.

**[So will you do your part before 11:59 PM tonight](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593281:6iV0qW2JN:m:1:3298722022:EBA99B28FCF0FF6A6880785E5B2DAD5D:r "So will you do your part before 11:59 PM tonight")**? That's when I'm personally going through the list of Patriots who stepped up in this critical moment.
**[<< YES, I'LL DO MY PART >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593281:6iV0qW2JN:m:1:3298722022:EBA99B28FCF0FF6A6880785E5B2DAD5D:r "<< YES,
I’LL DO MY PART >>")**
Thank you so much,
Donald Trump Jr.

---
| |

---

---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593283:6iV0qW2JN:m:1:3298722022:EBA99B28FCF0FF6A6880785E5B2DAD5D:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: Build Back Better is a scam
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc |
body:
“There’s something inherently wrong”
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zed8qt0t2nncose40pgapj6kble52ku39gppt5f8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uup7dd9l6tj39c32cgpmcctmcmo64sbhe4p79pb3c4pjdd9m69j36pdhcpib1ptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slkcopb1cr661rmaphim2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs)
**_“There’s something inherently wrong”_
** _\- Mike Pence on Fox Business

_ Friend, Yesterday I was on my good friend Larry Kudlow’s show on Fox Business. I stood up for everyday Americans and called out the Biden administration's unchecked spending spree. I know that no matter what Joe Biden and his Big Government Socialist allies tell you this spending bill is NOT going to cost Americans $0. **The massive entitlement spending bill will cost Americans $2 TRILLION in tax increases.** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z42u5047ol96jfplmldf3k0poi4jk8rucrrerjb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) We need to send conservative leaders to Congress to stop this reckless spending spree. Help fight back against Joe Biden and his liberal allies' radical, socialist agenda. [**DONATE TODAY**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdt7m4glkuhvo8fkdf1e5lfvi4m53k942d65nfv0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) I need your support if we are going to get this country back on the path to American greatness. **[Can I count on your support?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfkgh0n95euddrlrtctf51t0g0i9eg9iumdvun28_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs)** Friend, if you ask the average Conservative what they want from our political leaders, they’ll tell you similar things. ** ** _We want a secure border._ _
__We want to defend religious liberty._ _
__We want to promote economic prosperity._ _
__We want to hold China accountable for its crimes against humanity._ ** ** _And we want to return America to greatness - be the shining city on a hill that we are meant to be._ ** ** But that’s not what we’re getting from Democrats in Washington right now. ** ** They’ve offered nothing but one extreme policy after the other, and it’s time we start standing up, speaking out, and defending our values to put this nation back on the path towards greatness. Friend, if there’s anything the last few months have made clear, it’s that we simply cannot afford to allow the Left’s extremist agenda to continue. [**DONATE TODAY**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaekv0augobgd7com1gb9eq6rv81bs05cb6ojk40_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) If we proved anything over the four years of the Trump-Pence Administration, it’s that America is capable of remarkable things.
We can recover, rebuild, and revive our nation from its lowest points to reach new heights we never thought possible. Just recently, we saw record-high employment numbers for all communities, including women and minorities. We saw dramatic increases in take-home pay. We saw American economic strength, unlike anything we’ve seen before. Unfortunately, that growth was trampled by big government advocates who shut down our businesses and shut down our churches.
They turned our upward momentum into a downward spiral with bad policy that abandoned our Constitution. _It’s terrible._ But friend, not all hope is lost. We know how strong America can be. _And with the right leadership, we can see that growth again. And quickly! _ We just need to make sure America knows conservatives are willing to put in the work to make this country as great as it can be. [**JOIN MIKE PENCE: PUT AMERICA BACK ON TRACK >> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlo2e2dpenci0g8krmm9k4058oh35cb2tsq8jk20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) There’s no doubt that we have a tough path ahead, but believe me, Friend, we’ve overcome bigger obstacles before, and we will do it again! If conservatives rally together now to make our strong message clear, we CAN put America back on the path to greatness. Thank you for reading. [**Please contribute today to support a better future for our nation.** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z86jmqoe6ceud2qaavd7hamklnu9vibsdjp1epv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) Sincerely, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg3hg36otu3st2spcqsfkr1k2hehq85ng0e767p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh2bs) Mike Pence
Advancing American Freedom Chairman & 48th Vice President of the United States of America |
---
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2ju391cos4tgd8r2pb3jjp388a35slnihor71d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjh6cp75cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We're coming up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Summer was a bit slow — we don’t have the same option for fall.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211022-3108-header&t=1&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)
You did it, Peter! We made it through another week. And what a week it’s been.
In Congress, we watched in disgust as the GOP blocked the Freedom to Vote Act with a filibuster — stalling a piece of vital + urgent legislation to save our democracy. We're seeing so-called Democrats elected to fight for _working_ people wavering when it comes to delivering President Biden's agenda.
**John Fetterman is not that kind of politician. He's not going to be getting any pats on the back from Mitch McConnell, and he's not going to base his votes on what massive corporations and the ultra-wealthy *think* is best for our country.[ So if you're ready to elect John to the Senate, please consider chipping in using this link.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33542?refcode=em20211022-3108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)**
You may not believe this, Peter, but you're actually one of our campaign's earliest and most committed supporters. So I’ll be straight with you about what it's going to take to actually win this race.
Summers are notoriously the *most* difficult time to fundraise for campaigns — and our campaign was no exception. We expected to raise a lot more during the summer, but we fell short of our original projections. Now we’re a bit behind.
**[We're hoping we can count on folks like you to help us close the $49,359 hole in our budget from summer's fundraising slowdown. I hope you’ll consider making a $5 donation today to help tilt our U.S. Senate to a Blue majority.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33542?refcode=em20211022-3108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33542?refcode=em20211022-3108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)**
We’re doing a LOT of planning and investing in campaign infrastructure to prepare for the fight ahead.
The GOP will be pouring buckets of cash into Pennsylvania to try and keep this Senate seat, so we can’t afford to lose any of the momentum we’ve built. After all, CNN ranked our campaign as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat in the entire country.
So what do you say, Peter? Will you help us close our summer fundraising gap?
With fall in full swing and the summer behind us, now is our chance to dig in and meet all of our most important fundraising goals.**[If you’re able, can you chip in a few bucks to help us close our summer gap? Your donation will go directly to helping us prepare and execute a winning strategy that will take this seat for the Democrats and save our majority in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33542?refcode=em20211022-3108&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)**
So grateful to have you in our corner. 🙏
In gratitude,
Eric
Eric Stern 💙
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211022-3108-footer&t=24&refcode2=3108_434096_JBJfSz&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=3108%2E434096%2EJBJfSz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

That’s why I’m excited to launch a brand new line of inspired campaign merchandise. Donate today and get your exclusive Nancy Mace merchandise! [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8c595197d3c74edabc6fff9f9660fc7d&_e=gCRlsCFxg1MLsVaGrWKJVS7gjfR04DWW0grSep-8H6TboYvv5S0BbbCQLxknuG_YgVg8naMDUZ8vZnrWqum3LJvdw4WtRHg7liFWAhtuTjULZl-t9xid44D35AkuhwQp0b3oVhxvfw4vS5_9sfVm4aonFOmUOaGtZO-QR97hbhNuhjLAW8c5DJRGKrmPA2976QYDqkY_9g3McxVj-Tet1tQPQiBKUvXWRNtkZZKLj028wbNTRgxXMOq-AA3AtjK8mlDQVxikX15ZGgmDVdh1jdR6GLSIDH62xeY77e6U0RyjFqNLGPocvuxCotHjDYmPMqlJdFAaDhB2-tNGpgrxMSZnGYQoncJcctImEPVWgIzTQnGNp3KdMHLUe90fgz94aFWgspYd8q_aXBO-yigYhTk91HztGfXo8XOKVGCwURY%3D) Friend,

**I’ll never fit the mold of what Washington wants from a politician, but I think that’s one of the biggest reasons I was able to win my race**. My life experience has been anything but typical. _I dropped out of high school when I was 16, and I found myself waitressing at the Waffle House soon after. _ But I didn’t give up. I learned the value of hard work and persistence and overcame these challenges to become the first female graduate of The Citadel. **I learned a lot in my time working at Waffle House**.** ** I learned that's where you can get the BEST cup of coffee. And I learned that the hard-working people of America are the heart of this nation. The heart of the Lowcountry.
Even now, when I’m on the road, I make a point to stop by Waffle House to grab a bite, chat with constituents, and get some work done. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=8c595197d3c74edabc6fff9f9660fc7d&_e=gCRlsCFxg1MLsVaGrWKJVS7gjfR04DWW0grSep-8H6TboYvv5S0BbbCQLxknuG_YgVg8naMDUZ8vZnrWqum3LJvdw4WtRHg7liFWAhtuTjULZl-t9xid44D35AkuhwQp0b3oVhxvfw4vS5_9sfVm4aonFOmUOaGtZO-QR97hbhNuhjLAW8c5DJRGKrmPA2976QYDqkY_9g3McxVj-Tet1kSA02HUMOxyu0ljMMjpazEUX-scApFS_i5vz8DSaTvMMtVVck6AT9KoLmRandn_i7dgnmtohWqqIcPt0bYeJIGG9e5o92Bpz_L4r0fAoqlfkplYXuXq-7cxUhHeqGRbctJX-7q9cCb8sZefMbojGskME1NdbZXok8tTuyn3FE_MOEPrNHygwf26OIfd6KJP5hjjHqljjLE5CUtdDBXug1I%3D) That’s why I’m excited to launch a brand new line of _inspired_ campaign merchandise. subject: Danny Davis is silent on Rahm Emanuel
