body:
We still remember Laquan McDonald. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8s8B6Os8NXSBAObnXSPpGEPaMzcJvW6btQu13gragrU4rUE7zsSf4mHj7v2OVnxekDq8zETnbZ5y_MHVALo8IjjI7Ehyhu2ruL7hQQFXxp_RpS6ZZmw2QfxhyUjG3ukKttWaOw1i9AuL-jEvBa3aBF4xlwPKugvJedDiFyj7miDa7pzvfXb1NbOjzDjUzPULLQGoCPF3E5zEG-cW_rwP2C4Ls3eQAzOv6JhC5pGhyDudT/3gd/UIE3VCASSzWI1r9xERuszQ/h0/jMnuiFW6zBsO7sLEIB8kExrc1TFi6y6S91Yy1VVNByE)
Team, This week, the Senate began confirming Rahm Emanuel to be the US Ambassador to Japan. Yes, the same former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel that tried to cover up Laquan McDonald’s murder for 400 days. **The least we expected was for our Congressman****—****for someone who was once Laquan’s Congressman****—****Danny Davis, to speak out on this nomination.** With all his “power” in Congress, we hoped he would call on someone else to be considered for the job. Or at least ask the Senate not to start Emanuel’s confirmation on the _anniversary_ of Laquan McDonald’s murder—on Laquan Day. **I guess we should lower our expectations.** Danny Davis’ silence is loud and clear. Maybe we shouldn’t be surprised by his silence. After all, Danny Davis continued to stand by Mayor Emanuel’s side even after his cover-up was exposed. It’s the absence of leaders like Davis that allows people like Rahm Emanuel to continue to rise and be promoted despite his complete disregard for Black communities and Black lives. **Chicago deserves someone who will stand up for our community, someone who stands up against police violence, against Chicago political corruption, and someone who stands up for Black lives.** I’m ready to fight for my people like I’ve been fighting for the last decade. We demand accountability and when we don’t get justice, we march, we rally, and we refuse to let the people in power stand in our way. ******[If you believe our city and our country deserve better representation than fair weather friends, please donate to our campaign to bring a working class champion to IL-7.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzftBQdRgroTGeDD4PkkFRxuK5I1wxGMFdrTNIZspdoy-T0v0JaxO-tqCtaJv-k0nPrYSIWPNyXy0f9yZP3lcgmDm2hDbehWibbzGo4nVgSdEkCrderOCKVfpnm8RRqfhS2g2jhY-nuIT7DbRkbDS1edmzdyi4M6mlaVDbzuEy4kq6j2svP7HWhhyle6V__qrvSnzA0dj9yAIiE4Va4lYvqNjq5tSHK0WEADQNutNf2WNjzWFEy4DbvrdygLT14eNP4OYn1tS6vgi6dM3m-OVbsvQ8HskursoNWicGTSN5oh4gD3XLreBs951QYxP9Xxo-da4RGmwkXmgbk6WtDK16Oyw/3gd/UIE3VCASSzWI1r9xERuszQ/h1/FrC58IFJa2TML-75BpeNzh-1RTpI_IRsRweWFkJFyaQ)** [Donate now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzftBQdRgroTGeDD4PkkFRxuK5I1wxGMFdrTNIZspdoy-QnZW6Jc5hMvEBghhik43N8ujq_SLiFXr5v2L_MCz_zdn4xACRL0d2UrBpOrlHfrXuCMYX71nHbc_b-zTPY4sQJgEiKRGC3VyYO1ZfLc6BYWAbUszWxE2jcLeZ8SseNiUdjk9sOXlkKognaTIKWn4L6BKnqzzKzV7f4TNUhL_mIYWr2TybTZhrHSyvbpedv8eLHszDqm5n9uEU6bDufhHnN9ghOQJf0tCwbLlLSX1G7vZd26uGRRdyuas7rC0aiHGYEiz3TQq6_E7kk3nX4qYXijzkL6-Kpba3ZUa9JvB_qzQ/3gd/UIE3VCASSzWI1r9xERuszQ/h2/z2e8nsrhTbX6F64mDv8Bo7VM9FYnBV5IkoGvFOrNJy4) We all deserve better. clean_body: We still remember Laquan McDonald. | | | Team, This week, the Senate began confirming Rahm Emanuel to be the US Ambassador to Japan. Yes, the same former Chicago Mayor Rahm Emanuel that tried to cover up Laquan McDonald’s murder for 400 days. The least we expected was for our Congressman—for someone who was once Laquan’s Congressman—Danny Davis, to speak out on this nomination. With all his “power” in Congress, we hoped he would call on someone else to be considered for the job. Or at least ask the Senate not to start Emanuel’s confirmation on the anniversary of Laquan McDonald’s murder—on Laquan Day. I guess we should lower our expectations. Danny Davis’ silence is loud and clear. Maybe we shouldn’t be surprised by his silence. After all, Danny Davis continued to stand by Mayor Emanuel’s side even after his cover-up was exposed. It’s the absence of leaders like Davis that allows people like Rahm Emanuel to continue to rise and be promoted despite his complete disregard for Black communities and Black lives. Chicago deserves someone who will stand up for our community, someone who stands up against police violence, against Chicago political corruption, and someone who stands up for Black lives. I’m ready to fight for my people like I’ve been fighting for the last decade. We demand accountability and when we don’t get justice, we march, we rally, and we refuse to let the people in power stand in our way. **** We all deserve better. Thank you, Team Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Many of my colleagues continue to attack Social Security. I need your help to fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

If there's one thing our government has consistently done right, it's Social Security. That's why this week, I've joined nearly 200 other Democrats in introducing new legislation -- Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust.

**Social Security is a promise.** It's a promise from your government that if you pay your fair share, your government will have your back down the line. When you retire, when disaster strikes, or when you lose a loved one, you should get the help you've been promised -- and that you've earned.

This new legislation will strengthen Social Security by increasing benefits for seniors, widowers, children, and grandparents, improving the Cost-of-Living Adjustment so seniors can make ends meet, and ensuring Social Security stays solvent for future retirees. I'm proud this critical legislation includes both proposals from President Biden and from the recommendations of the Committee on Ways and Means Racial Equity Initiative.

**[I strongly believe that all Americans should be able to rely on Social Security for years to come. If you agree we need to protect our earned Social Security benefits, will you add your name next to mine as a citizen co-sponsor of the Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust legislation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/yEIKFanBnbvBtPPKQXojCO5Wb3SdE8xWE05RFuBgsJA=?ms=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

The work to defend Social Security is personal to me. My Oma lived to be almost 109 years old, and Social Security is a huge reason why she was able to live with dignity well into her second century.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/yEIKFanBnbvBtPPKQXojCO5Wb3SdE8xWE05RFuBgsJA=?ms=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})
Some experts now warn that - by the next decade - the Social Security fund could be unable to pay full benefits. We can't let that happen! I'm committed to doing everything I can to ensure Social Security continues its long and successful life. I'm confident this new legislation will do just that.

Sadly, many of my colleagues continue to attack Social Security, so I need your help to fight back and speak up on behalf of this critical program. **[Will you sign on today as a citizen co-sponsor of the Social Security 2100: A Sacred Trust legislation?](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/yEIKFanBnbvBtPPKQXojCO5Wb3SdE8xWE05RFuBgsJA=?ms=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)**

Thanks so much for your help, and, as always, it's an honor to represent you.

\-- Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/JpiLDvuRroY9ZmwaPmLXasUE24FS__3_U8YIIWgxGfc=?refcode=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/AkMTzTujdBCzeSOX27kDwv1BclDhCBKrixQDz9mrmQE=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/Dt38UUYVRcYonKarEzMb3rXctR_Qbpq0Q6dbpmcBSqo=)
---|---

---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/j8N_4iwCdWPiW6O2wC2pBJj_qxWNSlMauub0U9geJc0=/JpiLDvuRroY9ZmwaPmLXasUE24FS__3_U8YIIWgxGfc=?refcode=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_SocSec_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Anti-choice Democrat making a comeback?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last year, you helped us elect Justice Democrat Marie Newman and defeat
one of the few remaining anti-abortion Democrats in the U.S. House, Dan
Lipinski.

But now, Lipinski is thinking about a comeback. Crain’s Chicago Business
reports that conservative, anti-abortion, corporate-backed Lipinski is
considering challenging Newman to try to win his old seat back.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78917?refcode=em20211022-20131&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w ]Peter,
right now is critical. We have to show
the support Marie has as a Justice Democrat serving the people in
Congress. Can you rush a $3 donation to Marie’s campaign so
she’s ready to defeat Lipinski or any other corporate Democrats who enter
the race?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78917?refcode=em20211022-20131&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w ]Support Marie Newman

We’ve seen this year how Roe v. Wade is under attack across the country.
Protecting abortion rights is a fundamental part of our progressive
movement — it’s why ensuring anti-choice Lipinski doesn’t have a chance in
this race is so important.

Marie has been a champion of abortion rights in Congress, and we need to
keep her in Congress, fighting for the people. Lipinski represents the
worst of the corporate, conservative part of the Democratic Party. Let’s
ensure Marie has the support she needs to win re-election.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78917?refcode=em20211022-20131&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w ]Help re-elect Marie with a donation right away. We’ve seen how the
establishment goes after incumbent Justice Democrats — now’s the time to
fight back and support Marie.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211022-20131-footer&t=1025&refcode2=20131_1203867_U9HW7w&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=20131%2E1203867%2EU9HW7w

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Holly
subject: This is personal
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
He’s coming directly for Tom.
_Team, CNN just interviewed our opponent -- the man suspected of being ‘Q’ in QAnon -- and we can’t believe what he had to say:_ | **CNN: Watkins intends to go ‘out of my way to chase (O'Halleran) to whatever district he's moving to.’** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37827612/312780219/1053376810?refcode=em_fr_2021.10.22_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTJhZWJhMC02NDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sh7pXrphZJYw1LzSaPPYtBx_keaGqA_3TQAqFneSMPg=)

---

**While Tom is focused on representing the voices of Arizona’s hardworking families in Congress, his opponent, Ron Watkins, was the catalyst behind one of the darkest days in American history - January 6th.** Through his hate-filled message board he, along with Nazi sympathizers and white supremacists, peddled dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 election, and spread life-threatening misinformation about vaccines, culminating in the storming of the US Capitol on January 6th.

_Now, he’s coming directly for Tom._

Hey friend,
**Fox News just attacked me for opposing Trump’s senseless border wall** — because they know I'm the candidate who can stop Doug Ducey’s handpicked candidate and help keep this Congressional seat Democratic. The truth is we need comprehensive immigration reform — not a 4th century solution to a 21st century challenge.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37827862/312781707/41694283?refcode=X_102221_FoxNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2Y2YjgzNi02NjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ocV-DLIBBY5fYV-mT6DaXYMngG8XE6SK5S2JHg2yMEk=)
---
Yes, there are problems on the border, and I have a plan to address those problems. I also stand by my statement that the media in general and Fox News in particular have done our country a disservice by failing to report the truth about the help that border communities in Arizona need.
Our Arizona communities should not be burdened with the cost of solving these problems and creating an orderly, more secure border. This is a federal responsibility, and it needs to be dealt with in a serious manner, not in the sensationalistic way we see on Fox news.

If you agree that we need real solutions that help Southern Arizona families, not empty promises and racist rhetoric, I hope you will join me.

Sincerely,
Kirsten
---

subject: RE: the latest climate report:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida
body:
We’re urgently calling on you to stand up for our environment.

|
---

| | **BREAKING: White House sounds the alarm on climate change** | **250 SIGNATURES NEEDED:

The White House JUST released a report sounding the alarm on climate change and its economic impacts.

There’s not a moment to spare. We need you to step up for our climate and our future.

Please, will you add your name to fight for our environment?**
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828063/312782532/432575579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGExYmU3YS02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjJ0v6LS8QrhbOqWdoxnDpl-99LqXAlQOIXB0XwMha8=&emci=4cb70e06-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=94a1be7a-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22995843)
---

Peter, it’s absolutely stunning.

The White House just released a climate report that sounded the alarm on climate change and the economic impacts it causes.

They laid out a sobering case that climate change “poses an ongoing urgent and systemic risk to our economy and to the lives and livelihoods of everyday Americans.”

**In fact, the Biden White House urged every single one of us to act now.**

That’s why electing Ken is so critically important.

Combatting the climate crisis is one of Ken’s very top priorities. Living along Florida’s coastline, he’s seen firsthand the effects of climate change -- not only to our environment but to our larger coastal communities.

And when Ken is elected to the Senate, he will continue fighting for our environment on day one and not stop until real climate solutions are achieved.

But this fight is too big for him to do on his own -- that’s why he’s counting on you to let him know you’re with him.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Will you sign on to let Ken know you’re with him by stepping up for our environment?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828065/312782534/432575579?contactdata=86fRNWcPfFoMws04wFyefsr0FLdbQN9yIMISBc6mPYZCxOKpggtjDqjaOths6ypYCd8E8AS7nam%2FZ0jHrCWdaUmzBcHkRRydG4lmm9gsq9Gp8mAZQKvN20iGzOEogX%2BxEgwuFs0tMqdoQU7hxE9kK8rYg20wEQPRmPArfAId88IU%2FaYCnq0HcJVJFU%2B24fLU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGExYmU3YS02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SjJ0v6LS8QrhbOqWdoxnDpl-99LqXAlQOIXB0XwMha8=&emci=4cb70e06-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=94a1be7a-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22995843)**_

Thanks,

Team Ken

clean_body: We’re urgently calling on you to stand up for our environment. | | | BREAKING: White House sounds the alarm on climate change | 250 SIGNATURES NEEDED: The White House JUST released a report sounding the alarm on climate change and its economic impacts. There’s not a moment to spare. We need you to step up for our climate and our future. Please, will you add your name to fight for our environment? | Peter, it’s absolutely stunning. The White House just released a climate report that sounded the alarm on climate change and the economic impacts it causes. They laid out a sobering case that climate change “poses an ongoing urgent and systemic risk to our economy and to the lives and livelihoods of everyday Americans.” In fact, the Biden White House urged every single one of us to act now. That’s why electing Ken is so critically important. Combatting the climate crisis is one of Ken’s very top priorities. Living along Florida’s coastline, he’s seen firsthand the effects of climate change -- not only to our environment but to our larger coastal communities. And when Ken is elected to the Senate, he will continue fighting for our environment on day one and not stop until real climate solutions are achieved. But this fight is too big for him to do on his own -- that’s why he’s counting on you to let him know you’re with him. name: Laurie Bishop
subject: The Child Tax Credit is on the chopping block
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
Montana families are working harder than ever to make ends meet, but with the cost of housing and child care at an all-time high, we need to do more to ensure the next generation has every opportunity to succeed regardless of the income or zip code they are born into. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828079/312782550/935915225?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211022childtaxcredit_lb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJkYTk3NC02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAElsh3cAlwg7WWfggi-QJHDsSsah680plu9g-NB1Xs=)
---
Friend, Montana families are working harder than ever to make ends meet, but with the cost of housing and child care at an all-time high, we need to do more to ensure the next generation has every opportunity to succeed regardless of the income or zip code they are born into. Last Spring, Democrats in Congress expanded the **Child Tax Credit** , providing $3,600 a year per each child up to age 6, and $3,000 a year per each child ages 6-12. **This massive investment in our children is estimated to cut the child poverty rate by 40% this year.** Since the Child Tax Credit started going out to families in July, millions of children have been lifted out of poverty, parents have returned to the workforce, and families have been able to pay for basic necessities, like food or daycare. [Now, with the expanded Child Tax Credit ending in December, I am urging Congress to make it permanent and continue giving parents the support they need to take care of their family. Join me by adding your name → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828081/312782551/-1627426404?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211022childtaxcredit_lb_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJkYTk3NC02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAElsh3cAlwg7WWfggi-QJHDsSsah680plu9g-NB1Xs=&emci=d4bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e8bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828082/312782552/-1627426404?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211022childtaxcredit_lb_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJkYTk3NC02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAElsh3cAlwg7WWfggi-QJHDsSsah680plu9g-NB1Xs=&emci=d4bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e8bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)
---
We cannot expect people to go back to work if their underlying needs are not being met. Before we can talk about putting people back to work, we need to make sure every Montanan has food on the table and a roof over their head. The Child Tax Credit has given workers a cushion to make ends meet and allowed them to more fully engage in our economy.
We can make these benefits permanent in the economic package currently being negotiated between Congress and the White House, **but with some lawmakers determined to see the benefits end, we need to let them know that the people of Montana want to see this critical program continued.**
[Let’s keep helping our neighbors show up for their community and lift children out of poverty by making the Child Tax Credit permanent. Sign my petition in support of this program now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828083/312782553/-1627426404?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211022childtaxcredit_lb_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOGJkYTk3NC02NzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iAElsh3cAlwg7WWfggi-QJHDsSsah680plu9g-NB1Xs=&emci=d4bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e8bda974-6733-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)
This is our chance to help children across the country thrive, regardless of their family’s income or zip code. Thanks for making your voice heard with me.
— Laurie

subject: I am … stunned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |

| | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A new Monmouth poll shows this race is TIED 46–46 and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now.

**_[We're well into early voting right now, with just 11 days left until Election Day. Can you make a donation before midnight and help me stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin from winning in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37827969/312782022/-2023814932?refcode=20211022.5_TM_10GB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBhNWMxMy02NjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U1U7qi6FIkmkqP16uek--iInFv7nTPzeNktm7yF3TaM=)_**

I mean, think about it:

My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Despite everything Donald Trump has done to our Democracy, his support for the Jan. 6 insurrection, and Trump's "big lie," **Youngkin endorsed another FOUR YEARS of Trump as president.**

_And,_ with _Roe v. Wade_ hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia.

Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win.

Don’t let it happen.

clean_body: | | | = | | I’ll be blunt, Derek. A new Monmouth poll shows this race is TIED 46–46 and I’m stunned that more members of our grassroots team aren’t stepping up and donating right now. = I mean, think about it: My opponent Glenn Youngkin said he is running to be Virginia’s governor because of Donald Trump. Despite everything Donald Trump has done to our Democracy, his support for the Jan. 6 insurrection, and Trump's "big lie," Youngkin endorsed another FOUR YEARS of Trump as president. And, with Roe v. Wade hanging on by a thread, Glenn Youngkin could bring a Texas-style abortion ban to Virginia. Look, early voting has already begun, and right now, Donald Trump’s handpicked guy has a real shot to win. Don’t let it happen. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Laura Loomer
subject: He didn’t raise his hand . . .
body:
Over this past weekend, I attended my districts, Republican Lincoln Day Dinner. An event where hundreds of Republicans and elected officials gather each year
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/U8bQuovcHBOahMqFOaNDnA/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw)
Patriot,

Over this past weekend, I attended my district's Republican Lincoln Day Dinner, an event where hundreds of Republicans and elected officials gather each year – and this year, it was a BIG DEAL.

Here’s why:

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/U8bQuovcHBOahMqFOaNDnA/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw) **This was the first event where my opponent, Do-Nothing Dan Webster and I were in the same room together.**

I’ve been attending nearly every meeting that I can in my district, and I have been greeted with smiles and encouragement every step of the way.

But the common theme of frustration I’m hearing is this:

“We’ve invited Webster [the incumbent congressman] to this event for YEARS and he NEVER shows up!”

>From TEA Party events, county GOP meetings, REC meetings, and critical votes in Congress – like the second Impeachment of President Trump -- the story is the same, **Webster is ABSENT**.

But I wasn’t surprised I saw him at this event, because now that I’ve jumped into the race, Webster is scrambling to prove himself.

Webster has had no problem missing 15% of his votes in Congress this year alone, but he has recently found time to attend and host fundraisers.

When there’s a big check to grab, Webster is there.

But the other night at the Lincoln Day Dinner, Webster wasn’t collecting checks because he ended up standing out like a sore thumb when the keynote speaker asked a simple question:

He asked the room, “Raise your hand if you think the 2020 election was stolen.”

Everyone in the room raised their hands . . . **except Republican Congressman Dan Webster and his staffers who were sitting at his table**.

Democrats rewrote the rules around the nation under the guise of the "pandemic" to stuff ballot boxes in their favor last year.

**EVERYONE knows this.**

Absentee ballots were mailed to voters around the country – in many states they were sent without even a request by the voter!

Then Democrats sent out their operatives to chase down every ballot – **and several Democrat organizers were caught red handed getting paid for ballots!**

And Do-Nothing Dan saw nothing wrong with that?

Of course not!

Because he won his seat without real opposition.

But in this next election, he’s facing me, and I take Election Integrity as seriously as a heart attack.

We don’t need politicians in office who ignore our real problems just because they had no problems winning their elections.

We need fighters!

And I’m ready to fight for you.

If you haven’t already done so, [**make a quick donation to my campaign and help me hit my weekly fundraising goal**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/U8bQuovcHBOahMqFOaNDnA/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw).

We have $4,200 left to raise by Sunday at midnight, so [**any amount you can give will help me get one step closer to my goal**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/U8bQuovcHBOahMqFOaNDnA/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/fwfQ2TjWvMmAP892l0o3HCyw)

subject: Defend your personal liberties laid out in the Constitution
body:

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=f8224a54d56d41169e0c502f844777c9&_t=HVHQpCfthzKPn9xs5c0jDsG4HiCzOoTy8K56KlLtaKyEmMQ-4teSLiRy8ZAWgPFpRfB-FIByRaUJ-pR7wU8VWUtA2sMwlHbNAhCQWOyWoI1kBYI7De9MSFnL8vFLZ-TiBIrhwd8bExfkoS3ZA2f6iy7Df6NoxWQVnQfyuZzJvGRj5X4zvNwM45v04VhAGyk5JeaoKkgaO32pRi0Qo1R7Y2y_fgt6d2awpUT8f5L4iQc%3D)

| | | Hello,

As a fellow conservative, you likely already well know and feel the pressure that is being put upon you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the far left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do.

In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world to promise freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance; **our Constitution.**

That’s why I’m writing today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain **[free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f8224a54d56d41169e0c502f844777c9&_e=wIf6eMK3jwGHLKPiC0FhJVpfO80v7JoBdsw2Qvi0mn4kqov66rjOV5VYjT6GezsbHyVrALqoGU9VUkl_Wm_NtgRPz0NKnXUL2ypX0F6WGMuxu0TypYMbtLoGpYUNi3VyZCRZnd6Xgv7ezxSl8k7Z6PwWFVbdTFQXpNGhgRT9dqUB-C6Ya85qv5MOYQp5JjLTcExyp9uaqNRRMliwxJAghLJn-xrj8FU_GR4wx-oHq43nyuDNk6LuQlQuOz4uwtUaGUdpbfsoad-9nIpVQS56AIN4bOXIxsC6g5dxK2DJHOSLFItQ1sZ5MffJ7vdZiFdLPLDcCGlz1QT6eoZxJ9saEMtPDhHcRULSRioD_Z9f-2wO6kXrrpI5fl9HUcKozazz1ADjVLXXolwcsnsoj8u98dytt7gvgO-5PN2FKwmyO7MA1vDSIDwBPMTHn4549pbA)**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f8224a54d56d41169e0c502f844777c9&_e=wIf6eMK3jwGHLKPiC0FhJVpfO80v7JoBdsw2Qvi0mn4kqov66rjOV5VYjT6GezsbHyVrALqoGU9VUkl_Wm_NtgRPz0NKnXUL2ypX0F6WGMuxu0TypYMbtLoGpYUNi3VyZCRZnd6Xgv7ezxSl8k7Z6PwWFVbdTFQXpNGhgRT9dqUB-C6Ya85qv5MOYQp5JjLTcExyp9uaqNRRMliwxJAghLJn-xrj8FU_GR4wx-oHq41ecJggnsw24HYscXVL7xwSkZLj6kHyhk0r7CEzPYe4MrSeZM1vB4aqX4aCzBS6ul_bmozjKOA_1x90lHq7F6a1I5BfuhIkZNINTCnhnHY54OX_PYsSZIQV9we0Zrhx6yX5CwKSnx-GCbVX6i5i74fB2H4MEVgZrU_RM62gkLf62g7DXRAoy21m62r2RGiVuqwjV3FyN6H9_weW1u1-HtKj) In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives—they want government-controlled health care, higher taxes and redistribution of wealth in the form of socialism, increased regulations, to do away with the Electoral College, and for open borders.

It is for this reason that we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, the freedoms promised to us in the Constitution.

Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it promises to us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms.

To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by clicking this link today?

If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: **[https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f8224a54d56d41169e0c502f844777c9&_e=wIf6eMK3jwGHLKPiC0FhJVpfO80v7JoBdsw2Qvi0mn4kqov66rjOV5VYjT6GezsbHyVrALqoGU9VUkl_Wm_NtgRPz0NKnXUL2ypX0F6WGMuxu0TypYMbtLoGpYUNi3VyZCRZnd6Xgv7ezxSl8k7Z6PwWFVbdTFQXpNGhgRT9dqUB-C6Ya85qv5MOYQp5JjLTcExyp9uaqNRRMliwxJAghLJn-xrj8FU_GR4wx-oHq42lEzOBF1TJOr5-PigdQeRaxrRxc29UeRyuXcDSmqn70bUtmIrUEd4ginZIisChc119BmLCOXX1E-ShrZGuefqoQ1qFPxVEY7iEOnk0NaO-0j66uSaLswsJd1dhK6hrsEx2eAp61EQ1loKh5dnIuzI8TXvKry6aSkooTAgTT875hDdwd5IM1e__1mAiN1SLdceMsNfZU0uQXYSiz9sjI9zC)**

This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day.

With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the far-Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers.

[**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f8224a54d56d41169e0c502f844777c9&_e=wIf6eMK3jwGHLKPiC0FhJVpfO80v7JoBdsw2Qvi0mn4kqov66rjOV5VYjT6GezsbHyVrALqoGU9VUkl_Wm_NtgRPz0NKnXUL2ypX0F6WGMuxu0TypYMbtLoGpYUNi3VyZCRZnd6Xgv7ezxSl8k7Z6PwWFVbdTFQXpNGhgRT9dqUB-C6Ya85qv5MOYQp5JjLTcExyp9uaqNRRMliwxJAghLJn-xrj8FU_GR4wx-oHq42WnA-SwrPV8kG9NEfTAg_zZHy0sUM-XpgLu3Zwz3bMH7XkVNkzJB1_2Oiwb8p-HMGrOd0x-FrmJY_coWGW7Q-xVkV_OvAGvIjeLx0gXfc1-h6RjAM1rJaurTWCN62ByVFvnMs--JrjYrghu8Bu1ATd-4QalAt76nzQJiDequ2KyzgvKNLL3erQ7jw5tSoF9wGtFCTsgR889SbHOjvQFJnD)
Thank you, Andrew P. McIndoe VP, Development, The Heritage Foundation

body:
We can’t afford to lose any momentum right now.
#

Hi there. We know it’s a Friday, so we’ll keep this quick.
**THE SITUATION:** We’re more than 2/3 through the month of October, and right now we’re not on pace to hit our fundraising goal. That’s a big deal because we can’t afford to lose any momentum right now.
**OUR JOB:** The ONLY way we’re going to be able to close the gap and hit our goal is with the support of grassroots donors like you. That’s different from our opponents who can cut themselves massive checks. But that also means we need a massive response today if we want to close this fundraising gap.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828173/312783029/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDE0YTJiNy02ODMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwnIatcJmo0WVGcqQaOQNwK4xMBLKTRuw9no-qaK3Sw=&emci=aac2313a-c932-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1414a2b7-6833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)
---

| | Amid our build-up to the 2022 midterm election, we cannot forget that local elections are happening now! And it is critical that you make your voice heard by voting today. **There are just 11 days until Election Day, and folks can register to vote online up until October 25. (You can register in-person up to and on Election Day.)**
## **[Check your registration, update your address, or register to vote for the first time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828174/312783030/-1263530315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDE0YTJiNy02ODMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IwnIatcJmo0WVGcqQaOQNwK4xMBLKTRuw9no-qaK3Sw=&emci=aac2313a-c932-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1414a2b7-6833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9494239)**
Off-year elections like this are an important step in ensuring that our government is as effective and representative as possible. **From local school boards, to city council offices, to county leadership roles, each individual election is an opportunity to move our communities into a brighter future.** Don't sit on the sidelines this year. Exercise your vote and make your voice heard. **We must do our part in Washington state by voting, and urging our friends, neighbors, and loved ones to do the same. Share this email with anyone you know that needs a little reminder!**

clean_body: | | | Amid our build-up to the 2022 midterm election, we cannot forget that local elections are happening now! And it is critical that you make your voice heard by voting today. There are just 11 days until Election Day, and folks can register to vote online up until October 25. (You can register in-person up to and on Election Day.) Off-year elections like this are an important step in ensuring that our government is as effective and representative as possible. From local school boards, to city council offices, to county leadership roles, each individual election is an opportunity to move our communities into a brighter future. Don't sit on the sidelines this year. Exercise your vote and make your voice heard. We must do our part in Washington state by voting, and urging our friends, neighbors, and loved ones to do the same. Share this email with anyone you know that needs a little reminder! name: Michele Rayner
subject: The worst year in recent history regarding anti-LGBTQ+ state bills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828384/312784123/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=)

Peter, we will never make progress as a country if we don't center our humanity first.

That's why it saddens me -- _and it should sadden all Americans_ \-- that countless “leaders” across the _entire_ country have abused their power to neglect those who identify as LGBTQ+.

**Unfortunately, right here in Florida, too many politicians have intentionally worked toward anti-LGBTQ+ agendas. Just earlier this year, Governor DeSantis signed SB-1028, a bill directly attacking our transgender children in schools. The bill is cynical hatemonger, plain and simple.**

And it doesn't stop there: As of April, 2021 officially became the worst year in recent history regarding anti-LGBTQ+ legislation in states. 25 anti-LGBTQ+ bills having been enacted, including 13 specifically anti-transgender laws across 8 states -- _one of those being Florida._ Plus, more than 280 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across 33 states this session, including more than 130 specifically anti-transgender bills.

When I made history as the first openly queer, Black member of the Florida legislature, I didn't know the countless LGBTQ+ legislation that would come about. But I also knew that my election was more than just making history -- _it was about changing peoples' lives for the better._

Now, running for federal office, I'm ready to advocate for LGBTQ+ communities all the way in Washington. Peter, please know that I will always fight to protect our civil liberties and freedoms, no matter how we identify and no matter who we love.

**I hope you'll join me.**

**[If you're ready to stand up for LGBTQ+ folks in Florida and beyond, chip in $5 or whatever you can to our people-powered campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828385/312784124/-578272527?refcode=em21_211021_lgbtq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=)** [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828386/312784125/-578272527?refcode=em21_211021_lgbtq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=) [DONATE OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828387/312784126/-578272527?refcode=em21_211021_lgbtq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=) We must never stop pushing forward to progress. We can look at how far we have come, but also _how far we still have to go._

Talk soon,

Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37828388/312784127/-578272527?refcode=em21_211021_lgbtq&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f8cdc10b-7f32-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/c1039c23-6a33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTAzOWMyMy02YTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylavi0STSnjru1Jtvh3nxOrgEJVofnONNSOvEo_KCb8=&id=140435042). #

Why today?
Why is today the right time to make your first online donation to Mark Kelly’s Senate campaign?
Give us a chance to explain:
Our fifth opponent just got into this race — a Republican insider who helped lead a far-right organization that promoted some of the worst conspiracy theories about vaccines and the 2020 election.
Another one of our Republican opponents has a $10 million super PAC behind them, and you can bet even more dark money will flow in behind that.
CNN ranked Mark’s seat as one of the most likely to flip in the next election.
Yes, more than 900,000 people have contributed to Mark’s campaigns. But if you’ve ever thought about adding one more to our total and helping Mark win, today is a great day to do it.

Give us a chance to explain: Our fifth opponent just got into this race — a Republican insider who helped lead a far-right organization that promoted some of the worst conspiracy theories about vaccines and the 2020 election. Another one of our Republican opponents has a $10 million super PAC behind them, and you can bet even more dark money will flow in behind that. CNN ranked Mark’s seat as one of the most likely to flip in the next election. Yes, more than 900,000 people have contributed to Mark’s campaigns. But if you’ve ever thought about adding one more to our total and helping Mark win, today is a great day to do it. The mandate is clearly unconstitutional
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UhlTYS5H92NCzEPsfS8ceq-28Ld09BB6EACrmnXN-pr_-LP_BreEadeyRTYrdRuy93HLTBn5odKl1AIlNNW_vqe4om3o7xMi8Bf6_xHeZERXgKvmJSiuTpv54GFHCFKClSvKPS-bDHxsiOp25wAKgmO0b6xsAhI_&c=39znNMOgW4bV4FJeaDKn2QtO0wv482qiB0pq6OkdMiF6o92zh5PZgA==&ch=UBhNWaxRGaJmKpl4jeqtsu1x3SqF8eT_22rCPodFuj_QyuaUb2t8aA==)

# Where does this end?
---
Where does this end? A federal mandate for vaccination is inhumane, immoral and unconstitutional. Furthermore, it violates a person's unalienable right to bodily integrity.
Thankfully, Americans are courageously standing up for their rights by refusing this mandate. Unfortunately, they may be forced to resign their jobs, not only putting themselves in economic jeopardy, but imperiling the economy of our country as well. However, the current mandate is simply an illegal statement out of the mouth of a tyrant--no true legislation exists, so corporations will be open to widespread litigation if they fire their employees without real legislation to back it. I recommend anyone who has been fired, or is in danger of being fired, consult an attorney.
Remember, the US Constitution is never suspended and never superseded by any lower law or mandate. Period. It is the supreme law of the land, meaning any contradictory law is null and void.
Yet, as workers leave their jobs in droves due to this unconscionable and illegal effort to force vaccinations, the supply chain shortage grows more dire. Americans' freedoms must not be infringed upon. Everyone has a right to work a job without being told what they must put in their bodies, to enjoy the economic boons from a workforce that is fully employed, prosperous, and well-sustained by all the great bounties this country has to offer.
Our economic freedom is what this country is built upon. Help me stand against this tyranny by sending me to Washington to fight for you.
---
|
---

name: Team Cranley
subject: Do you SUPPORT expanding clean energy, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Cincinnati is our proof positive. | _We’re ready to shout this from the rooftops:_ **Expanding clean energy isn’t just about protecting our environment — it’s about creating good-paying jobs and growing Ohio’s economy.** It’s seriously that simple. Green energy = good jobs. clean_body: We’re cutting into the Left’s advantage -- we can’t stop now! | Peter, After the Cook Political Report gave the Democrats a 4-POINT advantage in our congressional race, I diverted emergency funds to our voter registration initiative to close the gap. Since then, we’ve been working overtime to cut into the Democrats’ advantage. We are on track to CRUSH our original budget but I noticed you hadn’t joined your neighbors by making an urgent contribution. I can’t do this without you, Peter. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Maria Elvira Salazar Date: Fri, Oct 8, 2021 Subject: RE: D+4? To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, I was shocked to see the Cook Political Report give Democrats a 4-POINT advantage in our congressional race. What accounts for the Democrats’ advantage? Voter registration. That’s why I’ve decided to divert emergency funds to our voter registration initiative to erase the Democrats’ lead. George Soros’ big-money voter registration efforts have paid off. He’s on a mission to exact revenge after Republicans won BIG in Florida last year -- and that means registering enough voters to defeat us. We cannot let the fate of our country be decided by voter registration numbers. That’s why I’ve made ending the Democrats’ voter registration lead in our district a TOP PRIORITY for our campaign. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

subject: Union halls and picket lines

body:
If we want to expand the Democratic Senate majority, we need to win Ohio. |
Last year’s election was a close call, and the stakes will only get higher. Marcy Kaptur | |
---

| | Hello,
In a minute, I’ll ask you to split a critical donation between Marcy Kaptur and my campaign to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue. **But first, let me explain why this race — and your donation — are so important today.**

Protecting our Democratic Senate majority is not enough. If we want to stop Mitch McConnell from abusing the filibuster, we must expand our Senate majority. And flipping Ohio’s open Senate seat is our best chance to do just that.

**A new poll shows this race in a dead heat. And Senator Sherrod Brown has endorsed our campaign because he knows we can win. Now all we need is you.**

[**Whether or not we can flip this seat depends on you. We need the resources right now — not next year — to build the team it’ll take to win. Will you split a donation of $10 or more to help us flip Ohio blue and expand the Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNPFe_FLO4bFaBK0Rd1lMWfXIzPzFHCLpPQZ_knE1DYKd0Ul5okhdxVjpU6Zgbhgb2gjE2EILcQ08_lQ_V6eP6GkI9aoOmwQ4h3O-hh-v9vrQSCcoGDdlkWGg1xJAWzG2Qk_URWKaq_c7z-e-WLdxNr4oAMMyMiAJi0bKxLVZm6avZxs0qeGxQ3gibT-llIkvPVMBU8P690eg2-ZIPeMg_oox_j8pQNeT0ifLVXZX7xUsUrEsmvoyf7TSID5ETsQ8ctCaiCoBQuta2Z6OoWGWdXZXta7416T5bdpZuNlcy81QRh_kfhAB4AuL-QmmM2uLwnM93lSK9MiQDuE5Hg8gYGKcVMrJy-h9eSaesJclGKTv_lTXq7ibPPND5RaOXv1lYDusvW5K084Cx5TjP6wRjazEfUEPjoi0xJkRxQDIf9i0/3gd/5Sla41-uQuS4AXDc592Wcw/h0/UxeYW9vA7CelHljrqfdMYF1IUGsg98vue5daP8fTaak)

Donald Trump has made this race his top target. That’s why he attacked me during his first rally since losing the election. **It’s clear we’ve got the GOP running scared.**

All of my GOP opponents are multi-millionaires. Billionaire tech giant Peter Thiel has propped up JD Vance with a $10 million super PAC. And Josh Mandel is a dangerous Trump-wannabe with his own share of Twitter rants.

Me? I’ve been on picket lines and in union halls my whole life. I’m still paying off my family’s student loans and mortgage. I’m fighting like hell to cut workers in on the deal — not prop up my wealthy friends and right-wing special interests.

**Folks****, I believe we can win this race. CNN ranks us as one of the most likely seats to flip. But this is on track to be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022. So, I’m turning to you:**

name: Team Beshear
subject: ✅ Roads, bridges, and drinking water -- oh my!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter, Andy recognizes that infrastructure improvements mean good jobs, safer conditions, and a brighter, more equal future for all of Kentucky. Peter,

Andy recognizes that infrastructure improvements mean good jobs, safer conditions, and a brighter, more equal future for _all of Kentucky._

That's why revitalizing the Commonwealth's infrastructure has been one of his biggest priorities as governor. **Here are just some of his accomplishments so far:**

✅ Implemented the Better Kentucky plan to create 14,500 new jobs, build new schools, update vocational centers, and more.
✅ Secured $87 million in infrastructure project investments through the Department for Local Government.
✅ Invested over $1 billion in projects through the Kentucky Transportation Cabinet (KYTC).
✅ Accelerated the Mountain Parkway expansion in Eastern Kentucky.
✅ Allocated more than $750 million through the Better Kentucky plan to expand broadband access and deliver clean drinking water and quality sewer systems across the Commonwealth.

Infrastructure improvements put Kentuckians to work which is crucial as we strive to recover from the pandemic. It ensures that our roads are safe, our water is clean, and that we make all communities -- rural, urban, and everywhere in between -- better than ever.

Our team is so thankful you're on board to help Andy continue revitalizing infrastructure and building a stronger Commonwealth.

Thanks,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q4-2021?refcode=em21_211022_infra_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211022_infra_fnd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email)
---

PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
---
Andy Beshear for Governor
PO Box 4278
Louisville, KY 40204
United States
---

Susan Wild decided to proxy vote due to the “ongoing public health emergency” -- abusing the rules of the House -- while her campaign is spending nearly $1,700 for her LUXURY, 5-star vacation in Miami, FL! Outrageous. Instead of being in Washington, D.C., serving the people of Pennsylvania who elected her to be there, she is in Miami. Susan Wild is out of touch with Pennsylvania. She cannot do the simple job of representing you in Congress in-person and chooses to take loop-holes so she can vacation in Florida. As your next Congresswoman, I will stand up to Pelosi’s radical agenda that she shoves through the House without any effort of bipartisanship. I will fight for your common-sense conservative values, bring jobs to our state, and vote for legislation that will better Pennsylvania. It’s time Pennsylvania has a Congresswoman who works for them, not for Nancy Pelosi. Thank you, Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

| Dear Patriot, I have big news today -- Fauci is in serious trouble. The National Institute of Health just admitted that Fauci funded gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab. Now it's all spiraling downhill for Anthony Fauci. When I called him out for funding gain-of-function research in Wuhan, I was called a lunatic conspiracy theorist by the mainstream media. Now I'm vindicated. And Fauci has been proven to be a serial liar. Here's the question now: will Joe Biden's Department of Justice investigate him for lying under oath in front of the U.S. Senate? Today, I am renewing my push for a criminal investigation of Anthony Fauci. Actions must have consequences. If you or I lied under oath, in any circumstance, we would be immediately hit with perjury charges. subject: Steve Bannon and Scott Perry -- together again.

body:
Dear Friend,

Steve Bannon and Scott Perry are back at it. This vile duo is doing whatever they can to take down our democracy.

To protect his former buddy, Donald Trump, Bannon is refusing to comply with a congressional subpoena in the investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection on the Capitol. The majority of Congress found him in criminal contempt of Congress on Thursday -- but not everyone.

Like Rep. Scott Perry, for instance.

Wondering why Perry voted against it? Because he was the only legislator who was NAMED in the subpoena. Go figure!

Perry was one of several lawmakers whose phone records and online activity were asked to be examined as part of the inquiry. He objected to the records request just as he formally objected to the legitimate Pennsylvania Electoral College votes the day after the uprising -- votes that represented the will of Pennsylvanians. He and Bannon remain right in step with Trump's efforts to gain power by destroying our democracy.

As we near the General Election, we need your help to fight fascism and advance justice. Please help us with a donation today as we rally, educate, and register voters in areas of our state that are most overlooked! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=102221]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=102221]

Only by working together can we fight and win to protect our voices and our democracy.

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

# [It's time to pass the Democrats' budget reconciliation plan. Tell Congress to tax the rich for the cost! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3134bb39-e90a-4114-94f7-fc7fcc33eacd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | President Biden's $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill would be a monumental investment in working families and the fight against climate change -- but some Democrats in Congress are still not on board. We need the passage of the full plan as soon as possible -- and that $3.5 trillion could easily be funded by taxing the ultra-wealthy and making them pay their fair share. [Sign now to demand Congress invest in working families by passing the Democrats' budget reconciliation plan and taxing the rich >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T893d71b8-1349-44ce-9c1b-6ac0dc79f92b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The pandemic made billionaires like Jeff Bezos, Elon Musk, and Mark Zuckerberg richer than ever. Their wealth grew exponentially while millions of Americans continue living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to make ends meet. Look, we’re all for people being successful and making money. But billionaires should not pay a lower tax rate than working class Americans. It’s time for us to invest in working families and tax the ultra-wealthy to pay for it. [Sign now to demand Congress invest in working families by passing the Democrats' budget reconciliation plan and taxing the rich >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3a014ba-ddff-4ec3-a58b-8571793ee5ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | These stakes couldn’t be higher. Last week Donald Trump and Steve Bannon held a rally in support of Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, Jason Miyares, and the rest of the Virginia GOP. Meanwhile the First Lady, Dr. Jill Biden, came to Henrico last Friday, Stacey Abrams campaigned with Terry in Norfolk and Fairfax over the weekend, and Vice President Kamala Harris was in Prince William County yesterday to fire up folks and get them out to vote. The difference couldn’t be any more clear. It couldn’t be any more dangerous either. Terry, Hala, and Mark are running to keep Virginia moving forward, to prove that the Biden agenda works, and to show once and for all that Trumpism doesn’t represent the majority of Virginians. But here’s the thing, friend – I know the stakes are high, you know the stakes are high, but there are folks out there that we still need to reach and remind them just how important this election really is. That’s why I’m writing to you now – because the Democratic Party of Virginia has a plan to do just that – but they need your help. **[Will you join me in supporting the Democratic Party of Virginia’s mobilization and outreach efforts today? clean_body: 11 days | | | These stakes couldn’t be higher. Last week Donald Trump and Steve Bannon held a rally in support of Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears, Jason Miyares, and the rest of the Virginia GOP. Meanwhile the First Lady, Dr. Jill Biden, came to Henrico last Friday, Stacey Abrams campaigned with Terry in Norfolk and Fairfax over the weekend, and Vice President Kamala Harris was in Prince William County yesterday to fire up folks and get them out to vote. The difference couldn’t be any more clear. It couldn’t be any more dangerous either. Terry, Hala, and Mark are running to keep Virginia moving forward, to prove that the Biden agenda works, and to show once and for all that Trumpism doesn’t represent the majority of Virginians. But here’s the thing, friend – I know the stakes are high, you know the stakes are high, but there are folks out there that we still need to reach and remind them just how important this election really is. That’s why I’m writing to you now – because the Democratic Party of Virginia has a plan to do just that – but they need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ****=** **=** **=** **=** Thank you for your support, stay well. Peter,

I firmly believe that the role — _the duty_ — of the Governor of Virginia is to unite people. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t.

After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values.

From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters.

**This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is.**

**[That’s why, right now, I am asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Alex Lasry. Everything we raise right now will go directly toward getting out the vote in this election — because the best way to defend our democracy is to participate in it. ** January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. name: Ryan Busse
subject: Get a copy of my new book with a donation to Giffords
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’ve worked in the gun industry for more than two decades. That’s why I know firsthand how the firearms industry and its lobby, especially the NRA, has become dangerously absolutist about the Second Amendment.
#

Friends,
I’ve worked in the gun industry for more than two decades. So I’ve seen firsthand how the firearms industry and its lobby, especially the NRA, has become dangerously absolutist about the Second Amendment. Today the industry dismisses decency and promotes outrageous radicalized views.
**It’s gotten so extreme that I wrote a book about it,_Gunfight: My Battle Against the Industry that Radicalized America._**
_Gunfight_ is my call-out of a wild, secretive industry that impacts every corner of this country. I explain how America's gun industry shifted from prioritizing safety and ethics to one that is addicted to fear, conspiracy, intolerance, and secrecy. It’s a chance to understand how and why our country got to this point—and provides a glimpse inside our opponents’ strategy.
[**And today, I want to give you the opportunity to receive a copy of my new book. All I’m asking is that you make a donation of $35 or more to support our work to promote gun safety legislation. Donate here to get your copy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211022-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1121_3935704_qTez2z&akid=1121%2E3935704%2EqTez2z)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211022-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1121_3935704_qTez2z&akid=1121%2E3935704%2EqTez2z)
Like me, Gabby Giffords is a gun owner who knows that commonsense gun safety laws and the Second Amendment are not in conflict. Together with Gabby and the team at Giffords, we are continuing to build a home for responsible gun owners who reject the extremism of the gun industry and who understand that our freedoms are coupled with immense responsibility.
Your donation will help us to do our part to stop the NRA from spreading extremism and fuel our efforts to pass commonsense gun safety laws like universal background checks that benefit all Americans—including responsible gun owners.
[**So please, make a donation of $35 or more to help us save lives and we’ll send you a copy of my new book _Gunfight_.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211022-1-15&t=3&refcode2=1121_3935704_qTez2z&akid=1121%2E3935704%2EqTez2z)
Thank you for your support.
Ryan Busse
Senior Advisor, Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21-book?refcode=em211022-1-15&t=4&refcode2=1121_3935704_qTez2z&akid=1121%2E3935704%2EqTez2z)**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1121%2E3935704%2EqTez2z) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Energized, Organized, and Motivated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Americans are not happy right now. Not happy with the listless leadership of President Joe Biden and his handlers. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470902?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Energized, Organized, and Motivated**_ Americans are not happy right now. Not happy with the listless leadership of President Joe Biden and his handlers. Not happy with empty grocery store shelves. Not happy with high gas prices and inflation that is a hidden tax on all working Americans. We’re only 10 months into the Biden Administration and it is already quite clear that the president has turned over his administration to the far left in his party. Thankfully, we have an opportunity to balance out Washington by winning back the House and Senate next year and this week gave me more and more confidence that Republicans will do just that.

Being at events and talking to fellow Republicans, it is clear that we’re energized, organized, and motivated for victory next November. We know the stakes are high, and we’re prepared to meet them. Our party keeps growing in Indiana. We’re welcoming more and more Hoosiers who feel ignored by the left and are concerned with the radical leftward tilt of the country. We also know what practical, conservative leadership can accomplish because all Hoosiers have benefited from that in Indiana for 16+ years now. I’m looking forward to working with all of my fellow Indiana Republicans to carry this enthusiasm for change through next November!

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer speaks at the Lugar Series Annual Luncheon earlier this week in Indianapolis._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **met with Consul General Tajima Hiroshi to discuss the strong relationship between Japan and Indiana. Japan is our state's largest foreign direct investor with 72,000 jobs provided by over 300 Japanese businesses. Governor Holcomb is truly taking Indiana to the world and bringing the world back to Indiana.

**Governor Holcomb** announced that the thrid round of his Next Level Connections Broadband Grant program has received more than 250 letters of intent requesting a total of more than $606 million in state grant funding with an additional $280 million in matching funds. Gov. Holcomb is committed to delivering affordable, high-speed broadband to every Hoosier in the state.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb meeting with Consul General Tajima Hiroshi._

|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer's Statement on HD 73 Caucus**_ Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer issued the following statement on the recently completed caucus in Indiana House District 73:
_**"Congratulations to J. Davisson on his unanimous caucus victory tonight. I can think of no one better to complete the late Steve Davisson’s term than J. Hoosiers in the 73rd District can expect the legacy of servant leadership Steve established to be seamlessly continued by their new State Representative, J. Davisson.”**_
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Lugar Series Lunch**_ Congratulations to all the graduates and Lugar Series alum who made this week’s annual luncheon such a great event. Thank you for your leadership!
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Op-Ed**_ Last week Chairman Hupfer penned an op-ed for the Daily Caller discussing another Democrat attempt to takeover state elections.

Read his piece here: [https://dailycaller.com/2021/10/13/hupfer-freedom-vote-act-more-like-freedom-cheat-act/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fa16c3056b&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Brent Hennrich for WA-03
subject: Voter Outreach! I need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Brent Hennrich For Washington**](https://www
body:
Today, I want to talk to you about our grassroots fundraising efforts. Our campaign is in need of a boost. Why do I say “our”? B
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=iY80aIOR5qFJlloXZN4GdEBedYvqqpyQ0RGxgS32wSU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vN2NOb1B2YmloP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON!
---
| | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=KrxNyzCsrK1UIJ9xCdL-L2vTXDwwiIF5IxW7weD-Kz8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9icmVudGhlbm5yaWNoLmNvbSIsInIiOiJkNTM5MDFhMi1jNTZmLTQ0NTktNGE5MS1mOWM1NGZlMTdiMzEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
|
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=Hb_djp0cQPOoAZOZngLtjZ_XD67dC1aKQoVsh7ffdkg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50LWhlbm5yaWNoLWZvci13YXNoaW5ndG9uLTE_cmVmY29kZT1CQ0FlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjJjNDg1YzNhLTYzYWMtNGZkYi0wMWZmLTRjNjMwZGY5OTY0NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| |
---
| Today, I want to talk to you about our grassroots fundraising efforts. Our campaign is in need of a boost. Why do I say “our”? Because it is about us, working together toward a better future. Here are some reasons why I’m asking and what’s different in our efforts compared to our opponents.

---
| | From the beginning, I wanted this to be a grassroots campaign because if it isn’t about the people of District 3 and supported by them, what’s the point? Each constituent matters to me. Each has value and is seeking representation. While the idea of a business or a particular group supporting me is good, ultimately it’s you who will be voting. So, I’m appealing directly to you. I want to know what you think about our campaign but I also need your donations to keep it running. It’s about voter outreach. It’s about building a team. It’s about growing from the 3rd District up and growing this operation means asking for donations from you.
---
| | We are up against three well-backed candidates. It's going to take a lot of effort to win and I don’t plan on losing. It's also takes money. You'd be surprised how much a thousand dollars buys in voter outreach, especially when that money is spent wisely. I’m even stuffing envelopes myself to keep costs down.
---
|
---
| | Effectively, I’m running 3 races in the primary and have to win at least two of them to continue the campaigning and win the general election next fall. That’s a long road and some tough uphill climbs. Know this, though.
---
| |
* I’m up against a Republican incumbent with a major support network of the mainstream Republican Party. Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler is out-raising me in contributions 59 to 1. I would expect to be fighting an uneven battle against an incumbent but that is a lot.
* I’m also facing a MAGA candidate handpicked and endorsed by Donald Trump. Joe Kent is dashing off to fundraisers in Florida and so far is growing his war chest at a rate of 34 to 1 for me.
* And don’t forget, Heidi St. John. She’s still in this and is still drawing support both personal and financial to the ratio of 13 to 1 against my campaign.

(Figures based on FEC reporting 01/01/2021-09/30/2021)
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=ve-gvTl1lFhkxF_zbjI_TxHB_1quwd7ijE2tlxQmdL0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50LWhlbm5yaWNoLWZvci13YXNoaW5ndG9uLTE_cmVmY29kZT1CQ0FlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjMyODg3NjA3LWNlYzUtNDZkMC0xNmJhLWY5ZjgxZjVmMzJkYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | Obviously, this is a big ask for you to help us compete against this type of fundraising with grassroots individual donors. So let’s talk about the FEC rules for individual donations made directly to a campaign.
* You can contribute a maximum of $2900 for each election cycle.
* That’s a combined total allowed of $5800 for both the primary and general election.
* BUT EVERY DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT HELPS!

---
| | If you don’t want
* The Republican status quo of pure obstruction in Congress doing everything they can by doing nothing or actively road blocking good policy simply because it comes from the other party.
* Another member of the MAGA movement representing you in Congress with their idea of America being one for them and those like them, with overt hints of theocracy and nationalism.
* A representative, that’s all surface with no substance.

If you want
* Real action on equitable Whole Body Healthcare.
* Protection of a woman’s right to complete reproductive care.
* The climate change crisis faced head on with solutions, not meandering promises to “get to it".
* A proper funding of early childhood education.
* Support of an America for ALL Americans.

[Then help me win.](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=QqE5MbTnILCjMBp76rMoQDC5EmWUTIitiUBUHchLhhg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50LWhlbm5yaWNoLWZvci13YXNoaW5ndG9uLTE_cmVmY29kZT1CQ0FlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjgyYjNmYWJmLTNkNjItNGE1NS00NGE0LTMwNmY3MjY4YjU1NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
* Pitch in, volunteer, and make calls.
* Use social media to support and spread our message.
* Tell your friends and neighbors to get involved, get registered to vote and support me themselves.

But please, make a donation at BH4C.WIN today. Better yet a recurring monthly donation in any amount.
Hey, $22 (for 2022) sounds like a nice, easy number to remember. Like I said before, every dollar will help buy voter outreach, even if I have to stuff every envelope myself. Thank you. Now, let’s [#FlipWA03](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=1TkGXB4rL6qa4SmP7mVpVJWY_5A1vXfGlVd1egmnUcg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9zZWFyY2g_cT0lMjNmbGlwd2EwMyIsInIiOiI4MmIzZmFiZi0zZDYyLTRhNTUtNDRhNC0zMDZmNzI2OGI1NTciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) together.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/7cNoPvbih/c?w=_wLqIuqB3lPCoGnGJz0BWGHTmTXuRTM2WubOWwEyk68.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50LWhlbm5yaWNoLWZvci13YXNoaW5ndG9uLTE_cmVmY29kZT1CQ0FlbWFpbCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjQ2NTI3NzhmLTkxNmYtNGM5ZS05MjIzLWE0MDdmNTkyYjM0NCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
