clean_body: Today, I want to talk to you about our grassroots fundraising efforts. Our campaign is in need of a boost. Why do I say “our”? B | | Can't see this message? | | | | | LET'S HEAL WASHINGTON! | | | | | | | | | Today, I want to talk to you about our grassroots fundraising efforts. Our campaign is in need of a boost. Why do I say “our”? Because it is about us, working together toward a better future. Here are some reasons why I’m asking and what’s different in our efforts compared to our opponents. | | From the beginning, I wanted this to be a grassroots campaign because if it isn’t about the people of District 3 and supported by them, what’s the point? Each constituent matters to me. Each has value and is seeking representation. While the idea of a business or a particular group supporting me is good, ultimately it’s you who will be voting. So, I’m appealing directly to you. I want to know what you think about our campaign but I also need your donations to keep it running. It’s about voter outreach. It’s about building a team. It’s about growing from the 3rd District up and growing this operation means asking for donations from you. | | We are up against three well-backed candidates. It's going to take a lot of effort to win and I don’t plan on losing. It's also takes money. You'd be surprised how much a thousand dollars buys in voter outreach, especially when that money is spent wisely. I’m even stuffing envelopes myself to keep costs down. | | | Effectively, I’m running 3 races in the primary and have to win at least two of them to continue the campaigning and win the general election next fall. That’s a long road and some tough uphill climbs. Know this, though. | | I’m up against a Republican incumbent with a major support network of the mainstream Republican Party. Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler is out-raising me in contributions 59 to 1. I would expect to be fighting an uneven battle against an incumbent but that is a lot. I’m also facing a MAGA candidate handpicked and endorsed by Donald Trump. Joe Kent is dashing off to fundraisers in Florida and so far is growing his war chest at a rate of 34 to 1 for me. And don’t forget, Heidi St. John. She’s still in this and is still drawing support both personal and financial to the ratio of 13 to 1 against my campaign. (Figures based on FEC reporting 01/01/2021-09/30/2021) | | | | | Obviously, this is a big ask for you to help us compete against this type of fundraising with grassroots individual donors. So let’s talk about the FEC rules for individual donations made directly to a campaign. You can contribute a maximum of $2900 for each election cycle. That’s a combined total allowed of $5800 for both the primary and general election. BUT EVERY DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT HELPS! | | If you don’t want The Republican status quo of pure obstruction in Congress doing everything they can by doing nothing or actively road blocking good policy simply because it comes from the other party. Another member of the MAGA movement representing you in Congress with their idea of America being one for them and those like them, with overt hints of theocracy and nationalism. A representative, that’s all surface with no substance. If you want Real action on equitable Whole Body Healthcare. Protection of a woman’s right to complete reproductive care. The climate change crisis faced head on with solutions, not meandering promises to “get to it". A proper funding of early childhood education. Support of an America for ALL Americans. Pitch in, volunteer, and make calls. Use social media to support and spread our message. Tell your friends and neighbors to get involved, get registered to vote and support me themselves. But please, make a donation at BH4C.WIN today. Better yet a recurring monthly donation in any amount. Hey, $22 (for 2022) sounds like a nice, easy number to remember. Like I said before, every dollar will help buy voter outreach, even if I have to stuff every envelope myself. Thank you. Now, let’s together. | | | | | If a friend forwarded you this email, don't miss the next! | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Here’s how we’re going to pay for childcare, paid leave, climate action, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
**The biggest corporations in America have unleashed a lobbying blitz to try to stop a corporate tax increase and many other popular provisions — from Medicare expansion to climate action — of the Build Back Better Act.**
Big corporations and their billionaire CEOs have refused to pay their fair share of taxes for far too long. That’s why the Build Back Better Act raises taxes on corporations and the richest Americans AND bolsters funding for IRS enforcement to _ensure_ the wealthiest finally pay their taxes.
Corporate America, Big Pharma, and Wall Street are spending millions to influence Congress and try to stop the Democratic agenda that people want, need, and deserve. Right this minute, corporate lobbyists are trying to stop the will of the people. We can’t let them.
**That’s why I’m in the halls of Congress doing everything I can to deliver for folks who need economic relief and take action to address climate change — all while paying for it by taxing the rich and corporations. Are you with me?**
[**It’s you, me, and our people-first movement against the unlimited resources of Corporate America. Chip in $3 right now to fuel my fight for the people NOT corporate interests. We can only pass a strong, progressive Build Back Better Act if we work together right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-740&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=740_420207_qvNhBp&akid=740%2E420207%2EqvNhBp)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8206?refcode=em20211022-740&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=740%2E420207%2EqvNhBp)**
While Big Pharma, Wall Street, and other corporate interests try to remove every cornerstone policy of President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act, I’m leading the fight in Congress to pass a strong, visionary, and transformative bill. I’m so glad you’re with me in this fight, Peter.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211022-740-footer&t=21&refcode2=740_420207_qvNhBp&akid=740%2E420207%2EqvNhBp)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

**"[Maggie Hassan is] probably the most endangered Democrat right now."** Have you seen this, friend? Reporters across the country are calling Senator Hassan one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection. And a new poll shows Maggie trailing behind Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate. We can't explain how critical this race is. With our Democratic majority split 50-50, the path to the Senate runs right through New Hampshire. If McConnell takes back the gavel, he will undo everything Maggie Hassan and Senate Democrats worked so hard for. name: Rev. Jimmie Banks
subject: He is what Kansas needs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
Have you heard the big news?

Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be02de0c-7433-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/3da84bb9-7433-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NGJiOS03NDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOPeBaip0dUN8XuB67mH_T9WSQApLHCOj-gNqRORUU=&id=103697760)
---
| Hi there folks,

My name is Reverend Jimmie Banks. I am here to tell you about my friend Mark Holland.

Mark is as Kansas as it gets. He is a fourth generation Kansan, a father, a former mayor, and a pastor, and he is currently running for US Senate in 2022. He sees the state of things that current senator Jerry Moran has left — Moran is giving half the effort and is absent both here at home AND in DC. He sees the need of our great state for _strong leadership and steadfast conviction._

Friends, I know Mark is the right guy for the job. He loves this state and is ready to put up a fight. [_But he can't do it without you. This race will be long and difficult, will you chip in now to support Mark Holland?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37831758/312801335/1155320912?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_211022_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NGJiOS03NDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOPeBaip0dUN8XuB67mH_T9WSQApLHCOj-gNqRORUU=)

Mark is bravely standing up on behalf of all Kansans, because he sees what we all do: a corrupt and broken Washington. Jerry Moran isn’t doing his job and we deserve better. We deserve a representative in the US Senate who is willing to stand up to the politics in DC and deliver solutions.

[_But building this future will take serious fundraising, will you join me in supporting Mark and fight for a better future for Kansans?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37831759/312801342/1155320912?amount=10&refcode=MH_EM_FR_3MO_211022_1_1&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGE4NGJiOS03NDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqOPeBaip0dUN8XuB67mH_T9WSQApLHCOj-gNqRORUU=)

Rev. Jimmie Banks

name: Rep. Thomas Massie
subject: An avalanche of lies and money
body:
Are you a billionaire? Yeah, me neither. So how do we win this fight?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z06d69v748o0nma99d69vdu0cdup5b6dc1trcea8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj64o76c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongser7ddtm6hhb8s3lmcqm9dphceqrcsjmc1rm4d32e9j76ddme5g60o35mdr31puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d366apb6ob7mthmcd30m9h3csh5u)
| | | | **From The Desk of
_Congressman Thomas Massie_** _Co-Chair, 2 nd Amendment Caucus_
---
| | Friend,

We are getting crushed - and by "we" I mean every single American who cares about upholding our God-given, constitutional right of self-defense.

Each year, the federal government, liberal-run states and billionaires like Mike Bloomberg and George Soros are spending hundreds of millions of dollars to spread anti-gun lies.

That's why Biden, Harris, Pelosi and Schumer are now blatantly coming after guns and gun owners. They think they can smother the truth in a well-funded avalanche of misinformation.

**Are you a billionaire? Yeah, me neither. So how do we win this fight?**

**One way, right now, is by supporting a vital organization that I rely on every day in my fight against the gun grabbers in Washington, D.C., and that's the Crime Prevention Research Center. **It's led by my good friend Dr. John Lott Jr., a world-recognized expert on crime and guns and author of 10 books including the revolutionary _More Guns, Less Crime_.

They are spearheading a nationwide education campaign to get the real facts about gun ownership to policymakers like me, to journalists, and to the general public. In a free society like ours, this is how we win debates and the CPRC is doing absolute yeoman's work.

**[If you're able to strongly support them right now, it would be extremely helpful.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znbn9p8vgtpikseqqsg7dbhr29ilgkkqc43t8n7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj64o76c1h2bs)**
---
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zviei361evcktan37sge804uf0kmqec7g89qbpro_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj64o76c1h2bs)
It's just insane that a year into "Defund the Police," our current crime wave isn't being blamed on actual criminals or the foolish politicians who enabled this reckless movement.

Nope, instead the far Left is going to pull out all the stops in an effort to scapegoat gun owners and destroy the 2nd Amendment. I will be doing everything I can to rally my fellow legislators in Congress, but I need organizations like the CPRC on my side.

I know first-hand how helpful their work can be because I use it regularly during my fights in Congress, but it's only possible if thousands of patriotic Americans like you are willing to step up and help out.

**[They're not funded by billionaires and they don't take money from gun or ammunition manufacturers. They need you - and I hope you'll rush your support right now.](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfil24tlfvlr5rcqfs49l1qf1mkpu7t679r6e460_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj64o76c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your help, and let's keep fighting.

Sincerely,
Rep. Thomas Massie (KY-4) Co-Chair, 2nd Amendment Caucus
[DONATE >>](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zhv9l6digm1jckupfrg8gljup1hull56kuj8f8ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj64o76c1h2bs)
|
---
| | _Copyright(C) 2021 Crime Prevention Research Center, All Rights Reserved._
---
_Contributions are tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law._ **Our mailing address is:** P.O. Box 2293 Missoula, MT 59801
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, [please use this preferences page](http://e.conservativefwd.com/prefs/9z2z8p5jnbhq42mtcolg9t2546lvbaibic0la7vqc4o).
625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zquktb5694vuvn2g9ehfd5fgcinjska75h713s80_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5iecoj0spg649fg)

| | Derek, I just got some bad news.

**My team just told me that a group backed by the right-wing Concord Fund is launching a MILLION DOLLAR ad buy in Virginia targeting me in the final days of this election.**

Right-wing money is pouring into Virginia because this is 2021’s most important election. After Trumpism imploded in 2020, Donald Trump and extreme Republicans are desperate for a win.

We can win this, but only if I have your help. We have to raise enough money to drown out their attacks — if we don’t, their dangerous misinformation will spread to every corner of our Commonwealth.

Look, the latest Monmouth poll shows a 46–46 tie. That means every contribution we get between now and Election Day could be the difference between winning and losing in this race.

_**[I’m asking you right now: will you chip in to my campaign to help me stand up to right-wing extremists and stop Trumpism? It’s clearer than ever that Trump allies and far-right Republicans are laying the groundwork to flip states like Colorado in 2022’s midterm elections and elect right-wing Republicans up and down the ballot. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: Fake News Rallies against Pima Audit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Fight to audit Pima! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8fbf667c7f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Week in and week out I have written you and let you know when there is about to be a big breakthrough.

**_And one of the tell-tale signs is when the media starts attacking what we are doing! They hope that by drowning everyone in the noise, people won’t be able to hear the truth of the corruption around them._**

And that is exactly what is happening today...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fa154ccb73&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #1: The Media is telling everyone that Maricopa proved Biden one!**

This is absolutely fictitious. The Maricopa Audit proved that there were countless sources of fraud, any one of which would be sufficient to overcome Biden’s supposed margin of “victory!”

_Do not let the media get away with this. My campaign is fighting against Fake News disinformation _every day_!_

>From _Business Insider_ :

_Former President Donald Trump is once again pushing for a vote audit in Arizona, even after an earlier vote audit in Maricopa County proved that President Joe Biden won._

_This time, the former president has his sights set on Pima County, the state's second-most populous county after Maricopa._

_Trump baselessly alleged in a statement on October 15 that there were "staggering anomalies and fictitious votes in Pima County's mail-in returns." He also alleged without evidence that the ballot boxes in the county were stuffed "with more ballots than were ever sent."_

_"A new analysis of mail-in ballots in Pima County, Arizona, means the election was Rigged and Stolen from the Republican Party in 2020, and in particular, its Presidential Candidate," Trump's statement read. "Either a new election should immediately take place, or the past election should be decertified, and the Republican candidate declared a winner."_

Do you see this? The second that President Trump aligns with our campaign on pushing for an audit of Pima, the media begins the attack.

_And for the record, any media hack that claims that these accusations are baseless can meet me face to face and I’ll show them the evidence._

[**_Help me and President Trump fight back against these media attacks!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9a86023835&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4263f24030&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Media Lie #2: The cost of an audit outweighs its benefits**

This one is insidious.

**_The Media wants you to think there can be a price tag on Democracy. You and I both know that’s a bunch of B.S._**

If I would give my life for Democracy, tell me a price I wouldn’t pay. This is why I paid for the initial hearings on Election Integrity _OUT OF POCKET!_

So, the Fake News Media casts wild aspersions on our cause, claiming that it is a “frivolity.”

_Tucson Weekly_ reports:

_The entire recount was a mess and a circus. An expensive mess and circus. Despite a prior agreement to cover expenses, GOP state senators forced the Maricopa County and taxpayers to foot the bill for new voting machines following the audit under threat of the state government pulling hundreds of millions in revenue sharing funds._

_We should not let a similar costly frivolity occur here in Pima County._

_Sadly, the cancerous movement to hamper Arizona democracy is somehow still growing. Conspiracy-fueled advocates of “Stop the Steal” have yet to back down despite the fact that even the partisan-led, amateurishly handled Cyber Ninjas report demonstrated no evidence of widespread voter fraud. State Senate President Karen Fann can claim any nonsense she wants, but Arizona’s election was completely aboveboard._

Unbelievable. The recount was one of the most organized audits that we have seen this millennium. The only time there were problems was when the Democrats refused to comply with the audit!

**Secondarily, how can anyone ever put a price tag on Democracy? **

_You know the Democrats are scared of their fraud being uncovered when they literally claim that uncovering fraud is too expensive._

**I’ll tell you what is costly. Letting our democracy go down the tubes with our elections.**

**_It’s too damn costly, and there will be hell to pay if we do not push forward to Pima._**

I appreciate that you have read my letters to you. [And I also know that by now you know the drill.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ca29186c89&e=44b8c466b0)

**I push forward and identify where the fraud is, and then the media uproar attempts to drown out the investigation. That’s exactly what is happening now.**

_That tells you this is where the pain is. And I need your help to push through it. The Media attacks are a daily threat to Democracy if we do not have the capital to fight back against it to push forward with the Audit. [Can you help with a rush donation of $25, $50, $100, or $250 today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=72ca72500c&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=796820d133&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a6d35ed202&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=89d59f6573&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e3ec4ee84f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e3ec4ee84f).
---

| Friend,

We’re more than halfway through the month, but we’re still feeling the effects of Facebook’s outages.

Our finance team assessed that we lost roughly _**$8 per minute**_ while our ads were BLOCKED ahead of the mid-month fundraising deadline.

_If we can’t make up the remainder of this deficit, we’ll be pacing $8,935 behind our October budget._

clean_body: \-------------------------- | Friend, We’re more than halfway through the month, but we’re still feeling the effects of Facebook’s outages. Our finance team assessed that we lost roughly $8 per minute while our ads were BLOCKED ahead of the mid-month fundraising deadline. If we can’t make up the remainder of this deficit, we’ll be pacing $8,935 behind our October budget. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Mon, Oct 11, 2021 Subject: re: It cost us thousands To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I just stepped out of our campaign’s latest finance meeting, and I’ll be honest, I’m deeply concerned. You see, last week’s Facebook outage blocked our fundraising ads, and ultimately, cost us thousands of dollars in grassroots contributions. And after our team picked apart our budget to see where we could reallocate funds, there’s simply no other way to cut it -- we’re facing a $12,615 deficit to kick off the month. That’s why I’m reaching out to all of our top supporters, to ask if you can help us make up the difference so we don’t start October in the red. Thank you! \- Rebecca Sent from my iPhone Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b21295-7e1c41f5a1a2490da60c45a1d01a3954/87/221/1119b621-1718-4744-b19c-4217f8ee06a6)** [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJ1dGhmb3JoZWFsdGgub3JnLz9taWQ9NDQ0ODEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=1DVXXmeHayHQAno6bj9DnA) [**Dr. Vliet’s New Truth for Health Foundation Calls for Your Stories**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJ1dGhmb3JoZWFsdGgub3JnLz9taWQ9NDQ0ODEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qz285BefnlfDgJyELk-7WQ) Elizabeth Lee Vliet MD recently started the [Truth for Health Foundation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJ1dGhmb3JoZWFsdGgub3JnLz9taWQ9NDQ0ODEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=xXVa1vuOACLSLgzkxZYuwA) and has already taken on some of the most difficult medical tasks in the world today—rescuing COVID-19 patients from death at the hands of corrupt, misguided, or intimidated hospital doctors and administrators. **Truth for Health Foundation is asking people to send in their stories about loved ones or friends who died when denied treatment in hospital.** If you would like to be interviewed to tell your story, please include your contact information so our team can arrange a time to talk with you. If you would like us to post your story on our website, please give permission to do so, and indicate whether you want us to use the name of the hospital and your name, or post it anonymously. Send stories and contact info [Info@TruthForHealth.org](mailto:info@truthforhealth.org "info@truthforhealth.org"). You can also [watch a video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJpZ2h0ZW9uLmNvbS9lNGE3NDFkNS05ZTkyLTRkZTMtYTZkOS01Nzk0Mzc3Njc4NTM_bWlkPTQ0NDgxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Ph0WduM-gkkzwngQutHVjw) with Dr. Vliet. | |

[**The Noah Webster Education Foundation School Board Candidate Training**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLTA0MDNjLmdyOC5jb20vP21pZD00NDQ4MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=WbwNsJRy4QRCO6h349qWBw)
NWEF’s vision is, “To change education and culture through foundational principles and sound policy.”
Their mission is, “To educate and collaborate with individuals and organizations to tell the story of America’s education and culture, identify foundational principles that improve it, and advance practice and policy to change it.” NWEF has a [self-paced, online (and free!) training](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLTA0MDNjLmdyOC5jb20vP21pZD00NDQ4MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=B6UDireqvaMJY1xzVktlHg) specifically for those of you who want to run for the school board. The course, Introduction to School Boards, is taught by experienced school board members and educators from across the nation. It offers you critical information and principles of leadership that you'll need to succeed. With so many out of control school boards running our nation’s schools, we need patriots to step up and run. Be sure to [register for this training right away!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjk1LTdlMWM0MWY1YTFhMjQ5MGRhNjBjNDVhMWQwMWEzOTU0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLTA0MDNjLmdyOC5jb20vP21pZD00NDQ4MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=w3NYRuLAFknChl2_gCV32g)

Folks -- Steve is absolutely right. We know that Nevada is a Battleground State, but the latest polling shows just how competitive it is. **If the election were held today, this race would be too close to call.** If Republicans win back the governorship, there’s no telling which of Steve's accomplishments they’ll undo first -- voting rights, our public health option, environmental protections -- _everything is on the table._ It’s Steve hit it right on the nail: _“_ _I’m confident that the leadership in the Democratic party [will] pull it together and they will work to do what the party does: register voters, turn them out and get people elected.”_
**And that’s exactly what we need to do.**
We have to start preparing NOW to protect the progress we’ve made from right-wing organizations whose only goal is flipping Nevada from blue to red.
That means organizing, launching digital ads, reaching voters across the state, and strengthening Steve’s campaign with a group of committed grassroots donors.

clean_body: | | | | | Folks -- Steve is absolutely right. We know that Nevada is a Battleground State, but the latest polling shows just how competitive it is. If the election were held today, this race would be too close to call. If Republicans win back the governorship, there’s no telling which of Steve's accomplishments they’ll undo first -- voting rights, our public health option, environmental protections -- everything is on the table. It’s time for this team to do what we do best, which is come together and continue fighting for progress no matter what. | | | | | | | | | | | | | ** Steve hit it right on the nail: “ I’m confident that the leadership in the Democratic party [will] pull it together and they will work to do what the party does: register voters, turn them out and get people elected.” And that’s exactly what we need to do. We have to start preparing NOW to protect the progress we’ve made from right-wing organizations whose only goal is flipping Nevada from blue to red. That means organizing, launching digital ads, reaching voters across the state, and strengthening Steve’s campaign with a group of committed grassroots donors. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your help, Team Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Frustrating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Next November, we have a chance to elect a senator we can count on to fight for the people of Wisconsin. Or, we can re-elect Ron Johnson, and allow the corporate greed and partisan games to continue in Washington.

The stakes are too high for us to get this wrong. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign. But first, I want to explain why this request is so important -- especially right now. (**[If you don't have time to keep reading, you can chip in a few dollars by clicking right here to help us flip this U.S. Senate seat from red to blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833265/312807055/-1230885654?refcode=em21_211022_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx_alhighask&utm_campaign=em21_211022_EOM1_fndd_gq_act___SG_ettx_alhighask&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjA3MGU3OC03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4zMrG4BQJja8xHbtsUe4BCA9CTMmAvqOi5W6Woglg8=)**)

We’re facing our first end-of-month deadline of the quarter next week. We need to show that we have the resources to build the kind of campaign that can stand up to Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson’s dark money network -- or let them keep their grip on this Senate seat and possibly even take back the majority.

I’ve seen this happen far too many times in Wisconsin, and it’s why I have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. Instead, I’m relying on the support of folks like you to help build a winning campaign that will overcome the outside spending we’re going to see from the Republicans. They could have all the money in the world, but it’s the people who are going to decide this election.

That’s why I’m emailing you today to humbly ask for your support. The truth is, I’m frustrated by the influence of corporate interests in Washington, and I’ve had enough of self-serving politicians like Ron Johnson. We need someone who will put working families over outside interests and corporate donors, which is why I’m running for U.S. Senate -- and why I need you with me.

**[Can you add a contribution of $10 or more to support our campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin? I refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on a lot of people like you to help us take on Ron Johnson and flip this seat blue. clean_body: Next November, we have a chance to elect a senator we can count on to fight for the people of Wisconsin. Or, we can re-elect Ron Johnson, and allow the corporate greed and partisan games to continue in Washington. The stakes are too high for us to get this wrong. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign. But first, I want to explain why this request is so important -- especially right now. (=) We’re facing our first end-of-month deadline of the quarter next week. We need to show that we have the resources to build the kind of campaign that can stand up to Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson’s dark money network -- or let them keep their grip on this Senate seat and possibly even take back the majority. I’ve seen this happen far too many times in Wisconsin, and it’s why I have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I never will. Instead, I’m relying on the support of folks like you to help build a winning campaign that will overcome the outside spending we’re going to see from the Republicans. They could have all the money in the world, but it’s the people who are going to decide this election. That’s why I’m emailing you today to humbly ask for your support. The truth is, I’m frustrated by the influence of corporate interests in Washington, and I’ve had enough of self-serving politicians like Ron Johnson. We need someone who will put working families over outside interests and corporate donors, which is why I’m running for U.S. Senate -- and why I need you with me. = Thanks for reading all the way through, and thanks in advance for chipping in, especially during this difficult time. I’m so grateful that you’re a part of this team as we work to flip this seat for the people of Wisconsin. — Sarah Godlewski | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

|

| | Believe me when I say: I wish I didn’t have to ask you for money.

[**_But my race for Congress is going to be expensive -- and my opponent just unveiled his $417,000 fundraising haul. I know if I can fund a strong campaign then I can win this toss-up race and flip this seat for Democrats. I’ve set a goal to raise $8,500 today, so I’m humbly asking: Can I count on your $10 to help me get there? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833341/312807325/1129282168?refcode=20211022_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwMmZiYi03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbBCzogAh4fs9JevK8I8kaXyGy-IndyFXd80fTkEB3U=)

[**Here’s what you need to know about me:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833342/312807326/1129282168?refcode=20211022_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwMmZiYi03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbBCzogAh4fs9JevK8I8kaXyGy-IndyFXd80fTkEB3U=) I’m the son of union workers, a State Senator, a former science teacher, a husband, and a dad.

Growing up, my family lived in poverty.

We struggled to make it from paycheck to paycheck, but my parents never gave up.

I’ve dedicated my life to public service because I understand the struggles working families face.

And I know that we need more everyday people like me in Congress.

[**_But I don’t come from money and I can’t bankroll my own campaign. I’m depending on grassroots supporters like you to chip in so I can run a winning campaign and fight for our families in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833343/312807327/1129282168?refcode=20211022_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwMmZiYi03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbBCzogAh4fs9JevK8I8kaXyGy-IndyFXd80fTkEB3U=)

[**Here’s what you need to know about my race:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833344/312807328/1129282168?refcode=20211022_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwMmZiYi03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbBCzogAh4fs9JevK8I8kaXyGy-IndyFXd80fTkEB3U=) I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country.

This is one of just 9 districts that flipped blue for Joe Biden in 2020.

And my opponent, Republican Congressman Don Bacon, barely held on to his seat.

Through his votes, Bacon’s shown us exactly where he stands.

He voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations, instead of supporting working families.

And he voted against COVID relief when our country needed it most.

[**_I know we need new leadership and I know I can defeat him. But I also know I can’t do it alone. So I’m personally asking you to chip in your first $10 now >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833345/312807329/1129282168?refcode=20211022_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzkwMmZiYi03YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbBCzogAh4fs9JevK8I8kaXyGy-IndyFXd80fTkEB3U=)

But you shouldn’t have to be a billionaire to get elected and make your voice heard.

To reach critical voters, I have to run ads, rally volunteers, send mail, and more -- and I have to get to work now.

These tools come with a hefty price tag, but they’re critical to running a winning campaign. clean_body: We need more everyday people in Congress | | | Believe me when I say: I wish I didn’t have to ask you for money. = = I’m the son of union workers, a State Senator, a former science teacher, a husband, and a dad. Growing up, my family lived in poverty. We struggled to make it from paycheck to paycheck, but my parents never gave up. I’ve dedicated my life to public service because I understand the struggles working families face. And I know that we need more everyday people like me in Congress. = = I’m running in one of the most competitive races in the country. This is one of just 9 districts that flipped blue for Joe Biden in 2020. And my opponent, Republican Congressman Don Bacon, barely held on to his seat. Through his votes, Bacon’s shown us exactly where he stands. He voted to cut taxes for billionaires and corporations, instead of supporting working families. And he voted against COVID relief when our country needed it most. = = The truth is -- running for office is incredibly expensive. But you shouldn’t have to be a billionaire to get elected and make your voice heard. To reach critical voters, I have to run ads, rally volunteers, send mail, and more -- and I have to get to work now. These tools come with a hefty price tag, but they’re critical to running a winning campaign. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much, = = | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. clean_body: Hey friend, Well, if there were ever any doubts, Fox News made it official: The Republicans are already coming after Kirsten. She's being targeted by Fox News for telling the truth about the border (no surprise there). The border is a mess, and Washington has failed us. But Kirsten knows that walls don't work -- on several levels. We need modern solutions and principled leadership. And we need comprehensive immigration reform. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = This attack from Fox News is just the beginning. It's all-hands-on-deck time. I hope you're with us. Thanks, Chesney Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to call out the Biden Administration's flippant dismissal of the crises America is going through as a direct result of bad progressive policies. I also fact checked Biden's Energy Secretary for claiming America has "no moral authority" to criticize China's high carbon emission rates.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8X7V93a9upcK7I5Rdc0m-ghAqMFAxwprie-JEft-uOhE8N9DyslH0JeFYHj5IvJpgT-tRJQCgIrNzn4lI6hqg_ThPbRV2iraGtO5Gi0_qWMbFwoTN4AmcZg=&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8Yc3wIbYjWcJWmCY9kM3JnjiFo3RbQ-4ukBVq_vvlmIH9xGWWTg-Dyah5vX2PBxLofDj_N1_-dxtWSI_w3WY-rmRumjPoS5Icy7L2H__yO9L&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8Yc3wIbYjWcJPNWgsYQn7cnOgE_5H0j9s7_pfASwSBXrrs7269BpzJBS06_IvPACTgD29NP3Ep-Q8YXFd78XMwxsTAiQJl4HkW6Xg-uN-SUWqe_joTNO9oM=&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==).

| NO MORAL AUTHORITY?
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8W-IDiWSTJ3pXYvWcSvQeAe3yHgfIq5bnHiOClCrOjX4FJ84Pz5jSMKztv3gqEm3f47fjWYRCBantbQ84xfCYfJ4z1l84EB2Vo8GIWZ2OTBa-iNkWaesg_ajepHQdkPavsc4gB75i1Fae6wG4X3VKjEOb2vPsLqomJO6Dq6r0kDCdMw7if2ndw8=&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8W-IDiWSTJ3pXYvWcSvQeAe3yHgfIq5bnHiOClCrOjX4FJ84Pz5jSMKztv3gqEm3f47fjWYRCBantbQ84xfCYfJ4z1l84EB2Vo8GIWZ2OTBa-iNkWaesg_ajepHQdkPavsc4gB75i1Fae6wG4X3VKjEOb2vPsLqomJO6Dq6r0kDCdMw7if2ndw8=&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==)
Democrats can't seem to say a single bad thing about China.
The latest example: this week Biden's Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm said, "You know, we've got a global problem and China is a big contributor to that -- we are, too...we don't have much moral authority to say you should be doing this if we are not taking action and deploying the technology that we need to deploy."
Does America have the moral high ground against China? YES.
And here's why:
In 2019, China's carbon emissions exceeded those of the United States + all other developed nations.
China's total carbon emissions: 27%
United States: 11%
Since 2005, the U.S. has reduced its carbon emissions by 758,000,000 metric tons. No other country comes close to that number and it's an even larger reduction than the entire European Union combined.
What happened to China's carbon emissions during that same time period? Increased by 3 BILLION metric tons.
Americans absolutely have the moral authority to expect China to reduce its carbon emissions. More importantly - why is the Biden Administration defending a country that engages in modern day slavery?
Since Day One, the entire Biden agenda could be summed up as America Last, China First. Whether it's destroying our energy industry, crushing the American economy, or the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal - China wins and America loses.
I'm going on offense to tell Joe to stop his America Last, China First agenda. [Will you help me?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bGRUlK6C6MGuKdV5HGOihI6hLdIaS3D7VmBsHJ_bKlot0-gwI6mc8ZPQ0HgA4fy2_xK_J-pi5zlcL-7hLLNCoM5_v92kas1pFHaq0pBX2QWkl4q01evt6Wz_EO3SEHWBzQ6QDOesHwTqKgC0TKT4r1MPR78tD2I5e4QwDU-pjoUvgAVKRpwufYmvyYvQcsNchwYzx1tDWCdIUVbgE0HKrqGTuX1JFm_gi4tP3w7PGIghLYwPwci6n4YLPukCXfBnB5ppj0lgxpVxh7eM6GyJUtQKEHMxGsr1BhLF6odey0Fgu_-dpqK4dQkwjffNGKrjjSZCqvzKuGPg-FwMT2gJ3bTRff5-aN3b&c=HUTrVgc7llonzREs6sSUqXZrNiH5GEclynyd27Srun8f2PwAcHkt3w==&ch=5qj4ig9zxabX09egwag3_plE6OVIGSF8zwqWHrbCzIHeimIZhq9mmg==)

| THE PARTY OF "CARING"

| For the party of "caring," it doesn't seem like they "care" about a damn thing you care about.
Inflation? Eat less meat!
Supply chain? Elite problems!
Open border? Ignore it!
Gas prices? Good you deserve it!
Critical Race Theory? Right wing lie!
Bad policy has bad consequences. And the crises we're living through today are a direct result of a long string of bad progressive policies: lockdowns, paying people not to work, over-regulating trucking, unconstitutional COVID mandates, ceding our energy dominance to China and Russia. The list goes on and on.
Every Democrat in Congress that enabled this anti-American agenda needs to be held accountable and voted out of office in 2022. I'm working hard to do just that, but I need you in the fight.
Are you with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I continued to call out the Biden Administration's flippant dismissal of the crises America is going through as a direct result of bad progressive policies. I also fact checked Biden's Energy Secretary for claiming America has "no moral authority" to criticize China's high carbon emission rates. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | NO MORAL AUTHORITY? | == | == Democrats can't seem to say a single bad thing about China. The latest example: this week Biden's Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm said, "You know, we've got a global problem and China is a big contributor to that -- we are, too...we don't have much moral authority to say you should be doing this if we are not taking action and deploying the technology that we need to deploy." Does America have the moral high ground against China? YES. And here's why: In 2019, China's carbon emissions exceeded those of the United States + all other developed nations. China's total carbon emissions: 27% United States: 11% Since 2005, the U.S. has reduced its carbon emissions by 758,000,000 metric tons. No other country comes close to that number and it's an even larger reduction than the entire European Union combined. What happened to China's carbon emissions during that same time period? Increased by 3 BILLION metric tons. Americans absolutely have the moral authority to expect China to reduce its carbon emissions. More importantly - why is the Biden Administration defending a country that engages in modern day slavery? Since Day One, the entire Biden agenda could be summed up as America Last, China First. Whether it's destroying our energy industry, crushing the American economy, or the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal - China wins and America loses. I'm going on offense to tell Joe to stop his America Last, China First agenda. == | | | == | | | | | | | | THE PARTY OF "CARING" | == | For the party of "caring," it doesn't seem like they "care" about a damn thing you care about. Inflation? Eat less meat! Supply chain? Elite problems! Open border? Ignore it! Gas prices? Good you deserve it! Critical Race Theory? Right wing lie! Bad policy has bad consequences. And the crises we're living through today are a direct result of a long string of bad progressive policies: lockdowns, paying people not to work, over-regulating trucking, unconstitutional COVID mandates, ceding our energy dominance to China and Russia. The list goes on and on. Every Democrat in Congress that enabled this anti-American agenda needs to be held accountable and voted out of office in 2022. I'm working hard to do just that, but I need you in the fight. Are you with me? | | | == | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS SHELLENBERGER: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == THE DAILY SIGNAL: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | Thank you for fighting for our conservative values. Your support is extremely valuable and crucial for Republicans to take back the House and Senate in 2022. Dan Crenshaw is counting on you to help him restore America and teach our kids to to be grateful for our Founding, our Constitution, our Flag, and our People. If you would like to become a Sustaining Donor to Dan Crenshaw's messaging campaign for 2022, please ==. If you prefer to donate by check, please make your donation payable to Crenshaw for Congress, P.O. Box 430965, Houston, TX 77243. | | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833681/312809026/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWUwZDNkMi03ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJkMF67rIXztirDNPTKW87l4C6Z0RBfKKTuRAIHl1m0=&emci=82588915-7833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5ee0d3d2-7d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)

There is no shortage of bad votes from Mike Garcia. He consistently finds a way to vote against the people of this district -- our working families, our students, and our essential workers.

I know this district. I went to high school here and have raised my family here. I know what this district needs because it's the same things my family needs -- quality education, affordable medications, and so much more.

**Mike's votes have been in favor of his high-dollar donors instead of the people of this district.**

**[I want to hear from you, what's the worst vote you think Mike has taken?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833685/312809030/1481573840?refcode=em21_211022_votes-s3&source=em21_211022_votes-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWUwZDNkMi03ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJkMF67rIXztirDNPTKW87l4C6Z0RBfKKTuRAIHl1m0=&emci=82588915-7833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5ee0d3d2-7d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37833686/312809031/1481573840?refcode=em21_211022_votes-s3&source=em21_211022_votes-s3&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWUwZDNkMi03ZDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJkMF67rIXztirDNPTKW87l4C6Z0RBfKKTuRAIHl1m0=&emci=82588915-7833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=5ee0d3d2-7d33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=11385749)
Now, let's go send Mike packing.

\-- Christy

name: Laura Loomer
subject: He didn’t raise his hand . . .
body:
Over this past weekend, I attended my districts, Republican Lincoln Day Dinner. An event where hundreds of Republicans and elected officials gather each year – and this year, it was a BIG DEAL.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg)
Patriot,

Over this past weekend, I attended my districts, Republican Lincoln Day Dinner. An event where hundreds of Republicans and elected officials gather each year – and this year, it was a BIG DEAL.

Here’s why:

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg) **This was the first event where my opponent, Do-Nothing Dan Webster and I were in the same room together.**

I’ve been attending nearly every meeting that I can and have been greeted with smiles and encouragement every step of the way.

But the common theme of frustration I’m hearing is this:

“We’ve invited Webster [the incumbent congressman] to this event for YEARS and he NEVER shows up!”

>From TEA Party events, county GOP meetings and critical votes in Congress – like the second Impeachment of President Trump -- the story is the same, **Webster is ABSENT**.

But I wasn’t surprised I saw him at this event, because now that I’ve jumped into the race, Webster is scrambling to prove himself.

Webster has had no problem missing 15% of his votes in Congress this year alone, but he has recently found time to attend and host fundraisers.

When there’s a big check to grab, Webster is there.

But the other night at the Lincoln Day Dinner, Webster wasn’t collecting checks because he ended up standing out like a sore thumb when the keynote speaker asked a simple question:

He asked the room, “Raise your hand if you think the 2020 election was stolen.”

Everyone in the room raised their hands . . . **except Republican Congressman Dan Webster and his staffers who were sitting at his table**.

Democrats rewrote the rules around the nation under the guise of the pandemic to stuff ballot boxes in their favor last year.

**EVERYONE knows this.**

Absentee ballots were mailed to voters around the country – in many states they were sent without even a request by the voter!

Then Democrats sent out their operatives to chase down every ballot – **and several Democrat organizers were caught red handed getting paid for ballots!**

And Do-Nothing Dan saw nothing wrong with that?

Of course not!

Because he won his seat without real opposition.

But in this next election, he’s facing me, and I take Election Integrity as seriously as a heart attack.

We don’t need politicians in office who ignore our real problems just because they had no problems winning their elections.

We need fighters!

And I’m ready to fight for you.

If you haven’t already done so, [**make a quick donation to my campaign and help me hit my weekly fundraising goal**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg).

We have $4,200 left to raise by Sunday at midnight, so [**any amount you can give will help me get one step closer to my goal**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kB4efqKBf8921lt7cIW892toLg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: This week in the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
Here's what's on my mind | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/995a3fbd1a65/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-5298554?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=aade152457&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, We were thrilled to exceed our fundraising goals last quarter and emerge - once again - the frontrunner in the race to unseat Mike Lee in the 2022 Republican primary. I am proud of the strength of our campaign, with 1,000 unique donations and 89% of donations coming from inside of Utah. These are enormous numbers, and I am grateful for your support.
---
| [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=cc40b5156e&e=10c1db3257)
---
| We appreciate your financial support to provide better representation for Utahns like you - and every dollar matters! If you are able to give, please [donate here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5222ec2e7d&e=10c1db3257).
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=271c9da240&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE")
---
| We now have over 350 volunteers helping with everything from lawn sign distribution to research to signature gathering. I am humbled by the outpouring of support we are getting from across the state. This is what it takes to realize better leadership in the US Senate.
---
|
---
|
# **Signature Gathering**
---
|
---
|
---
| Our team is getting ready to gather signatures to guarantee my place on the Republican primary ballot, and I need your help! [Sign up to volunteer as a signature gatherer](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2d4ab56498&e=10c1db3257) and encourage your friends and family to sign up. Now I want to share a few stories that are on my mind.
---
|
---
|
# **Colin Powell**
---
|
---
| On Monday we lost Colin Powell, one of our greatest contemporary political figures. I had the immense honor of meeting Colin Powell and was astounded by his intelligence, aptitude, and most importantly, kindness. I was surprised when he spent the majority of the time speaking to and interacting with the children who were with us. He was a great man and a great leader who will be missed.
---
|
---
|
# **Aaron Lowe and Ty Jordan Tribue**
---
|
---
|
---
| John and I attended the Utah football game which featured a moving tribute to Ty Jordan, who was killed in 2020, and Aaron Lowe, who was killed only a few short weeks ago. At the start of the game, there was a 22-second moment of silence in honor of Ty Jordan’s jersey number and the jersey Aaron wore to honor him. Between the third and fourth quarter, the entire stadium remained in their seats to watch a video tribute from Kyle Whittingham. Whittingham encouraged fans to live and shine as Ty and Aaron did. It’s almost impossible to believe we’ve lost two bright, young lives in senseless tragedies so close together. Football means so much to me and my family. We’ve spent hours with young players just like Ty and Aaron. Our hearts break for their families, their team, and the entire Utah football community.
---
|
---
|
# Community Engagement
---
|
---
| One of the things I love most about public office is connecting with community members and organizations who care about coming together to solve issues. I believe the role of any elected official is to understand the opportunities and needs of their constituents. That’s why I love meeting with people around the state on my Yellow Couch Tour. I had the opportunity to visit with residents of Logan and West Valley City this week and hear about big issues, how people are engaging with their local governments and the leadership they hope to see from their federal representatives.
---
|
---
| The way we engage with each other matters, which is why I enjoyed talking with The Civility Initiative this week about the importance of civility and building consensus in leadership. The discussion is posted [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5db1c9b523&e=10c1db3257).
---
|
---
|
# Help For Refugees
---
|
---
| This week Utah welcomed 765 vetted refugees from Afghanistan. These refugees are being placed in hotels and other accommodations. [The Utah Muslim Civic League](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e30e10eb1c&e=10c1db3257) is urgently working to get these family halal meals and essential items. The UMCL needs donations and volunteers to deliver boxes. As winter approaches, let’s come together to help welcome and settle our new community members.
---
|
---
|
# Yellow Couch Tour Stops
---
|
---
|
---
| For the next Yellow Couch Tour stop, I will be at the Syracuse Northwest Library from 10:00 AM – 11:00 AM! Please invite any friends or family who may be interested. [https://www.eventbrite.com/e/yellow-couch-tour-clearfieldsyracuse-tickets-164453030441](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fbd17ba608&e=10c1db3257) Then I’ll be stopping in Pleasant Grove on October 28. Stay tuned for details!
---
|
---
|
# What's Ahead
---
|
---
| I am so proud of the work our campaign has done so far to reach communities around the state and talk about how better representation can help improve our communities. I’m particularly excited about what’s to come as we head into signature gathering, the convention, and the primary election! Thank you for being a part of this historic campaign.
---
|
---
|
# Contact Me
---
|
---
| I want to know the stories that are on your mind. I believe that the only way to truly represent you right is to know you first, so reach out! You can follow me on [Twitter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=9bad1e8aba&e=10c1db3257), [Facebook](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=5728476628&e=10c1db3257), and [Instagram](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=59c78c22ab&e=10c1db3257) where my DMs are always open, and you can email me becky@beckyforutah.com.

clean_body: Here's what's on my mind | | | | | | Dear Friends, We were thrilled to exceed our fundraising goals last quarter and emerge - once again - the frontrunner in the race to unseat Mike Lee in the 2022 Republican primary. I am proud of the strength of our campaign, with 1,000 unique donations and 89% of donations coming from inside of Utah. These are enormous numbers, and I am grateful for your support. | | We appreciate your financial support to provide better representation for Utahns like you - and every dollar matters! If you are able to give, please . | "DONATE" | We now have over 350 volunteers helping with everything from lawn sign distribution to research to signature gathering. I am humbled by the outpouring of support we are getting from across the state. This is what it takes to realize better leadership in the US Senate. | | Signature Gathering | | | Our team is getting ready to gather signatures to guarantee my place on the Republican primary ballot, and I need your help! and encourage your friends and family to sign up. Now I want to share a few stories that are on my mind. | | Colin Powell | | On Monday we lost Colin Powell, one of our greatest contemporary political figures. I had the immense honor of meeting Colin Powell and was astounded by his intelligence, aptitude, and most importantly, kindness. I was surprised when he spent the majority of the time speaking to and interacting with the children who were with us. He was a great man and a great leader who will be missed. | | Aaron Lowe and Ty Jordan Tribue | | | John and I attended the Utah football game which featured a moving tribute to Ty Jordan, who was killed in 2020, and Aaron Lowe, who was killed only a few short weeks ago. At the start of the game, there was a 22-second moment of silence in honor of Ty Jordan’s jersey number and the jersey Aaron wore to honor him. Between the third and fourth quarter, the entire stadium remained in their seats to watch a video tribute from Kyle Whittingham. Whittingham encouraged fans to live and shine as Ty and Aaron did. It’s almost impossible to believe we’ve lost two bright, young lives in senseless tragedies so close together. Football means so much to me and my family. We’ve spent hours with young players just like Ty and Aaron. Our hearts break for their families, their team, and the entire Utah football community. | | Community Engagement | | One of the things I love most about public office is connecting with community members and organizations who care about coming together to solve issues. name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c402%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SdE31hqRnmavjZW1Vov5nQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66208%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tZSkqZKHh7Fkdv5pF%2fv8Ew&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66209%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E70n2CH25MeD1%2byfqxJ5oQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66209%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E70n2CH25MeD1%2byfqxJ5oQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c402%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SdE31hqRnmavjZW1Vov5nQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c402%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=SdE31hqRnmavjZW1Vov5nQ&sysid=1)

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: End the filibuster. End the filibuster. End the filibuster. End the filibuster. End the filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We have so-called Democrats like Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema playing petty games with people's lives
#

This week, Senate Republicans blocked crucial legislation that would have expanded the right to vote in Pennsylvania and across the country.
The bill should have passed unanimously — but Republicans used the Jim Crow filibuster to stall critical progress yet again.
I don't know how many times I have to say it: Democrats must end the d*mn filibuster already.
But we have so-called Democrats like Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema playing petty games with people's lives, refusing to support getting rid of this archaic rule.
**It's clear we need new voices in the Senate. And I promise you, if I'm elected, I'll be a vote Democrats need to finally start getting things done for working folks.**
[So, I have to ask: Will you pitch in $3 to my campaign today to help me end the d*mn filibuster already? Our campaign is powered by lots of folks chipping in a few bucks at a time.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37834108/312810696/-360183459?refcode2=552d4417-8033-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211022-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJkNDQxNy04MDMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jvtPaavm-V6oVgFVnXrwOEiLlYB3Dq5BQT-CY1uvXBE=)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Help us fight socialism
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpbvu0urfcf6pggpktal600ioqot90mtabl4u5co_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj61oj4cth2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcsi5eq84uehgmn02b2i559msjra109icfvtlks8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj61oj4cth2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhedkpem1vkpq8n9f02evl56d2r7gpr7diru51k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjj61oj4cth2bs)
---

Larry P. Arnn

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

subject: weekly update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I just crunched the numbers, and we’re not quite where we need to be.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37834383/312811862/1089549382?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211022-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNjNjUwMy04MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGPPpeYPGNQ_L_l1PiLr4C6Uw0LbHPCwTWw5irQAYFQ=)
---
| Hi Peter,

I know we’re all eager to get offline for the weekend, so I’ll keep this quick: I just crunched the numbers, and we’re not quite where we need to be to hit our weekly fundraising goal. [_**Can you make sure we get back on track by chipping in any amount right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37834384/312811863/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211022-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNjNjUwMy04MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGPPpeYPGNQ_L_l1PiLr4C6Uw0LbHPCwTWw5irQAYFQ=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37834385/312811864/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211022-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNjNjUwMy04MjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGPPpeYPGNQ_L_l1PiLr4C6Uw0LbHPCwTWw5irQAYFQ=)
---
