name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: The Fake News is the Enemy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The press is intentionally lying |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bcd0b80f88&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Have you ever wondered why good leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis all hate the media so much?

Mostly, it's because the media lies. President Trump was right; they truly are the "enemy of the people"!

[_That's why real America First leaders like me have to ask for your help- we can't depend on free media. We have to pay to get the truth out!_](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c7924d1c95&e=afa21b7626)

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1a6ea30ee9&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- a Dem media darling!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b9894e4325&e=afa21b7626)
---
| It used to be that guys like Brian Williams and Dan Rather hid their bias. Now the media is coming on out and celebrating it!

_Reporters from several outlets supported calls to end "both-siderism" in media with even harsher treatment of Republicans after another columnist decried covering Democrats too critically.

Los Angeles Times columnist Jackie Calmes published an opinion piece titled "Why journalists are failing the public with ‘both-siderism’ in political coverage." Calmes, a New York Times reporter before joining the Los Angeles Times, called out "journalistic pressure" to produce seemingly balanced stories that prevents journalists from reporting what she referred to as "the new truth."

She targeted journalists who "focus critically on President Biden and Democrats" as opposed to "Republicans’ obstructions."

Calmes repeatedly criticized Republicans, warning that "democracy is literally at stake" surrounding the GOP’s recent election laws.

"This is a Republican Party that is not serious about governing or addressing the nation's actual problems, as opposed to faux ones like critical race theory," Calmes wrote._

_So, let me get this straight.... idiots like this actually think that, with total Democrat control over the Federal government, the disaster in Afghanistan, runaway inflation, open border humanitarian crisis, empty shelves, and COVID out of control... that it's the REPUBLICANS that need accountability???_

**These people are crazy, high on crack. Biden is a disaster, and they want to coddle him. **

This is why the media has next to no trust from the American people. They are living in an alternate universe. They are not truth-tellers; they are leftist activists.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d9b159206b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _The media is totally out of control. The only way to treat them is with utter contempt- to deny them funding and deny them interviews._

They wouldn't know the truth if it hit them over the head.

[I will go around them to get out the truth about our country.](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2ff2285482&e=afa21b7626) And here's the truth:

-My district is a tossup, trending red.
-I won more votes than any Republican Congressional candidate ever had here.
-Trump really won the 2020 election.
-Biden is destroying the country.
-[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8bb06e6641&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his media apologists. We can save this country together!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4aad268feb&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3737772b75&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e9ef965876&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8a4c279450&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a79a625052&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

| | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** --and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College--and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support --not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you--citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission--to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** --and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty--and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty--I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UWjIFo5fmpdegV2zYxeEJg&sysid=1)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

body:
I Would Really Appreciate It

|
* * *
---
Hi Friends,

It's Ted's wife, Amy Kate. I am reaching out to you today to ask if you have [**contributed**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJAi5ZEk1JnRIHX1n7FO4FBUD5-S2bjoRV74e4CEHBPdvUg_ZkNZO30sbaT2ZnZZUC27pQFpETg5qrGpPNwtxL2XZhaPQ0-AB7ApBovDAxG_rgXecghBF6WPvGK9gSfGiL5fmg-kBT_d6whdaNFAqZqrIaUk6WEC4t13tlzSb5SKO-1zUkb4iiMst6Vv994eol50LvXgz0hiAw1pXmAtM14HA%3D%3D) to my husband's campaign for US Senate from North Carolina. Ted is working so hard and would probably not like me sending you this, but he really needs your help.
| [**SUPPORT TED BUDD FOR SENATE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJAVW-cHlJiEy_LFXrHWO5xEuXnCTJy8FNhzv9fI78U_1_Uj_gEhNKqUyE5c7HmkaDdunxRsXzJWBCnTC4caAugo11adw8hFEEPoW_dRM_eBt8DX8Vn7ZeExwjtQjqiilA9nrtqAIMnnhmgMe56zF5GYfJUnwwb2ZXdu1DH2eNu29cHG7fdSECK3lTs6rR2oKN8mbMudwlgJ7CZhnQROCpfvA%3D%3D)
---

Ted is a man with strong values. He was born and raised in Davie County, North Carolina and works so hard every day to protect our freedoms and combat the Liberal agenda. He is strong in his convictions and would lead our state so well.

**Washington, D.C. is FULL of swampy career politicians who work only for selfish gain._But not Ted._** _He knows the concerns of voters, they do not want another Senator who is enthralled by partisan politics and only in office to serve themselves._

So, I am asking if you would take a minute of your time today to [**chip in to his Senate Campaign.**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJA7Wpi41jiYyjGsTbwQrvnYvtMJJbA_16AkP6L17rZJ2mjyzfDQVP7tBWiPzcnMk_ZAtG7M2Zo2dWmZ973eIA1cgBWVwZTTPCZ0WLolPdGDkFC4TKB9qt3GfwKqTO2UDFO4-kKA2jglPVoTDaztHLqUv0668vO5Cwbsb_diNoUQ7wpKGA8EYyNeepWAFnz2dVPj4_c8gDdjZE8k-emOpqKmg%3D%3D) He has to report strong numbers for this quarter, and he cannot do that without the help of people like you!
[**SUPPORT TED BUDD FOR SENATE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJABkp_PvBrH8gHUSRFbGB_if4VZ5o_lZAF4njdLywpQ1oH9OyPT1GNLTiuzs-grb2SS_siQSamq-_5cxAVGwNHwESgk9WnMtvdpAgFru1-31YIUT9pKDNtBrAkL-Nmi3Z-DrVW4GuhcWLNFNfo9gNtz-spSx2sBy8dr8lYF2k3rwLIu8V4d9sooWJlkt3jaM5TCO3DPPyylEUPZTxGCulzjg%3D%3D)
---

He will continue to fight to crush the Radical Left's woke agenda, and bring Davie County values to D.C. That's just what the Senate needs.
**_DONATE TODAY!_** [**SUPPORT TED BUDD FOR SENATE**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJAmJgd-lcksGbVdYWf6DV_yYEArbTRb68MlOMZc3SpQvTmOoDVv8sQDIrlMZHT2yYcas64A4kxGOcb_tHHmr6d63ykxtZZaqGUOrt6h6IBRUE5JADoXvYHHMNOLWIIgF1MFoSo_BVzcTJgeC0qyhvJJDVx-gqI2qQW5OxAh2WMs0MK9CXhtM_TMOLdwaDVfU9-teQKA9m-1cxtBPX5WNfOTQ%3D%3D)
---

God Bless,

Amy Kate Budd

[](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=f80f59dd381d487b864442dceabb7596&_e=0Nzbv4N1NYChqOAZy-xdZFjddNTYgIB6VpQNoVfl0hxm3wn68rElaqv33-52ifRZ6pkUptI2j6iXRnON7kl-YuQt-cx_7540EiDuIJQlmrahjjG5BjOD5PsxHIBvrVn5VQCBA5mZB2fKkMLH0P8TpcyfmlPI9PaLKAko6bfcuznFT23awHMSVOqQKr9H3F_4P_S4gNhihPwZoGmagoHit9vSB1CYrvVAdPYANo0X_WqtUsV5MDLxYyT5MCbzvXJAor_g_GP7luy8Fjk1BztyKvhj243El9Qx7remr8kHiOB21f-1l9ksIosyVDN4bZZ7eEFe2GYnPE4OP7v_ykJA7hF5lZLwmpVNuyCWXZnpzEjOXKB5QZA-hoA2a1HZY6GLKpBFdzXtPuhuCvGrWvH0OQ1agrk4DLG5f0JbZ_LTv_THfNZt5-xxzwq54S687--dOJoIXsOH0hGLMM6xP9CF7w%3D%3D)

He was born and raised in Davie County, North Carolina and works so hard every day to protect our freedoms and combat the Liberal agenda. He is strong in his convictions and would lead our state so well. Washington, D.C. is FULL of swampy career politicians who work only for selfish gain.But not Ted. He knows the concerns of voters, they do not want another Senator who is enthralled by partisan politics and only in office to serve themselves. So, I am asking if you would take a minute of your time today to He has to report strong numbers for this quarter, and he cannot do that without the help of people like you! He will continue to fight to crush the Radical Left's woke agenda, and bring Davie County values to D.C. That's just what the Senate needs. DONATE TODAY! God Bless, Amy Kate Budd Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: ICYMI: It’s Strike-tober

body:
Workers are people, not machines. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835243/312815941/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=&emci=e96c437f-7b33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a8c0c07e-8533-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)
---
| | What exactly is Strike-tober, Peter?

This month, over 100,000 Americans have authorized their unions to go on strike. Today, I’m standing in solidarity with workers. **[Join me — stand with workers and add your name telling Congress to pass the PRO Act to strengthen protections for workers and their unions >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835244/312815943/382191674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=&emci=e96c437f-7b33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a8c0c07e-8533-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)**

Here’s just a glimpse at the important events going on across the country right now:
* **\- John Deere:** Thousands of UAW workers at John Deere went on strike when the company offered them a contract with minimal raises — after its most profitable year on record and the CEO got a 160% raise.
*
* **\- HelloFresh:** HelloFresh workers — some right here in Colorado — are voting to potentially unionize. The company doubled its revenue last year, yet workers are still struggling to afford rent and are even given timed bathroom breaks.
*
* **\- Kaiser Permanente:** Over 24,000 nurses and health care workers at this giant health care consortium are striking to protest a new two-tier wage system.

I could keep going, but I think I’ve made my point. **Workers are humans, not machines.**

During my residency, I was a representative with SEIU. Thanks to our union, we were able to demand better health care benefits for residents and better conditions for our patients.

Organizing is critical for workers to demand their rights. The Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act will empower workers everywhere to unionize and stand up for fair wages, contracts, and all the benefits they deserve.

**[I need 500 supporters to join me and demand Congress pass the PRO Act >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835245/312815944/382191674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=&emci=e96c437f-7b33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a8c0c07e-8533-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835246/312815945/382191674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=&emci=e96c437f-7b33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a8c0c07e-8533-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****
---
In solidarity,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo
| **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. She’s running to represent Colorado’s new Congressional district in Congress and to be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

In the state legislature, Dr. Caraveo has a strong record for delivering real results for Colorado families — and she has proven she isn’t afraid to go toe-to-toe with special interests. She’s ready to take on tough fights in Congress. But she can’t do it alone. **[Will you pitch in $5, $10, or $50 to join our historic campaign? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835247/312815946/1424041718?refcode=em_footer_copy_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=)** | **[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835249/312815948/1424041718?refcode=em_footer_copy_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGMwYzA3ZS04NTMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Je_om_tDnLAWg2H5_VKXxOo1TSCYy_oh7qhgth-LYZA=)**

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD b
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ga4pir0c6ql9ot86tlpgrfb6g4vgacpkmv67rg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4p5gspq7cs9jegomddbkepp72o32c8qn2p5gc4oj9o33c2on8oj0m1ir0phnm3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eaq6ccln6mo6fdj3coo71cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpgm9ob0c1j6coh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85cj03bkbi9opst4s5oa0qi8p5abhtrfsrcjp5o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjgm0o36cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6bpgfdv1gfgqedkjtmb8kvoej4hpftdh54ko2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjgm0o36cph2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpb4fmc0uu3rcp4libu73j12ujnsa4b7tso49ucg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cjgm0o36cph2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8975%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KVnLkFj3AlCfXFBuRSgcgg&sysid=1)

Friend,

**[11 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA’S MODERN HISTORY.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VJbNR3LgJBK%2fXeU11yETyw&sysid=1)**

In 11 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 11 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you’ve never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 11 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn’t just a nickname -- **it’s a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 11 days:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16883%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vjv4nQDdD0cOVUVeBz0Sog&sysid=1)**
**[11 DAYS LEFT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16884%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q4J2YZz7r3bh%2fug%2bucPCpA&sysid=1) ** **SO MUCH IS ON THE LINE** | | [**$25 = $125 TO TAKE OUT TERRY**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t1FM3DTGa%2bL346vUmUEDZA&sysid=1)
---
**[This is a time for choosing: Virginians must make a critical choice for the future of our Commonwealth and for America.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G72uJa%2fnKCGPB3PM2zssIQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for everything,

Team Youngkin

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare. This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43cfd711dc8f41c092ed1260379f39d7&_e=y7g5S7qZ2Bu4H-RdnoPL6sXzQXcMju94BeThXjcQAriHsD2pLqx0YXnjm-NXFXf5IVALV_HSeIcMm7Ed83ukGbk5RiEqoJzuRCj5rR5_hAiH9o2i3r8CXaS31Xb6d73Mx-24TCOrqOQmYEDKsEUwNHW7GNQrm2qEQBTFF-cU1C-tek1veu8Gmmlv2hABSPDAEVpFBIzNPbLT9Ti9RtrR7MwYshS8v6P6e9qCo-haBhP0ij7NTAITqmrOtRzWdtARKTWc-7-i6QeG_mcnVBoofLpTi0SpfGER7XLjpubyUccl9HxhZlX0bRittfX6DJRj5MdKXV81BhEJcQoEAeMwCDKSeC0wfCXZIl60gRGo9P0uBld8JIZ0AtLWNuAEbaM1HSVsPIt7mJMfGScy7dNaTVCix5bayGGaHMXQH9jo5V8aHW3uqbTBGcAxNTI_ZpJCuaDm58aHt0aNIG59z625vtCyrUfOTh98my4zFsbCdboim7oyDt74hy7eryAtnYBG)
---
Fellow Conservative,

body:
[1]Charles Booker

$0.05, Peter.

That’s how much it costs for our campaign to reach out to 1 voter in
Kentucky.

As the Organizing Director for this campaign, this number has been on the
top of my mind. Early and sustained voter outreach is going to be critical
so we can turnout newly engaged voters, raise up our voices this election,
and end Rand Paul’s dangerous and irresponsible lies.

So today I’m reaching out with an important request:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11735?refcode=em20211022-1088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1088%2E346206%2EZnaO4y ]Peter, can
you be a sponsor of Jefferson County?

We’ve got about 632781 registered voters there. And at a cost of
roughly $0.05 per voter, we’ll need to raise about $31,639 to
cover our budget and reach every voter in Jefferson County.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11735?refcode=em20211022-1088&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1088%2E346206%2EZnaO4y ]Contribute $5

For too long, there’s been this myth that Kentucky is a red state. But
it’s not. It’s an unorganized, disenfranchised, and exploited state.

It’s one of the only states in the country with Republican senators and a
Democratic governor. Where the number of people who don’t vote outnumber
those who do. And when you look at recent political trends all the numbers
show that the tides are turning: we have a real chance to elect bold
progressive leadership in Kentucky and make history this election.

Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: David Axelrod warns Democrats: Pay Attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, President Barack Obama's top strategist David Axelrod has a message for Democrats: **“If you're not worried about our democracy, you're not paying attention.” - David Axelrod** CNN reports that the latest poll out of Iowa “should terrify Democrats.” Joe Biden's approval ratings in the early-voting state sank last month to a jaw-dropping 31%. The truth is, Donald Trump failed Iowa by prolonging and inflaming the COVID-19 pandemic, driving the economy into full-blown recession, and sowing deep wholesale disillusionment with reality. Yet thousands of Iowans are unable to comprehend the depth of the Trump administration's failure to govern. David Axelrod reminds us that ignoring the problem is no solution. Right now, Team Trump is firing on all cylinders to boost Trump's hand-picked 2022 House and Senate mouthpieces. Yet POLITICO reports that Democrats have “lost our fundraising advantage” to the GOP's “army of energized small-dollar donors.” That's not news to us. We've been working overtime to protect and empower strong progressives like Val Demings, who's fighting to oust failed Florida Senator Marco Rubio, and protect our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. But we've seen a serious drop-off in our fundraising numbers lately. Now we've got to raise $3,927 by the end of next week or else we won't be able to protect Demings or any Democrat from Team Trump's invective. When we last asked for volunteers to protect Val Demings and Raphael Warnock, YOU were the one who raised your hand. Well, we need that energy one more time, Peter. Can we count on your immediate support? **[Do not hesitate on this, Peter: Please rush in $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can right now. If we don't raise $3,927 by the end of next week to protect progressive champions Val Demings and Raphael Warnock right now, Team Trump's operatives will descend on Florida and Georgia without delay. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, President Barack Obama's top strategist David Axelrod has a message for Democrats: “If you're not worried about our democracy, you're not paying attention.” - David Axelrod CNN reports that the latest poll out of Iowa “should terrify Democrats.” Joe Biden's approval ratings in the early-voting state sank last month to a jaw-dropping 31%. The truth is, Donald Trump failed Iowa by prolonging and inflaming the COVID-19 pandemic, driving the economy into full-blown recession, and sowing deep wholesale disillusionment with reality. Yet thousands of Iowans are unable to comprehend the depth of the Trump administration's failure to govern. David Axelrod reminds us that ignoring the problem is no solution. Right now, Team Trump is firing on all cylinders to boost Trump's hand-picked 2022 House and Senate mouthpieces. Yet POLITICO reports that Democrats have “lost our fundraising advantage” to the GOP's “army of energized small-dollar donors.” That's not news to us. We've been working overtime to protect and empower strong progressives like Val Demings, who's fighting to oust failed Florida Senator Marco Rubio, and protect our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. But we've seen a serious drop-off in our fundraising numbers lately. Now we've got to raise $3,927 by the end of next week or else we won't be able to protect Demings or any Democrat from Team Trump's invective. When we last asked for volunteers to protect Val Demings and Raphael Warnock, YOU were the one who raised your hand. Well, we need that energy one more time, Peter. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Peter, should Congress codify Roe v. Wade into law?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
The Supreme Court declined to halt Texas' abortion ban...
| | |
---
Peter – this is big: After intervention from the Biden administration's Justice Department, the Supreme Court has agreed to hear arguments on overturning Texas' extremist abortion ban. **However, the Court declined to halt Texas' abortion ban in the meantime, leaving in place the most restrictive abortion law in the country and continuing to endanger the lives of Americans in our second-largest state.**
I'm hoping and praying that the Court makes the right decision here. But you know as well as I do the reality of how this conservative majority – which my opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) was instrumental in cementing – might rule. As we've seen with how things have played out in Texas, we cannot rely on the courts to protect our right to choose.
We need to guarantee every American's reproductive rights in a way that isn't dependent on the whims of controversially appointed Justices – and the only way to do that is through codifying Roe v. Wade into law. **But that's only going to happen if grassroots activists like you make your voices heard.**
**So ahead of the Supreme Court's imminent decision, I need 1,500 members of this team to speak out and put grassroots pressure on Congress. [We only have until 11:59 p.m. to gather responses, so please submit your answer to our live survey right now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835758/312817488/-1798260800?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk352-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzFkZmI0YS04ODMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zq5yym0o4sK37NGaw2rfbC5D9OJmOMI47TQuiYpgd2c=&emci=c608f4a1-7533-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=971dfb4a-8833-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334)**

Do you AGREE with this?!

Authorized by Republican Headquarters _Are you following the news, Peter?_ Joe Biden was asked on live television if he supports vaccine mandates -- and if he supports **FIRING** first responders who decline to get vaccinated. His answer? “Yes and yes.” He didn’t even hesitate. **DON’T FORGET:** Joe Biden wants to force every company with more than 100 employees to **_REQUIRE vaccines_** or fire workers. This is Joe Biden’s idea of “building back better,” Peter. _Do you support this policy? Or do you agree with the courageous workers who are standing up for freedom? We need to know right away._ | | **Do you support Joe Biden’s “Vaccine Mandate?”**

Joe Biden was asked on live television if he supports vaccine mandates -- and if he supports FIRING first responders who decline to get vaccinated. His answer? “Yes and yes.” He didn’t even hesitate. DON’T FORGET: Joe Biden wants to force every company with more than 100 employees to REQUIRE vaccines or fire workers. This is Joe Biden’s idea of “building back better,” Peter. Do you support this policy? Or do you agree with the courageous workers who are standing up for freedom? We need to know right away. | | Do you support Joe Biden’s “Vaccine Mandate?” | | | | Thank you for responding quickly. Republican Polling Alerts Sent via The Missouri Republican Party

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: Fight back against Manchin's misinformation campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
No matter what, we need to make sure $150 billion goes toward decarbonization.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/150b_no_clean_energy_cuts/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&t=3&akid=12891%2E53494%2EBXFTsu) Friend, The Clean Energy Performance Plan (CEPP) is the single most effective way to reach Biden's critical goal of 100% clean electricity by 2035. Full stop. Joe Manchin doesn't think the CEPP is necessary. He's flat out wrong. Full stop. And though Manchin is determined to get his way, reducing carbon pollution—through the CEPP or otherwise—is popular, urgent, and non-negotiable. Full. Stop. Cutting climate investments from this reconciliation bill is not an option. So if Manchin won't support the CEPP, our senators and representatives need to make sure those funds ($150 billion) are used for another decarbonization investment that meets Biden's climate goals. President Biden called for the exact same commitment from Congress at his town hall last night. Now, we need you to call on Congress, too. [**_Please, to fight back against Joe Manchin's misinformation campaign, will you call your members of Congress and demand the Build Back Better Act include $150 billion in bold decarbonization investments? We can't afford anything less._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/150b_no_clean_energy_cuts/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&t=4&akid=12891%2E53494%2EBXFTsu) | [MAKE THE CALL](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/150b_no_clean_energy_cuts/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&t=5&akid=12891%2E53494%2EBXFTsu)
---
Voters elected Biden, held the House, and flipped the Senate so that Democrats would deliver on their bold climate commitments, including Biden's commitment of 100% clean electricity by 2035. The $150 billion Clean Electricity Performance Program is the single most effective way to reach this goal.
If there are other ways to achieve the same result of reducing carbon pollution in the electric sector while delivering jobs and justice, that would be worth exploring. But we cannot cut a dime of the decarbonization investments if we want to get the job done.
Now, we need to make sure our representatives know that we're expecting them to hold the line and fight for the investments it'll take to reduce carbon pollution.
[**_Call your members of Congress today and tell them that cutting investments in clean energy is a non-starter. Biden promised $150 billion, and he reaffirmed it at last night's town hall. (We've included a short script to make it this super easy and quick for you!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/150b_no_clean_energy_cuts/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&t=6&akid=12891%2E53494%2EBXFTsu)
No climate, no deal,
Sam Ricketts
Co-Director, Evergreen Action
[CALL NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/150b_no_clean_energy_cuts/?utm_source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&source=ema_2021-10-22_150b_for_clean_energy_&t=7&akid=12891%2E53494%2EBXFTsu)
---

clean_body: Congratulations! | Peter, Right now, I have a beautiful list on my desk of the Top Republicans in Englewood, FL, and your name is at the very top! That’s why I’m excited to offer you the exclusive opportunity to be a part of the Chairman’s Club \-- a small group of elite supporters that forms the core of my Grassroots Team. I’m holding your spot on this list until 11:59 PM TONIGHT, but then I’m going to need to move on to the next person on my list.I hope you’ll accept. | | | | | | Thank you. And congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Eric Gash
subject: Will you read this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793
body:
Here’s how I’ll fight for you in Congress:

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835991/312818525/1639334829?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM0OThhNy04YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-o9T2UPpc-Ofwk6qof-AwAAJji7-w-E2zsDcoJl_iE=)
---
We often harp on our opponent Madison Cawthorn’s lackluster record -- _and for good reason_ \-- **but this campaign is about what we’re fighting _for_. **

**[I have to ask you: Can you please read my entire platform and then pitch in $3 if our people-driven message resonates with you? I’m counting on 850 Democrats to support this campaign by midnight »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835992/312818526/1982424563?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20211022_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM0OThhNy04YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-o9T2UPpc-Ofwk6qof-AwAAJji7-w-E2zsDcoJl_iE=)** | [Can you read the platform below and consider chipping in $3 to support our Democratic campaign? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835993/312818527/1982424563?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20211022_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM0OThhNy04YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-o9T2UPpc-Ofwk6qof-AwAAJji7-w-E2zsDcoJl_iE=)
---
_Here’s how I’ll fight for you in Congress:_
* **Affordable Health Care For All:** No one should ever have to sacrifice healthcare to pay the bills. We need to protect the Affordable Care Act and make Medicare eligible for more Americans.

* **An Economy That Works For The Working Class:** Far too many Western North Carolinians are afflicted with skyrocketing prices and stagnating wages. We need to make sure our district is business friendly without leaving working-class families behind.

* **Much-Needed Immigration Reform:** We must cut through the bureaucratic red tape and bigotry, and create an immigration system that will serve our national and economic interests.

* **Robust Voting Rights for All Americans:** As an African-American, I’m well aware without the sweat and tears of Americans before me, I would not have equal access to the ballot box. As Republicans pass laws designed to suppress our vote, we need to continue the fight for free and equal access to our Democracy.

---
I know together our grassroots movement can beat Cawthorn’s cynical agenda -- _I know we have a fighting shot at implementing our people-driven policies_ \-- but I can’t do it without your help.

**[So please, if you support our platform, can you pitch in $3 to get us one step closer to defeating Madison Cawthorn? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37835994/312818528/1982424563?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20211022_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjM0OThhNy04YjMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-o9T2UPpc-Ofwk6qof-AwAAJji7-w-E2zsDcoJl_iE=)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here’s how I’ll fight for you in Congress: | = We often harp on our opponent Madison Cawthorn’s lackluster record -- and for good reason \-- but this campaign is about what we’re fighting for. = | = Here’s how I’ll fight for you in Congress: Affordable Health Care For All: No one should ever have to sacrifice healthcare to pay the bills. We need to protect the Affordable Care Act and make Medicare eligible for more Americans. An Economy That Works For The Working Class: Far too many Western North Carolinians are afflicted with skyrocketing prices and stagnating wages. We need to make sure our district is business friendly without leaving working-class families behind. Much-Needed Immigration Reform: We must cut through the bureaucratic red tape and bigotry, and create an immigration system that will serve our national and economic interests. Robust Voting Rights for All Americans: As an African-American, I’m well aware without the sweat and tears of Americans before me, I would not have equal access to the ballot box. As Republicans pass laws designed to suppress our vote, we need to continue the fight for free and equal access to our Democracy. I know together our grassroots movement can beat Cawthorn’s cynical agenda -- I know we have a fighting shot at implementing our people-driven policies \-- but I can’t do it without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Eric Gash | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. Madison Cawthorn. Cawthorn is an utter failure for the working families he represents, and is more focused on serving himself and the MAGA base than the good people of this district. Eric Gash is the leader we need to restore integrity to this seat. Please, consider making a =. Next Wednesday, Conor will join Rep. Hakeem Jeffries -- chairman of the House Democratic Caucus -- and former Attorney General of the United States Eric Holder Jr. for a _very_ special event in support of **Judge Timika Lane for Pennsylvania Superior Court.**

Judge Lane has already been endorsed by numerous labor groups, advocacy groups, and current and former elected officials, and has received a recommendation for the Superior Court from the Pennsylvania Bar Association. Without a doubt, Pennsylvanians across the state stand to benefit with her presence on the Superior Court.

clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie Britt Launches New Website Agriculture is the biggest industry in Alabama, impacting over 20% of the jobs in our state and generating $70 billion annually. Unfortunately, family farms are under attack – both from within our very own country and from China. I cannot emphasize this enough: I will always stand with our hardworking farmers, cattlemen and everyone in the forestry sector as the next senator for Alabama.. That’s why I’m launching a new site: Farmers for Katie Britt. I was proud to receive the Alabama Farmers Federation's FarmPAC endorsement - but I’m not stopping there. To continue fighting back, I need the help and support of my grassroots team. Visit the new site and join our team here: Britt Dominates Fundraising in Alabama Senate Race Our message is resonating strongly with hardworking families in every corner of our state. Grateful & excited that so many Alabamians are jumping on board our campaign to save the America we know & love! Katie Britt On Being Pro-LifeKatie Britt A Pro-Life Candidate** I’m proud to be unapologetically pro-life — and when I say that, I don’t just mean pro-birth. In the Senate, I’ll be a tireless voice for ensuring every child in our state is given the opportunity to live the American Dream. - US Senate candidate Katie Britt visits Marshall County We enjoyed our visit to Marshall County recently! Thanks to for the opportunity to share our message. I’m always happy to discuss the challenges and opportunities facing our state and nation. We have been working tirelessly since June, traveling to every corner of Alabama. The reception has been incredible, as people continue to jump on board this grassroots movement at record rates. I look forward to continuing to share our message on the trail every day and showing Alabamians that I’ll be the most effective fighter for our Christian conservative values in the Senate. Peter, **Katie Britt understands Alabama. ** She’s a _lifelong_ Alabamian who sees the impact of the more than **43,000 farms** in our state. As your next Senator from Alabama, **Katie will work**** _with_****farmers** to allow**Alabama’s most extensive industry** to grow and innovate. ** ** That’s why she’s launching her new initiative: Farmers for Katie Britt.****[**Check out the new site here >>>**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=54b27304900f4379afb95de61cbd8c91&_e=d130TS3SmiCGAxwTUHYr6MhsP6Lmg5psUJtz92H8eiHyvEIbxBV8G3OdClYe1Kh7G7Osh0lvvn_LU9FGBI2NuT32__pUxafa0OiM90QQ4WAyTHFyeZR1LfLQP7maXsUYcEVmugUOhJAHDtphyh3zsDWym7TmqI4rzJfnJ8OmgJIsYC2kXOVrzk5SvF8pzQWBpRxtJh5RXfXRhOb4WlDW9i3WsyJV1sXhX2FW0iie7ACJp5HojW7QsXnD--RAVsoRGdFVcux56lLu2NvrUQhX0wu5W3BVGVK7WTFvK-x6ysucIvSumkL2xiAJri_SiN9SAwNZI3xCRoIROgZK5_Omd9AWzPOLZz4VJQkZUmwgCGVwNf_lwKxpLrWaAzH_2qKSaE0SNTo6y5vi3co3d8O9bCGwClUKrIC-H6LFlVVG4z0%3D) **

clean_body: Peter, Katie Britt understands Alabama. She’s a lifelong Alabamian who sees the impact of the more than 43,000 farms in our state. As your next Senator from Alabama, Katie will work withfarmers to allowAlabama’s most extensive industry to grow and innovate. That’s why she’s launching her new initiative: Farmers for Katie Britt.** Alabama’s farmers and agriculture rely on support from our elected officials. It’s because of decades of public support that agriculture has evolved. Our farmers now produce 262% more food with 2% fewer inputs compared to 1950. Meanwhile, Katie’s loudest opponent is on a vitriolic campaign** againstour farmers. You can read about and listen to his attacks on our site We MUST outgrow his campaign if we are to protect Alabama’s most vital industry. Can we count on YOU to keep our momentum up? Thank you for the support, Sean Ross Katie Britt for Senate Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

clean_body: Folks, Matt Rosendale claims to be a supporter of law enforcement, but he just voted against enforcing the subpoena against Steve Bannon to testify i | | | Folks, Matt Rosendale claims to be a supporter of law enforcement, but he just voted against enforcing the subpoena against Steve Bannon to testify in front of the January 6th Congressional Committee. The bipartisan vote to hold Steve Bannon in contempt of Congress illustrates that this is an American issue, not a partisan one. It’s sad that Matt Rosendale doesn’t recognize that no one is above the law, and it’s disgraceful that he's unwilling to stand up for law enforcement. These same officers saved his ass that day, yet Rosendale joined only 13 other extreme members of the House in refusing to honor them. Rosendale is a ring-leader among the most extreme members of Congress, siding with extremism over the American people and the U.S. Constitution time and time again. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Rosendale voted against honoring the brave officers who protected the Capitol and kept HIM safe during the Insurrection. He voted against the creation of the Committee to investigate what happened that day. And now he’s voted against compelling Steve Bannon -- a major organizer of the January 6th Stop the Steal Rally -- to come before Congress. Thank you so much, Ballard HQ Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-01 in Washington D.C. **** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

body:

| | | **BREAKING: "Trump Announces 'TRUTH Social', New Social Network to 'Stand Up to Tyranny of Big Tech'" -_Newsweek_**
It's official, Peter. Trump is BACK on social! After the Fake News mob canceled Trump and banned him, he announced that he created his own social media platform - _that 's even better!_
**It 's your turn to act - you have TEN MINUTES to let House Conservatives know you're joining Trump on his NEW social media platform!** **[STAND WITH TRUMP!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58594008:6owtp72eN:m:1:3298722022:CE11BC489CFAB368B678C9405A124B38:r "STAND WITH
TRUMP!")**
If you're one of the first people to join him, he'll know you still stand with him. Don't abandon Trump after all he's done for us!

Thank you,

Trump Updates (Via House Republicans)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: The Supreme Court just announced it’s taking up Texas’s dangerous abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37836364/312820179/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmIyMGI5ZS04YzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIbjVtbGJhS9Tt5NRBx3yjj_1Ifso3QcJGwxrS9Y0ZU=)
Friend, Two months after the Supreme Court allowed Texas’s dangerous abortion ban to go into effect, the justices announced today they will hear arguments on the law November 1. Texas’s law prohibits abortions after six weeks before most people even know they’re pregnant. The near complete ban resulted in an influx of people coming to Colorado for their abortion care. We are becoming a place of refuge, but Texas’s draconian attack on abortion rights has opened the floodgates nationwide. Women in Texas and across the country are fighting for reproductive freedom. While the Supreme Court prepares to hear this new case, they should block enforcement of these extreme laws. **That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to my petition calling on the Supreme Court to block the Texas anti-abortion law. They cannot wait as far-right state legislatures attack women’s reproductive rights.** | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37836366/312820181/-841784866?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20211022_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmIyMGI5ZS04YzMzLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIbjVtbGJhS9Tt5NRBx3yjj_1Ifso3QcJGwxrS9Y0ZU=&emci=ab193e1f-7433-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=96b20b9e-8c33-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1295540)**
---
This is part of an ongoing, aggressive, and coordinated attack on reproductive freedom — and that’s why it’s so important we hold onto our Senate majority and expand it in 2022.
A Republican Senate led by Mitch McConnell would continue trying to gut abortion rights and rush to fill our courts with anti-choice judges.
Thanks for making your voice heard on this important issue. Glad to have you on the team and to fight alongside you.
— Michael
---

Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: American Update
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8970%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3fftFKMWHRVNNL52d9l47A&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16898%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pDPDXmE7m1Mt8JyHUIyA9g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16899%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NxXkMJ9phu%2fygwX%2b0S2YQw&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16890%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7AaxeYk8G5UCSxQdyZBA8Q&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8970%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=3fftFKMWHRVNNL52d9l47A&sysid=1)_

name: Josh Hawley
subject: 🚨FRIDAY FLASH POLL🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Should America rely on China for critical goods? [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4dde6a25a0514bb68de7c65717e13b04&_e=OLL0q6gwIvOW0TAaFhRPf0WfyRmUHn8-o0v9b8XBYdNSn6NkELczNQcJlGSPSOLBhPJ5adbhfeMWOyHYRrLElpG_UDy4wf3ZqV3od81EHUPtG9DPIk9wVbDIptbO0TTnmwc-FHKfLF09j7i2JqnZA-Js7emrLc1W5LOFJ79xkDEpGv3E31EK3hWVp6B85VGWin99dj3VOQdWt2buB7-qqzf71_w-7HHWjuwQF2tEzomkHf4VQi8QVIthoZGnWY1CeqgsHQRrkRjx7ezhfRzEXLMoeJmAFsJdYeCH1uWVzM8hNBzui8n-ZrmGxt591YcXS9N-DWLfe6_Z2txnbjM-iVIx-SgQncVK6EZeBzh-WNggTWSITAd9pFZxJ5ma-ITeCZPWxf5TvAJHH5IKhu_wdg%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
China is not a competitor, they are our opponent. President Trump recognized this, and it's high time that the Biden Administration recognize it too.

The scenes of container ships sitting idly off the coast of America are sobering, and the American people are paying for it with higher prices at the pump, at the grocery store, and nearly everywhere else.

Something must be done, and I'm not waiting around — I introduced legislation that would reduce our reliance on China and increase manufacturing here at home.

Watch the video, then take the poll and share your thoughts!
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4dde6a25a0514bb68de7c65717e13b04&_e=OLL0q6gwIvOW0TAaFhRPf0WfyRmUHn8-o0v9b8XBYdNSn6NkELczNQcJlGSPSOLBhPJ5adbhfeMWOyHYRrLElpG_UDy4wf3ZqV3od81EHUPtG9DPIk9wVbDIptbO0TTnmwc-FHKfLF09j7i2JqnZA-Js7emrLc1W5LOFJ79xkDEpGv3E31EK3hWVp6B85VGWETzmTB01ZcPuYAUD7BfCwhiOWakx6Gw1_hUTU_JdZ2kDNHObdnrI5dHcbAwFvsK4XZ8RDVV0ezFG_ekkooCleVOBOHvdQOIvjynSQjUrcjZcswEh-aOxIpaAkusAChsfWWuCIsVY5DT7Cl6-9Etzx8jFPKAauEwFvowCfEQL-4IZIK5X7WwlyjxmhiP6K7pDE9V0bSaU87lVyCW9t9oraA%3D%3D)
**_POLL QUESTION: Should America rely on China for our critical manufactured goods? _**
[**YES: KEEP RELYING ON CHINA**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4dde6a25a0514bb68de7c65717e13b04&_e=OLL0q6gwIvOW0TAaFhRPf0WfyRmUHn8-o0v9b8XBYdNSn6NkELczNQcJlGSPSOLBhPJ5adbhfeMWOyHYRrLElrrF1eHQ1U7s8XpglEXdLU5t1YuYcmMFN922-YCSMzYACpRWBjQCYQ_5DgyelZiU7Gx7b4vv2jxE8LfjPcd-UDQfN_8OmAstd5uCNHl8rRpZyz9qe74EAvN_yUy2SsJWebpXRhBfDE8L81F3-2_H5zfEAGqUFss6Skbabr814b22FM3JwwrQ17WSazgnLgMCTshz1xUktTF0b3lu8oT9tb6-o95VY-5U8TM0yPyZNf5KBQPE09QF3ZjDZVycNquboRcDWeYBiFOHawJMKT7BE5GIixLvXmGh_CWh1XS6z8BCrzT6YwSuHXp8OvYjIg5Du62-cbGAQWusml0gXAKFyQY%3D)
[**NO: BUILD MORE IN AMERICA **](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=4dde6a25a0514bb68de7c65717e13b04&_e=OLL0q6gwIvOW0TAaFhRPf0WfyRmUHn8-o0v9b8XBYdNSn6NkELczNQcJlGSPSOLBhPJ5adbhfeMWOyHYRrLElrrF1eHQ1U7s8XpglEXdLU5t1YuYcmMFN922-YCSMzYACpRWBjQCYQ_5DgyelZiU7Gx7b4vv2jxE8LfjPcd-UDQfN_8OmAstd5uCNHl8rRpZIU68aA1f3F0VF5eDUG_E_SUpPo3yyODOjodAFkOZaBLry_u30E90DVb4OJ-BczAuaiTk7SLDIAEkqstArUjRo_BW6sPUmjO5iL9UmUKHpIlRQKko9qNBe3m3uxr35RtOYR0RF9wLs9EYWKg-bp5GOy7ACFLIjepALLFfUcJ7cFhc8MaNALc7CE0Jr_Mg8DXgfN2wjYprMmNqGi_7BZqnjTp-VJg3nLRNilX4Qtrhpn8%3D)

Josh Hawley

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: THIS IS CLOSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter -- when I say the battle for Florida could determine the future of America, I MEAN IT! Take a look for yourself:
|
---
| | |
Peter \-- when I say the battle for Florida could determine the future of America, I MEAN IT! Take a look for yourself:

\-- The last U.S. Senate election in Florida was only won by a **0.12%** margin
\-- _CNN_ ranks Florida as one of the **MOST COMPETITIVE** races in America
\-- Democrats control the Senate by **ONE SEAT**
\-- Democrats are **WINNING** the fundraising race
\-- Politico said Florida will be the **MARQUEE** race
\-- Joe Biden's **ENTIRE** agenda hinges on keeping the Senate

**[EVERY last dollar can mean the difference between victory and defeat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593524:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "EVERY last dollar can mean the difference between victory and defeat")**
---
| | | [DONATE $12 NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593525:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "DONATE $12 NOW >>")
---

_Listen ... I know you receive a lot of emails but I also know you understand the gravity of the situation. _

If they win Florida, it's all over. Democrats are favored to win the Senate. But if every single Patriot makes the decision to chip in $12 or more, we will hold the line and save our great country.

**Listen, I get it: $12 doesn 't seem like much -- why would it make any difference in a multimillion dollar senate race?** It's a fair question. I'm hoping enough Patriots read this email, understand what's at stake in this race, see JUST HOW CLOSE the last race was determined by (0.12% -- that's it!), and realize that if everyone did their part, we'll walk away with this Senate race.

**[So will you do your part before 11:59 PM tonight](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593524:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "So will you do
your part before 11:59 PM tonight")**? That's when I'm personally going through the list of Patriots who stepped up in this critical moment.
**[<< YES, I'LL DO MY PART >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593524:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "<< YES, I'LL DO MY PART >>")**
Thank you so much,
Donald Trump Jr.

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593526:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58593526:JMebr72LN:m:1:3253819041:3735B97866FF91F0F075FA6AAE3B8F4A:r "please click
here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

subject: JOIN TEAM RUSSO THIS WEEKEND!
body:
Allison will be in UA on Saturday and Grove City on Sunday! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9a4937376872/how-to-volunteer-this-weekend-5026997?e=400a181d5a)
### _In Upper Arlington this Saturday at 10! ⤵️_
---
Hi ,We’re racing towards the finish line on Nov. 2, and we need your help. We have hundreds of Get Out The Vote (aka **GOTV**) volunteer shifts to fill between now and Election Day, so I need you to sign up and bring your friends!Wherever there is a Democratic sample ballot, we are carrying those at every canvass! **So by coming out to volunteer, you’ll be helping your local school board, city council, and township trustee candidates as well as Allison Russo.** It’s all hands on deck for the next two weeks, . Are you in?
## _Knock on Doors with Local Democrats:_
_Click to sign-up and share with friends:_
* [**Athens County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=96c98d81c5&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Canal Winchester GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c398ecc17e&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Columbus City Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ff55bfeab8&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Grove City/SWCSD Coordinated GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a996c2e5dc&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH ALLISON RUSSO THIS SUNDAY AT 1PM!**_
* [**Hilliard Coordinated Campaign GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=bf8412973b&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Lancaster GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=437d109057&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Madison County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6b455c1b9f&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Morgan County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=14780cb375&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Pickerington/Violet Twp. Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e3434c94a3&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Ross County GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b073bdb5ad&e=400a181d5a)
* [**Upper Arlington/NW Columbus Coordinated Campaign GOTV**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d3d4a575bf&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH CONGRESSMAN TIM RYAN THIS SATURDAY AT 10!**_
* [**Victorian Village GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c0c8ef5b30&e=400a181d5a)
* _**WITH STATE REP. KRISTIN BOGGS THIS SATURDAY AT 10!**_
* [**Wilmington GOTV Canvass**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a54ecdec80&e=400a181d5a)

| [VIEW ALL CANVASSES](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=783d8cefff&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Make Phone Calls and Send Texts:_
* [**GOTV Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d1fedfd4ca&e=400a181d5a)**with OPAL!**
* _Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Rural Voters for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=42e08042e9&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Seniors for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1b75471504&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**Students for Russo Virtual Phone Bank**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=514cad91b1&e=400a181d5a)
* _Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm_
* _Once trained, make calls every day of the week!_
* [**GOTV Text Banks!**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=096da232ca&e=400a181d5a)
* We have shifts next week and on Election Day!

| [VIEW ALL PHONE BANKS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a03374119c&e=400a181d5a)
---
## _Write Letters to Neighbors:_
Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but [**only YOU can help us send a letter to your folks.**](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b4d04bf4ec&e=400a181d5a) We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference.
_Letters should be mailed no later than October 27th_
| [VIEW TEMPLATE LETTER AND SIGN UP](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8ea223d1c9&e=400a181d5a)

clean_body: Allison will be in UA on Saturday and Grove City on Sunday! | | | In Upper Arlington this Saturday at 10! ⤵️ Hi ,We’re racing towards the finish line on Nov. 2, and we need your help. We have hundreds of Get Out The Vote (aka GOTV) volunteer shifts to fill between now and Election Day, so I need you to sign up and bring your friends!Wherever there is a Democratic sample ballot, we are carrying those at every canvass! So by coming out to volunteer, you’ll be helping your local school board, city council, and township trustee candidates as well as Allison Russo. It’s all hands on deck for the next two weeks, . Are you in? Knock on Doors with Local Democrats: Click to sign-up and share with friends: WITH ALLISON RUSSO THIS SUNDAY AT 1PM! WITH CONGRESSMAN TIM RYAN THIS SATURDAY AT 10! WITH STATE REP. KRISTIN BOGGS THIS SATURDAY AT 10! | Make Phone Calls and Send Texts: OPAL! Trainings are Sunday at 4pm and Tuesday at 6pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! Trainings are Monday and Wednesday at 6pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! Trainings are Tuesday and Thursday at 5pm Once trained, make calls every day of the week! We have shifts next week and on Election Day! | Write Letters to Neighbors: Research shows that neighbor-to-neighbor conversations are some of the most impactful political conversations you can have. The campaign can pay for flashy mailers and TV commercials, but We'll ask you to write a short note on each letter, and to hand-address each envelope to our targeted voter list. This, along with a return address folks can recognize, makes a huge difference. Letters should be mailed no later than October 27th | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2021 RUSSO FOR CONGRESS. All rights reserved.

name: Upset Alert
subject: Virginia might fall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Trump Republicans are threatening to flip VA. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGMBkra8HBgdR7S3aCpbzejQhnZjxhMO6XLCkH7NsRzOR1T3Zr5L2nPyOL0YswdxFViG8r74v3StTONFqA-wdvpFIuHnMsljwHPh_wXXsWDd8MLo0RhJV2-ufbjRNpWXJ6e2ImJnT1oCCitdurWMnqwR32Yhxev5c4aNftKzEOl3UmhHyvP3tKJTAIkj3eIP99GNZXGr6asybTQ3ef3erFCUO3rcWkTrrOy5NyYXx9OrvMijIWNcouHdPILzgOvJUPaugu-97AUFEc5n5efIj3ld8DMn11D3HYsBl1OafUDgt/3gd/HnfeiKWVSWuyXsA1qmQojw/h0/7aGuqb3maoZJZn6g47zXfcFeRJyCY1KXJG_5JyfKI1A)
Just a year after Joe Biden defeated Donald Trump in Virginia by 10 points, the Commonwealth is on _**upset alert**_.

Polls put Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor in a statistical tie, and across the entire state, extremist Republicans are on the move. Meanwhile, Democrats are asleep at the wheel, confident that Virginia is a blue state.

**They’re wrong.**

Experts are saying turnout could be way down, and if that happens, we could lose Virginia up and down the ticket.

**[Pitch in right now to help us turn the tide and keep Virginia blue. With Trumpism threatening a comeback, we need Democrats to wake up and realize that Virginia is on upset alert.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGMBkra8HBgdR7S3aCpbzejSxfOBPFxjaf0DQLz4tDhNl9dGLiu2GrE1d1H2cnsR_4kJQPZXYu-l9FpjRLLmcpKdgNKIis8EyZFLfi4gBDdlS495tnmdH3YZrsPCjqvwJ8zxjEPuiN004QB9qZOkiqb1GL4UTLMXG_NYBrT-ClZUW8HQK1PoYuKYtumHU6sV5wg5LjeK5iaoBN8f_J-UaJrXyVDF1NmSmVCBmT3qPQRm4SwqXea9QCqK0atas6Q5n4QBLgTD2wYwLVqWazQqHZLiAd2smQbC8HQxidjJCrqJ7/3gd/HnfeiKWVSWuyXsA1qmQojw/h1/w6wQbWKXju9-e4RfcVPzCkmEgl19WXPwazzTqJZKhfw)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGMBkra8HBgdR7S3aCpbzejT0sb8aESxK50BZhvIqs3LNX_hp5fri_buVn1dv0xn1ImnjNtz7oj9Q8tjak5n_Lh5fNZp1ayh-P1_1jMRJ_mAca6cwMq6hvWR_ByQoFsgBWfmrZVO66160r0amGJ-FoLCRHolhthpIOrkRv06MyVERMEDjDxv02QXHf4Kegw3msaZBr85CZ98Yrn-OjUpvdqVvpzK8BkZO_p26eDbVcBr459xTWj9SfaE8IObkQoeI0TzQb7TaOUK45sd5OOiGjEBygPTJPm9nSb1teiTTlkUR/3gd/HnfeiKWVSWuyXsA1qmQojw/h2/IUArSAHPTtSI8-5guYeBZsPqgQ8wyB372cH7nQM_iCw)

clean_body: Trump Republicans are threatening to flip VA. | | | Just a year after Joe Biden defeated Donald Trump in Virginia by 10 points, the Commonwealth is on upset alert. Polls put Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor in a statistical tie, and across the entire state, extremist Republicans are on the move. Meanwhile, Democrats are asleep at the wheel, confident that Virginia is a blue state. They’re wrong. Experts are saying turnout could be way down, and if that happens, we could lose Virginia up and down the ticket. We’ve got to get people worked up, or we could lose blue Virginia. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . Dear Friends, This is no longer a campaign, it is a movement! I am so blessed to be a part of something so big. In just _under two weeks, _you will have the chance to elect a new kind of leader: one who will return power to the people and make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. We still have a lot of work to do, but I am not slowing down. If you have not already voted, make a plan to head to the polls on or before November 2nd and bring 10 friends to cast their ballot with you. Together, we will bring a new day to Virginia. Let's go!
---

On day one, I promise to restore excellence to education with the largest education budget in the history of the Commonwealth, but that will not be possible if our kids are not safe at school. On Tuesday, I addressed the actions of the Loudoun County School Board and their attempt to cover-up the sexual assault of not one, but two young girls. Folks, our kids cannot wait! I am heartbroken for these girls and their families for how their government and leaders have failed them. As your Governor, I will require every school to have resource officers on campus, conduct annual safety audits, launch a full investigation into the Loudoun County School Board's alleged cover up and malfeasance, and all schools will be mandated to report crimes to local law enforcement. If schools do not comply, they will lose their funding. This is non-negotiable - we need to give our next generation the tools needed to succeed and that starts with ensuring they are able to learn in a safe environment.

We will visit 42 localities starting _tomorrow_ in Richmond. Click on the button below to see when I will be at an event near you!

name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: a shocking stat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
We pay some of the highest taxes in the country, and what do we get in return? Rising crime and devastating population loss. | |
---
Friend,

Here’s a shocking stat: Illinois taxes are 38.95% higher than the national average.

Yes, you read that right — **_38.95% higher taxes._**

**We pay some of the highest taxes in the country, and what do we get in return? Rising crime and devastating population loss. **

I know that I am not okay with that deal, and I bet you aren't either. We need to make Illinois Strong and start getting better outcomes for our state.

I'm running for Governor because I believe there is no better way to support the aspirations and needs of Illinoisans than having a robust, growing economy that offers a path to jobs, financial security, and the ability to care for our families.

As Governor, I will focus on supporting small businesses and rekindling the entrepreneurial spirit in Illinois. I will work to reduce barriers to starting businesses, and reduce the taxes that make it so hard to afford real estate, hire employees, and invest in growth. Our public employee pension system has created an unsustainable burden on Illinois working families, and it is in desperate need of reform.

I will work tirelessly to reclaim Chicago’s position as one of our nation’s financial capitals, by attracting entrepreneurs, technologists, investors, and the cryptocurrency community to the shores of Lake Michigan.

It's time we got a better deal for Illinois.

If you want to learn more about where I stand on the issues and what my priorities will be as Governor, I encourage you to visit my website at **[jessesullivan.com](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=1379f682499442e6b821408a0e88d745&_e=JO2oz1Ou6RmJHn2iQ2MlaUSdvsEgVxeoiHBMvwkl4NFTBFoLDsUCVZawb0CY1ncM1cFs0-VlBFeHNHuYUb6hOzZFxwaO5fkqjd0LDhvuI-Z5BF5LxALVZ2bwgpL9z6qwMhpKfpaPTghXtiKB6B4c5tc5q_pG65De2IhC3ST3af0c0kG7nvjfqijrFWcJ1XVSFPuaIibq8VoH3axJ-_8fB_hkV9Q5x84nqCi9jlFQSxenYU-qZnIp0XyioakRnKjW9eMW5m9k_AFM8rz5hPKSaHPSCjlD3QRwyDaU6uoNTHgkpY066V5PUH2esoESjbpu6CLcJ2Wc5WpfHJUeVsdM2Y0dB7fCbrnp9UNxA0YE8V0biz1sYVJh_0Y6iMC_PGIQCQbqTZsGIePlsoI-xeVkeDMjT-lw2FaWf2Al1TY2XuKSF9yN2u5UHj1XUabAQT23LoQTXDOQ5egKtYLTgGas1w%3D%3D)**

All the best,
Sully

body:

Peter,

Democrats are killing the American Dream and pushing our country down the slippery slope of socialism.

_We must remove them from power to keep the American Dream alive. _

**I’m living proof that the American Dream works. **

[](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=d88ccc00c30341f49f195f25e58d97f4&_e=pgpTYeG7Wrq4SBKD75MuHoLr8P1WfB-Nq7FxzM1yAPXAKpXX9eS_LVfeVO3SeBjaZ-bIedZ5vk2GWXqcUssGOfQRxyNW3PFdddHyvKVmb_jhyCvUc-uIR9Bmr_tWGIbSpJXwwuFeBx07md-5HAJ51o41auE79g8eTMjmAtayZI8JWkkCeOiUvsymXuPxHx4NDrV_5V_GzvkLLS0hQp1aUE4JDizH1k3KPctmMgaUTP97fQ7g0kzbIW0R08S9mqtBXEhKV1up0lhYZ4GmGevt_KycRYgiiY79Xup6drQ0uA5IUQIoIy4bgIcyltvdscbwqGua0y8IiJMkVL_dgFBgHXiSCmyHm0PHf-CmtNZT_qCCAnhIk0nB14IWfWURnYRoRFkFvjFr21dN68yfX2FRnSKrbsN4tMXKz2_OIVTXhK6ZZbapHnDEr3GNL7qh6uw-sQbjhGpJTeMEo9aqXjqVjBQfCEgDCc2I3tJ2yIBbFFgYANeiUhz8_wJ54Q7ZEEEBpAUA2olE4UzNtxCvDav1nQ%3D%3D)

**Peter, only in America can a boy who left a country surrounded by socialism become a successful business owner, create hundreds of jobs, and run for Senate. **

My story could not have happened anywhere else in the world – and that’s _exactly_ what Democrats are trying to take from us!

I’m not going to let these out-of-touch radicals turn our country into a socialist nightmare. _I hope you won’t either._

[_**Pitch in to help restore a PRO-FREEDOM majority in the Senate >>>**_](http://links.berniemorenoforohio.com/u/click?_t=e4b84e1dbdd94cb490475227943c7e8a&_m=d88ccc00c30341f49f195f25e58d97f4&_e=pgpTYeG7Wrq4SBKD75MuHoLr8P1WfB-Nq7FxzM1yAPXAKpXX9eS_LVfeVO3SeBjaZ-bIedZ5vk2GWXqcUssGOfQRxyNW3PFdddHyvKVmb_jhyCvUc-uIR9Bmr_tWGIbSpJXwwuFeBx07md-5HAJ51o41auE79g8eTMjmAtayZI8JWkkCeOiUvsymXuPxHx4NDrV_5V_GzvkLLS0hQp1aUE4JDizH1k3KPctmMgaUTP97fQ7g0kzbIW0R08S9mqtBXEhKV1up0lhYZ4GmGevt_KycRYgiiY79Xup6drQ0uA4FKTV9cUyd1zdtcvEYzOh_wKZj228eFAN7w4K02acw5pCbvh4JPLZcM_s2vccpB9F328C6Nms10AbI-J6PMjfZwCA1kv2q0D_EdZAHFKV0UNwvvdXpYSNFu-fv-DLre27f4OlnAlK5drOYNcE4E1Uinu9rAQzyADhqUz_upRnUDD0XYp-yPmh1DTdtkjv49SukolQucKF95HthQGzy2JWKaLdvCX2yMpX65-ahBPZKCQ%3D%3D)
