name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Wanna meet up with John + Gisele near Cresco, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Coffee and snacks on them, obviously.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211022-3119-header&t=1&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)
Peter,
As a way to show their deep gratitude for our team's incredible grassroots supporters, John + Gisele want to treat YOU to a Sheetz (or Wawa) run.
Coffee and snacks on them, _obviously._
Seriously though: Lt. Gov. John Fetterman and our SLOP Gisele would be honored and delighted to treat you to the finest Pennsylvania gas station dining-establishment of your choosing (as long as it’s Sheetz or Wawa!).
[**_All you have to do to be automatically entered to win is donate $5 or any amount using this link. It's that simple! Don't miss your chance to go on a Sheetz run (or Wawa, if you prefer) with Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211022-3119&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211022-3119&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211022-3119&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)**
Here's the rundown of how this will go if you end up being our campaign's lucky winner:
✅ John + Gisele will come meet you in person near Cresco.
✅ You'll scoot on over to Sheetz (a.k.a. John's favorite) or Wawa (you get to choose).
✅ And, most importantly, you'll get the opportunity to chat on-on-one with John and Gisele about what issues matter most to you. You can tell him directly what you want to see in Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, give our campaign feedback, or really whatever!
**Peter, don't miss this opportunity to meet up with John + Gisele for a Sheetz run on them. They would both really love to meet you, so please enter below: 👇**
[**_Make a donation of any amount to our campaign right now, and you’ll be *automatically* entered to win a trip to Sheetz (or Wawa) with John + Gisele Fetterman. This is a one-of-a-kind contest that's closing soon, so make sure you don't miss out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211022-3119&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)__
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211022-3119&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)**
Good luck!
— All of us at Team Fetterman HQ

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by October 31, 2021. Enter by [**contributing here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20211019-contest?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=3119_434096_BDfEmL&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL), or visit this page to **[enter without contributing](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-sheetz-wawa-nodonate-contest-signup?source=em-3119&t=8&akid=3119%2E434096%2EBDfEmL)**. Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of Pennsylvania. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

The month of October is well-known in the United States as Breast Cancer Awareness Month. We often see athletes and celebrities wearing pink, and even buildings are lit-up with pink lights. It’s certainly a nice sentiment, but some Tennesseans are going a step further. Two local non-profit groups, Breast Connect and Courage to Conquer Cancer, [have joined togethe](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f33385cea0634da1a8933fdcdc243fc0&_e=pVt63-Dz12xdjGtFH6Cj_9u0IfCj4jvYdNwH324Dw1K72lTNT1Lm9PRaY05_EpipcgyhlaaoxsI_mrffEsqnrXQSAX06G2fbCdL9m3zmcXuJg3ynkyptXEhq3iN8dJ4DxRZP5trG66E5HCD5a0hFwlPawMvImdxZhxRpLu76tjPwpLBQcz9FJ5Hs8kvYuhGPll-f-U4DBzT8KTl4yqgmRBp-UbptydljB4C1mOUy_QgZMm71ZoIAWA-u-Aq30GlZwN3mJ65ev-z35nys6m1uCGNFWfgIt1s4DSmFkBjGZ_Nnk1HyskLOxqzZ1CQ3sivwEzgHA-L3JHjdguJE4SmP527GepUXHm9bRGxz73tqC9F8iHj_2D637cGka5FYql1rO6tF8dxqfGoYjddJf5Nx2v14pF-UQmTOGx10Pjff_8lVIz68US8Dv38rxgT61kiI7S1bUgLNZooy_p2lR5QDBLyIyqSNi1EBSsXmkYNnDLw%3D)r to form [Connect to Conquer](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f33385cea0634da1a8933fdcdc243fc0&_e=pVt63-Dz12xdjGtFH6Cj_0Z1xlGK5ko42P5OjcvxbzNOh4zw-oU2OoTG3zF66tua86LZ8hPjdjelB-IEf2XSIGLyok2fQziKoeeXis4PyZTw3-tZ6gYgB_TLw0cbjUCbJSaX_GySMmdzEmoRCAjf6RCex6pFrlN-hYPMSpbyavA4JsOIKQkLaYY6Dydgfr5miww81RC5avIsd1tbNGrNIHayChqf7-JjnUWmg9Oq4wZ1VEpKX8aI310IWza4hEkrBMNYyChs06w9LBS1BZusWg%3D%3D) to help people battling breast cancer.

Connect to Conquer provides post-op medical supplies and emotional support to breast cancer patients. Dr. Kristi Roberson-James came up with the idea when her sister-in-law was diagnosed with breast cancer and saw a need for a product to help women heal comfortably. Now, Dr. Roberson-James’ recovery kits have helped many Tennessee women.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Where In The World Are Biden & Harris? 🙄 This week, President Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris criss-crossed the country. Whether it was campaign stops for liberal candidates in and or touting their budget-blowing “infrastructure” bill in , , , and , they put a lot of miles on Air Force One and Two. But there’s one important place they didn’t go: the southern border. I’ve talked about the crisis at the southern border, but this week . In the past 12 months, border agents have arrested 1.7 million migrants. We also found out this week that Biden illegal immigrants to New York in the dead of night. Never mind that the White House never answered our about the migrants who were secretly flown into Tennessee. All of this begs the question: Why in the world are President Biden and Vice President Harris traveling everywhere BUT the southern border? For 10 months, the Biden administration has ignored, downplayed, and even lied about the . I guess the answer is obvious: They just don’t care. | Tennesseans On A Noble Mission 🧑🔬 The month of October is well-known in the United States as Breast Cancer Awareness Month. We often see athletes and celebrities wearing pink, and even buildings are lit-up with pink lights. It’s certainly a nice sentiment, but some Tennesseans are going a step further. Two local non-profit groups, Breast Connect and Courage to Conquer Cancer, to form to help people battling breast cancer. Connect to Conquer provides post-op medical supplies and emotional support to breast cancer patients. Dr. Kristi Roberson-James came up with the idea when her sister-in-law was diagnosed with breast cancer and saw a need for a product to help women heal comfortably. Now, Dr. Roberson-James’ recovery kits have helped many Tennessee women. | Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun 🎉 → Look out for these fugitives on the run 🐷**() → This grandma has her own personal cheering squad 🚌 () → Can this come with every sandwich? 🥪 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 10/22/21

body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=1)
---
Friend, This week, I celebrated an industry that plays a major role in Illinois’ economic success—manufacturing. October is Manufacturing Month and it's a great way to honor a sector that includes over half a million jobs and thousands of businesses in Illinois, as well as contributing over $100 billion to our state’s annual economic output. **I was able to tour General Cable in Du Quoin, meet their hard-working employees, and hear how vital the work they do out of that plant is for the Du Quoin-area community and state when it comes to jobs and economic output.** Illinois manufacturing isn’t just crucial to our state; it’s also crucial to the nation. Illinois has been at the heart of a resurgence in American manufacturing in recent years. The only downside of this resurgence is that our state faces a significant shortfall of qualified workers to fill manufacturing positions. In fact, research shows that Illinois may fall short by as much as 300,000 skilled manufacturing workers over the next several years. That’s why events like Manufacturing Month are so important. It’s vital that we draw attention to this pivotal sector, and, in particular, raise awareness of manufacturing as a viable, lucrative, and rewarding industry. **Manufacturing has a big footprint in Illinois and, as governor, I'm committed to making sure that the Illinois manufacturing sector remains strong for decades to come!** S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to showcase is Becky Borgsmiller, who is our Williamson County Director. She recently traveled north to staff me at my tour of the Prysmian Group/General Cable plant in Du Quoin—taking the pictures that we posted earlier in the week. Thank you, Becky, for your friendship and support!
* * *
**In the News** I joined Greg Bishop on WMAY this week to talk all things Illinois politics—from the campaign to redistricting to what Illinoisans can count on from me as governor. [Listen to my conversation with Greg Bishop here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnT9PnyZKyhE6PY1oFcMe-I8&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=2)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** As governor, I'll back common-sense, business-friendly measures that support the manufacturing industry in Illinois and will re-ignite our economy by reversing the failed, tax-and-spend policies of the Pritzker administration. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqA97gf8yo9zpp0MF0FVs7AP_SHXCmh2PDgWX_49SGVKYY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=3)
* * *
**Attention Galesburg and Knox County-Area Supporters** Join me on Tuesday, November 2nd, for a [Pre-Dinner Reception](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/evening?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=4) at Visions Venue in Galesburg starting at 4:30pm! Come hear my plan to defend parents' rights, lower taxes, and restore real leadership back in government by [getting your tickets here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/evening?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=5). You can also signify your support for our shared vision and values by being a [Lieutenant, Captain, or Colonel sponsor here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/evening?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=6)!
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=7)** so we can share our above Facebook post on Pritzker's lack of leadership for our children with more people across Illinois! Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_22&n=11), software for leaders.

body:

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane continued to crisscross the state this week with events in Union County, Hamilton County, Morrow County, Summit County, and Medina County spreading her America First message. While it was a busy week, it also ended with the announcement of our latest round of advertising. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Fire Fauci** This morning, the campaign launched a six-figure statewide TV advertising blitz on Fox News Channel over the next eight weeks. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=4ff1911c722b40fa87ecc0863a5b00a3&_e=X1we7cbY5quIDqJa-51AavGU3I2rjsN9J7P_Zt1Fg8wYA5FZL6AzpxAwvQAJHrbi4R3EVYQCzIS6M8KTdMH57O-IcND4t4azGz5CWOn8JwZvNizRWUuxkidUoNjLwPMKDL2GO3lj8gFz7GgqvS2KAia3Z4_ecUlqE8reE29QttftQzHJH91XVLRc6bkgjtoDJ710R2Lf7-wS1MMTfHDB9ChdZx8e2_0vJub3gSceRBtxlFq38GOt-uVZgNF6BdW7fFzeL_LKeBBq5QoU7zSp0mo0T9aJVEL9qzzqPOSHTmE%3D)
The Biden administration is waging a war on parent’s right and putting their left-wing ideology ahead of children’s well-being. As Ohio’s next Senator, Jane will always value parents over politicians and fight for your constitutional liberties over unconstitutional mandates.

**From The Trail**
Late last Friday, Jane joined the Union County Republican Party Presidents’ Club for their annual dinner. It was great to see so many patriots active and engaged, as we continue to see that across the state.
On Saturday morning, Jane attended a truly great annual event with the Northeast Hamilton County Republican Club Pancake Breakfast. Jane was glad to be back in her hometown and see so many old friends and make a few new ones!
Later in the day Saturday, Jane traveled to Morrow County for the Republican Century Club Appreciation Dinner. Jane talked about securing the border, stopping the out of control spending in Washington, and getting people back to work!
There was a great crowd at the Summit County Finance Dinner on Monday night. Chairman Bryan Williams put on an informative evening where Jane could share her vision for Ohio.
On Wednesday, Jane joined over 300 Ohioans to see Lara Trump at an event for the Medina County GOP. Folks all across Ohio are fired up for the America First agenda!
**Jane on Real America's Voice**
On Wednesday, Jane joined Dr. Gina on Real America’s Voice to talk about how Joe Biden’s disastrous policies are harming women. The Biden Administration is targeting womein in the workforce, women standing up for their children, and women by their very biological definition.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=4ff1911c722b40fa87ecc0863a5b00a3&_e=X1we7cbY5quIDqJa-51AampR73NYXO7MVbysjUctr48eK0CYImHXvOATBKtNJphSo-_xcbzGaG4aWnVv6FipYa3CYeBsnNCtlQJ-AkuPPaAyO2BAwPZ8wtLRsYFXz1z_ucOdHUsJwsk3fdUc1C8Lz3zrdR9Qwl4fgahTkHs_GHTieDJ8URpH36uw4_lQPOY5H0VS8OkDUb_1NgLvRpLMd-6ffSo3CC3sA5U7ata_HyNmHAG7LxTmvXDQRh0qvFlIWm40tTwB_GDJ0vODYqWdc-HqQ1mshOCsWZvnE-BnA9M%3D)
Jane will stand up and fight against these attacks on women and protect parents' right and on our way of life. Click the image above and check out the full interview!

I hope everyone has a great weekend.
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

The Defense Authorization Act is set to take guns away from our service members and retirees without giving them due process. These men and women, who fought for us, deserve the right to keep their guns--a right that is given to them in the United States Constitution.
And while Liberal Lisa Murkowski has stayed quiet on the issue, veterans across the country have stood up and joined Kelly for Alaska in telling the Senate “NO!” Will you stand with them?

clean_body: | | | | 10 minutes remain to show your support Friend, Are you Pro-Second Amendment? Do you support our Military? If you answered yes to either of the above, we need YOU to sign our petition below. The Defense Authorization Act is set to take guns away from our service members and retirees without giving them due process. These men and women, who fought for us, deserve the right to keep their guns--a right that is given to them in the United States Constitution. And while Liberal Lisa Murkowski has stayed quiet on the issue, veterans across the country have stood up and joined Kelly for Alaska in telling the Senate “NO!” Will you stand with them? Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

name: Conservative Alert (Team Fallon)
subject: Biden’s inflation is no joke!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/xqrUus-FOoSnAJ_1IA9B0g~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjVaycP0UgYjQ3ODVhNmZjYjMwMzNkZmE2MzE2NmE5NzZkN2ZmNTFEQ2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9iaWRlbi1pbmZsYXRpb24tY2F0Y2hXBXNwY2V1Qgphcpwnc2HbBYGMUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

Peter,
**Joe Biden** and his minions like Jen Psaki have made their **contempt for ordinary Americans** clear.
**They joke about rising inflation and mounting supply chain crises, **saying they are problems only for rich people.
You and I both know that is...as Joe Biden would say...a bunch of malarkey!
**Skyrocketing inflation is hurting ordinary Americans like YOU.**
Gas prices, food prices, utility prices, car prices, you name it. They’ve all gone up by double digit percentages since Joe Biden claimed the presidency.
Couple that with massive labor shortages created by the woke Dems “stimulus” policies, and **anybody with half a brain can clearly see we’re headed for disaster.**
We’re not even **ONE YEAR into their SOCIALIST EXPERIMENT** and our economy is already on the brink of catastrophe, and regular folks are hurting badly.
**America can’t take more of this socialism!** We MUST take back Congress in the next election, and we must win by such a huge margin that the Dems can’t possibly rig the results.

Derek,

Democratic leadership has changed Virginia – for the better. Expanding health care, passing gun violence prevention policies, making it easier to vote and protecting a woman's right to choose – these are just some examples of what Democrats have achieved in the Commonwealth in recent years.

**Now, Virginians face a choice.** Will they stay on this path to progress and keep passing legislation that improves people's lives? Or will they go backward?

I'll tell you what I think: I think Virginia will choose to keep working for progress by electing Terry McAuliffe this November. But this isn't a sure thing – polling shows the governor's race is close – so I'm asking for your help.

clean_body: | | | Derek, Democratic leadership has changed Virginia – for the better. Expanding health care, passing gun violence prevention policies, making it easier to vote and protecting a woman's right to choose – these are just some examples of what Democrats have achieved in the Commonwealth in recent years. Now, Virginians face a choice. Will they stay on this path to progress and keep passing legislation that improves people's lives? Or will they go backward? I'll tell you what I think: I think Virginia will choose to keep working for progress by electing Terry McAuliffe this November. But this isn't a sure thing – polling shows the governor's race is close – so I'm asking for your help. As we work to make our way out of the pandemic, it couldn't be more important for Virginia to have a Democratic governor in office, someone who will follow the science and take public health seriously. We can't trust Terry's opponent, who's been endorsed by former President Trump, to do that. I've known Terry for a long time and I know how much he cares about the Commonwealth. I saw it the last time he served as governor and I can't wait to see it again. But first we have to help him get back to the governor's office. Thank you, Amy | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=270807ca59314d46a6905a175325855c&_e=jV-kpVcYxe7wSE4zYp1aTjKq7aoXL9aFjhTBgYFo8MuqRib52IPmaqjzIJ3NApWwQoURcEUzNBaqEcRUaL8b2Y3mPmI6mxY55on-h7sWlQ5bFtwv3VIltQyhLa9m0izRMZqOYoGbiysLg-5-3mu5jSdtpZUPbpJd_MeRz8m2oBlsJZBeBcaQlXaYcHQwinEDp5_ViHry-ZuAX7Nb5b23ji6CH5f9loVPBeJpF_KabLOvqy_t-vid0OuSARloyNCgvB5Q4wKsx3aYaIXXD-lai5x51ODbzDqOhy4rnSroc0RyPgGnjBvlsPwexWEKgNef2l0uZziH49JjsB7ddqkh2Mr416bR9lmdi8RDGPmRSqkzCAv0TvIJKdM7gHO9ZSTlCstqGcH0njvbi0SlfsffpIgrp5kS-iAAla29x_K8u69uKwOtBs4U3MCQn2GSVmT1wL4guMzGwV6sg-ljZBLgnmxLkmjoOHCjjPAQ_nLx3gb_hTTmdxlrmK_LffOs15h_rtiyREgbUsDjnYMN7voT3w%3D%3D)

Peter,

This headline says it all.

Our opponent recently released his latest fundraising numbers, and we can't ignore the results. After three months of fundraising - and with help from National Democrats, he has more than $17.2 MILLION in his war chest.

**[We need your help, Peter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=270807ca59314d46a6905a175325855c&_e=jV-kpVcYxe7wSE4zYp1aTjKq7aoXL9aFjhTBgYFo8MuqRib52IPmaqjzIJ3NApWwQoURcEUzNBaqEcRUaL8b2Y3mPmI6mxY55on-h7sWlQ5bFtwv3VIltQyhLa9m0izRMZqOYoGbiysLg-5-3mu5jSdtpZUPbpJd_MeRz8m2oBlsJZBeBcaQlXaYcHQwinEDp5_ViHry-ZuAX7Nb5b23ji6CH5f9loVPBeJpF_KabLOvqy_t-vid0OuSARloyNCgvB5Q4wKsx3aYaIXXD-lai5x51ODbzDqOhy4rnSroc0RyPgGnjBvlsPwexWEKgNefSVO9bE2qnJlaXm9xv9xsWyLCfpgE7ahDNxlXebE_jBmZeku1hZmosiaXbcPF72SA75J8Ywz99vvdmG1cO5Jwwy9hX49XwcCj08gnj9j4iHeB3yTHu3xLxqIraeM70M-AaXWdFPZQm0Jgt28McR8y_A3-Vb9NYvwjMLyc8CtN7J7lhygNonT3IH1Aff2qhckHkLas_V4FOD5mo08J8x96tg%3D%3D)**

We just had a meeting with our finance team, and it's clear: **if we have more donors from your area give $5 or $10 right now,[we'll be able to increase our momentum and WIN THIS RACE.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=270807ca59314d46a6905a175325855c&_e=jV-kpVcYxe7wSE4zYp1aTjKq7aoXL9aFjhTBgYFo8MuqRib52IPmaqjzIJ3NApWwQoURcEUzNBaqEcRUaL8b2Y3mPmI6mxY55on-h7sWlQ5bFtwv3VIltQyhLa9m0izRMZqOYoGbiysLg-5-3mu5jSdtpZUPbpJd_MeRz8m2oBlsJZBeBcaQlXaYcHQwinEDp5_ViHry-ZuAX7Nb5b23ji6CH5f9loVPBeJpF_KabLOvqy_t-vid0OuSARloyNCgvB5Q4wKsx3aYaIXXD-lai5x51ODbzDqOhy4rnSroc0RyPgGnjBvlsPwexWEKgNefJN6APGQ5s1BglRtaySBT78tE5Pn8HYStuNv9zZfa7jA-AoNKThNmeQcJeZ-e8t-U9v38poWMqSnJmcrfh9L3ybBlDMzWliD_cIiUqPtyB6aINPqPuPBRVAquXIvP10ylPYS06grZa4tsvi-8xZsYEeeCqbXVFO2onQzRCFF1A1gGI6tfiR3TrNanV2FViveY6uf8tPKu4jsNTgytfdue3A%3D%3D)**

Our campaign is off to a terrific start - raising $3.75 million in only five short weeks.

**But the Democrat incumbent is the NUMBER ONE FUNDRAISER IN THE COUNTRY. He raised more than any other Democrat or Republican.** _We simply cannot ignore his numbers._

Peter, we need to raise as much as possible so we can communicate our message to the voters of Georgia and fend off the coming attacks. **[Can we count on you to make an immediate contribution and help give us the boost we need to win?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=270807ca59314d46a6905a175325855c&_e=jV-kpVcYxe7wSE4zYp1aTjKq7aoXL9aFjhTBgYFo8MuqRib52IPmaqjzIJ3NApWwQoURcEUzNBaqEcRUaL8b2Y3mPmI6mxY55on-h7sWlQ5bFtwv3VIltQyhLa9m0izRMZqOYoGbiysLg-5-3mu5jSdtpZUPbpJd_MeRz8m2oBlsJZBeBcaQlXaYcHQwinEDp5_ViHry-ZuAX7Nb5b23ji6CH5f9loVPBeJpF_KabLOvqy_t-vid0OuSARloyNCgvB5Q4wKsx3aYaIXXD-lai5x51ODbzDqOhy4rnSroc0RyPgGnjBvlsPwexWEKgNef-Kv9LnkhmoN4AP8YJOZlg1T7Kd-ovG_TNXtprB0rKtQ4k8Kux5jv2HU6rdrFeCd2PHdxEE6l_vZrZoQBdZxzU2EN8ZqoBWbp1e6eRyBRjiWPAcHGYnCQU4Xi0dIhynHJa1-f9dIKi32RsApk1WvRqpjjmxBvzKs8pcZEm_0FKnz3EVGNLcKww3iq51LATTrVQIKo6Qgb84F9iNkcQKiXag%3D%3D)**

Donald J. Trump October 21st, 2021
Look at what just happened in Arizona last night for the people that really won the Election, by a lot, us. The FORENSIC AUDITORS released a new report that discredits all of the disinformation put out by the RINO Maricopa County Board of Supervisors. The auditors said Maricopa County purposely misled the public and spread “outright lies” about their findings. The Board provided zero evidence for their false claims, including no accounting for the 12,772 illegal ballots (more than the election margin alone) who moved outside of Maricopa County before the election. They have no valid answer for how there were more early ballots returned by voters than received, why their official results did not match who voted, why there were more duplicate ballots than originals, or why they deleted and purged their Election Management System data in defiance of a subpoena, which is against the law, and they did it on the day before the audit began. These incredible findings affect tens of thousands of ballots, and therefore, the outcome of the Election. This does not even touch Pima County, which had precincts with more than 100 percent turnout for mail-in ballots.

The Presidential Election in Arizona (and in numerous states) was a Fraud. Maricopa County officials lied, and then tried to cover it up. Now they are facing criminal liability since defying a subpoena and deleting election records are serious crimes. Hopefully Attorney General Mark Brnovich will do something about it. Regardless, based on these findings, and many others, Arizona should decertify their Fake Election results immediately!

Folks,

We have some work to do.

Kevin McCarthy has spent the last year focusing on anything but the people of CA-23. Because of his inaction, lies, and ignorance, California’s Central Valley has suffered.

**It’s time to turn things around.** I want to make CA-23 a place that future generations will flock to for opportunity, not leave in droves. As long as Kevin McCarthy is representing us in Congress, our community will never be able to reach its full potential -- we have to do something.

I’m fighting to bring real change, and our campaign depends on grassroots supporters like you.

**[Will you donate any amount to show your support and help create a brighter future for CA-23? name: Team AOC
subject: This issue is bigger than ideology
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
When it comes to reducing our emissions and slowing down the climate crisis, failure is not an option.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211022-2603-header&t=1&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)
We knew that the fight for bold climate action would be fraught with challenges. And this week is a solemn reminder of the difficulties we face in our current political climate:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2603_2526796_805v05&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)
It’s difficult to read this headline and truly process the gravity of what’s at stake. Far too often, the media portrayal of the climate crisis feels divorced from its real world consequences.
**But when it comes to reducing our emissions and slowing down the climate crisis, failure is not an option.** The stakes are simply too high and we must keep fighting.
Unfortunately, we’re seeing how just one vote in Congress can put an entire generation at risk. But the power of one vote can go in the opposite direction as well.
**If we can elect more and more Green New Deal champions to Congress in 2022, we can continue to shift the power in our favor. That’s why Alexandria launched Courage to Change: a leadership PAC that supports progressive candidates who refuse to bow to establishment and corporate pressure.**
[If you’re able to, will you split a $6 contribution between Courage to Change – AOC’s leadership PAC – and our campaign to help us elect and support Green New Deal champions to Congress? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2603_2526796_805v05&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2603_2526796_805v05&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)**
Let’s be clear. The climate crisis is bigger than political ideology. It’s a moral imperative for humanity and our planet’s future to reduce and eventually eliminate fossil fuel emissions.
There are many ways to do it, and we can’t afford to give up. While we fight for bold climate investments now, we also need more leaders in Congress for the long-term who are willing to stand up to Big Oil lobbyists and build the clean energy revolution we need.
Through Courage to Change, we’re able to support progressive challengers and bolster progressive leaders in Congress who embody the ideals of climate and environmental justice.
[Alexandria is leading the movement for a Green New Deal in Congress, and with our help, we can send more climate champions to Congress to join her. Please split a $6 contribution — or anything you can — between Courage to Change and our campaign today. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2603_2526796_805v05&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)
With determination,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211022?refcode=em20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=24&refcode2=2603_2526796_805v05&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211022-2603-P_FND_EGR_GND&t=25&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2603%2E2526796%2E805v05)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Extremists for Youngkin
subject: Bannon, Gorka, Giuliani, Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
They’re the VA GOP’s top surrogates. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGCJHCvX5zctbGEKL-Hl4RQyIm4-CxeaCPpScT0qb2Hgygve8ClFEcacuFeqUUNC2bQ97Xv_Byr-YrujQ6sBSh700LzVTJGB_vFAc6BaPo3_sPEzjpwzLqfKYwlOwmlQrT1hV97ADUAtwkcICwt33aBsZQa9fKrdMqc1SkRbXpOBxbb4Q2F4m55IB9TYoeRUgw4XZ2_AGQm-77Wb1GgbtFHtRiApOFAOnGDqTpEPGdmbel9QiApF5KUkU4wQ9U9-EQmu8JC1No9YtLKLmVKYq54DsSGIx3rxqr2rHfWwBAXwD/3gd/mrIhl_j6QNK1eUCkB7dNJw/h0/pRF-QhzAPR4ikdmEsD2zoWpYV7C6baqy5_vsgdvvbOM)
Derek, we’re up against a whole host of horrible people trying to flip Virginia red.

Sebastian Gorka -- a white supremacist and Trump advisor -- is supporting Glenn Youngkin because Youngkin has _**“fully embraced MAGA.”**_

Steve Bannon -- Donald Trump’s right-hand man and the mastermind behind Trump’s election -- came to Virginia for a rally last week where **they pledged allegiance to a flag that was at the deadly January 6 insurrection.**

Rudy Giuliani -- Trump’s fixer who **fought tooth and nail to overturn the 2021 election** \-- put out a video supporting Youngkin.

**_Donald Trump himself has endorsed Glenn Youngkin SIX times._**

Derek, that’s not even including the Koch network and DeVos family, who are bankrolling Glenn Youngkin’s campaign.

[**We can’t let them flip Virginia. With polls showing tied races up and down the ballot, they seriously have a shot to sweep Virginia. clean_body: They’re the VA GOP’s top surrogates. | | | Derek, we’re up against a whole host of horrible people trying to flip Virginia red. Sebastian Gorka -- a white supremacist and Trump advisor -- is supporting Glenn Youngkin because Youngkin has “fully embraced MAGA.” Steve Bannon -- Donald Trump’s right-hand man and the mastermind behind Trump’s election -- came to Virginia for a rally last week where they pledged allegiance to a flag that was at the deadly January 6 insurrection. Rudy Giuliani -- Trump’s fixer who fought tooth and nail to overturn the 2021 election \-- put out a video supporting Youngkin. Donald Trump himself has endorsed Glenn Youngkin SIX times. Derek, that’s not even including the Koch network and DeVos family, who are bankrolling Glenn Youngkin’s campaign. With extremists threatening to flip Virginia, we have to stand up for democracy. \-- Common Good VA | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via .
